name: Voter Action Project
subject: Now more than ever, we have to come through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We can't stress this enough: For less than the price of a latte at your local coffee shop, you can help cover the costs of registering a new voter.
We have to start now to be ready for next year's elections. RUSH $24 or more today and help us register a tidal wave of new voters nationwide >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- Passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard we need your help .
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=15.00&tknfa=LiZzNmSJcTD8ZkJQoMTH1XaxrhLEIghR0qGuytm_-bI=&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=25.00&tknfa=LiZzNmSJcTD8ZkJQoMTH1XaxrhLEIghR0qGuytm_-bI=&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=50.00&tknfa=LiZzNmSJcTD8ZkJQoMTH1XaxrhLEIghR0qGuytm_-bI=&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=LiZzNmSJcTD8ZkJQoMTH1XaxrhLEIghR0qGuytm_-bI=&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=250.00&tknfa=LiZzNmSJcTD8ZkJQoMTH1XaxrhLEIghR0qGuytm_-bI=&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=SBOTZP2UUFw2WS9U7eJiylFxmcc4NgZna/O8lYt94y56w0fvkZuthTylarEX7lZjq+G9mF7+Qf4nUW2jS66M9kMyVidNrxtrx403SP0aMnk=]

name: Wiley (personal)
subject: My thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
| Hi Peter, I wanted to personally thank you for stepping up over the last several days during our big FEC fundraising deadline. Your support helped us close our very first quarter with real momentum, proving that our team has what it takes to get the job done and bring home a win for working families. Your hard work set a high bar, and together, we're building a grassroots movement that can deliver the leadership that North Carolina needs. I'm energized by the growing momentum to flip North Carolina blue and secure a Democratic Senate majority. I don’t take it for granted having supporters like you who understand how crucial it is to lay the groundwork early on. I’ve seen campaigns struggle because people don’t tune in and get involved until it’s too late. Every bit of effort you’ve put in is making a real impact in bringing people-first leadership back to our state. I’m proud to work alongside you, Peter. Together, we can reach every goal ahead of us and set the standard for a winning grassroots team. Thank you for all that you do. All my best, Wiley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110757505/555235096/474294291?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQ1ZTIwZi1hMTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82sDSHeqfVcJPuwyOzehmtC5z_Qv9bGE994L7d2Ye7Y=)

name: Please take action (via StateDemocrats.com)
subject: We’re missing your signature, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Stand against the GOP’s disastrous tax bill before Congress sends it to Donald Trump’s desk »
#

_We’re missing your signature, Peter._ **URGENT DEADLINE: 11:59PM on July 2, 2025** **[STAND AGAINST DONALD TRUMP’S BILL: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250702?t=1&akid=9082%2E614464%2EWSAyNv)** **Here’s what we know about the version of Donald Trump’s big disastrous bill that passed through the Senate yesterday:** ❌ **17 MILLION** Americans would be kicked off their health insurance
❌ **Over $200 BILLION** would be cut from food assistance programs
❌ **$1 TRILLION** would be given away in tax cuts for the ultra-rich
❌ **$4 TRILLION** would be added to our nation’s deficit **[If you stand AGAINST this bill, please add your name to our emergency letter to Congress before our deadline at midnight tonight »](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250702?t=2&akid=9082%2E614464%2EWSAyNv)** **[STAND AGAINST DONALD TRUMP’S BILL: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250702?t=3&akid=9082%2E614464%2EWSAyNv)** **This version of Donald Trump’s big disastrous bill is _EVEN WORSE_ than the version that passed through the House earlier this year.** It’s got even more cuts to Medicaid. It adds trillions of dollars to our national deficit. And it’s all to fund massive tax breaks for a handful of billionaire mega-donors. _It’s disgusting._ **The GOP is aiming to send the final version of this bill to Donald Trump’s desk so it can be signed as soon as JULY 4.** We are running out of time to show Congress that the majority of Americans are firmly opposed to this blatant attack on working families. We’re counting on your help to do it, Peter: **[Please make it crystal clear where you stand on Donald Trump’s big disastrous bill by signing on to our emergency letter to Congress before midnight »](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250702?t=4&akid=9082%2E614464%2EWSAyNv)** **[STAND AGAINST DONALD TRUMP’S BILL: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250702?t=5&akid=9082%2E614464%2EWSAyNv)**
---

name: Kim, Young
subject: They want to rip our values to shreds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Young Kim here, and I'm writing to sound the alarm, Peter.The far Left has launched vicious campaigns against me, flooding my district with complete lies and vile distortions. They will stop at NOTHING to undermine my conservative values, destroy my reputation, and flip the seat I've worked so tirelessly for. But you better believe I'm not going down without a fight.I'm fighting back with every bone in my body, Peter, but I need YOU to fight with me: UNITED.This isn't just about me. It's about the very fabric of our great nation, the values, goals, and aspirations we both share, which the Left wants to rip to shreds. But I WON'T LET THEM.[I need your support, energy, and commitment as one of my top patriots. Whether it’s $10, $15, or $25, whatever you can give before my midnight deadline: EVERY DOLLAR MATTERS.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/WkNVUUs0arG7J5N5-85qf7p3VuJvpXnAzNk7YjoQqL43jik4phB01aWjQKMWvitZZdRW0syGkPmIz13kr9gcpEELGgPeWD-in-P8razGGS5rWqnDpUtq8hYf22LJ7Nt5qzs89rJcHtSIuMzfNb6iy9yrXFGoz7WSuETha0Jg_OedexiBCGQED31t2mZmg4CNlKic7L-sVMn9mg7iTOtPfLhrCQMdrPy_UZY8k8tCjlRdS5ioIY0y9aA38CZyzQSdzPeAYhiD9ukt4QVHQs_rKNHgwG6CA1NVC0WodEmcVQkgwg-U_BcfKMdHj7YWvF3JRimrxvCcx108JswORbj6EZ7sJJnXvHC5wZopL24JsJKaKF_-ClRo7SaWr5nl3rmi1cBW5_c7gLbi7978f5UDFN09gi2fuxvdFSABxlD7J_dpI7-9vsNaFGt963uMcVSFZR1arRAqYYoMqn1g5ulIMp-6u2ouL5hIGqCVTEIYJGik6MI0-7uU3pTRqd-4MAi373ADwpn7fGzSS8suJ_pjjxTh8k6-cbrMTxU9drJ6x2shky84jBIDbzqoaN_YO1PdVaAihqV4PhFLWRIRRdmitK33_wCP08wLtcpZynVH59n8sHjKmanCqlcmT_0QY0DyqdXdmpj3IAY6DEQy0ID6X66KdL68aLJXHdB7DtI_rC4ua-r68fj6smD2CKRxRikBVtUfH-05ay8_0LjKH86kW_n9_2Kz_gHNutzAGe0rNPypbY9YAXeOiZ2V5wIElO-Sagsjq9BcCLVZnW1-RhWY-kjzJTUEe6qi3Islkk8NeHOQQjdS8RMvQqlF0WAgWVGcpgRGrqHKerZnUayPEVDmbifv4mFjX_j7qD6SR7fPoIlUdPuBYirDZzSX7JtASHQ/Xkv45yyXaw4WPDLcGVfrMOBhy_8kK9d1/10)Let's come TOGETHER and show them we will not be silenced, intimidated, or DEFEATED. They will stop at NOTHING to undermine my conservative values, destroy my reputation, and flip the seat I've worked so tirelessly for. But you better believe I'm not going down without a fight.I'm fighting back with every bone in my body, Peter, but I need YOU to fight with me: UNITED.This isn't just about me. It's about the very fabric of our great nation, the values, goals, and aspirations we both share, which the Left wants to rip to shreds. But I WON'T LET THEM. come TOGETHER and show them we will not be silenced, intimidated, or DEFEATED. We will rise up and fight back. As a top supporter, I know I can count on YOU. so much, Young Kim Congresswoman (CA-40)| | | | | Paid for by Young Kim for Congress P.O. The Black Death wiped out 40% of the population of Europe, but it also
led to significantly higher wages within a generation. Could Trump's
megabill have the same effect here in America?` `
### **Cliff 's Note: **When Criminals Collude: Trump, Bibi & Bombs
Friends, Donald Trump isn't interested in foreign policy, unless you mean his foreign policy of scouting Eastern European singles on questionable websites. He's interested in foreign payoffs, though. Oh boy, does he love those.
Whether a cool new Qatari jet _totally not for him but the presidency, even though he said he 's keeping it after he leaves office which means the opposite of "not for him_." Or an undisclosed Chinese bank account. Or Saudis renting out the top floors of his former bed-bug filled DC hotel, and curiously leaving the rooms empty. Whatever could they have been up to?
Then there's Benjamin Netanyahu. Now here's some foreign policy in which Trump's taken a keen interest. Bibi, you see, is willing to do whatever it takes to stay in office, because he has this small, little, nuisance-y issue similar one that's bedeviled Trump. No, not sociopathy, lying, incompetence or racism--though, yeah, he's all that too.
No, the part where he's indicted for criminal-like behavior. And not just general criminal stuff, but some of Trump's favorite things! (This is crying out to be an Oprah segment). _Bribery, fraud, breach of trust_ , Trump's a freakin pioneer in these areas!
It's almost like Netanyahu read "Art of the Deal!"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eb93b9bd-4c58-4ff9-a297-83dfdb9f760c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So, Bibi and Trump are like blood brothers (well, not really blood, because Bibi's Jewish and, ya know, Trump has some rules about these kinds of things). Or maybe we should call them bosom bodies?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc2c3e7f-ed72-42a8-b3c2-47d6a9dcd334?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The point is, they're buds who are in very similar situations. So, let's go through the deal you're _not_ hearing about on cable news, because corporate media...how do I say it..oh right, _sucks_.
After Bibi bombed Iran in what many believe was an **unprovoked escalation** , and unproven claims of enriched uranium, Trump backed off his very public and constant campaign pledge not to get us into any more wars.
He decided, instead, to treat Iran like Mike Pence on January 6th. Except, Iran couldn't refuse to get into the car. Tbc, the Iranian leaders deserve zero sympathy, they're vicious, thug-like theocrats that make _The Handmaid 's Tale_ look like _Dazed And Confused._ We're talking practicality--or lack thereof--of war here.
An additional point, the majority of Americans hate Trump, just like the majority of Israelis hate Netanyahu. They're both corrupt failures, who left their own people vulnerable to horrific disease (COVID) and horrific attacks (October 7th). Both are using anti-majoritarian measures to stay in power and continue to harm their people.
Ok, back to our regularly scheduled program. After bombing Iran, against the wishes of his (alleged) sponsor, Russia, and many high profile members of his base, Trump very publicly _demanded_ that Israel **end its criminal prosecution of Netanyahu**. _**Why?**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7859227-2838-48cd-b5bc-f8e87afeaa9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump won't say, but he decided for reasons unbeknownst to anyone that it's just bonzo important to get involved in the domestic politics of another country. For completely selfless reasons, of course, as is Trump's way. Always giving, that one.
Which is why he threatened to pull aid from Israel if they continue to prosecute the indicted Netanyahu. Here are Trump's lucid thoughts, per usual:
> He is a war hero, a prime minister who did a fabulous job with the United States to bring great success in getting rid of the dangerous nuclear threat in Iran..How is it possible the prime minister of Israel can be forced to sit in a courtroom all day, over nothing..The United States spends billions of dollars a year, far more than on any other nation, protecting and supporting Israel. We are not going to stand for this
Ok, seriously: **Trump never does anything without personally benefitting. Never. He wouldn 't help Barron if he were indicted unless Melania paid him**. So what is Bibi doing for Trump?? How is Bibi bribing/protecting Trump's power, _because that 's the only way Trump opens his mouth on something like this._
Again, Bibi is on trial for corruption, bribery, and breach of trust. **And he tried to dismantle Israel 's courts to stay out of jail**. Very Orban-esque, you might say. So Trump isn't calling off Israeli prosecutors out of the kindness of his spray-tanned, three-quarter-pounders-with-a-large-fries-soaked heart. He wants two things:
1. **A photo op at the White House to show his strength --Bibi coming to his place.**
Netanyahu is reportedly _begging_ for a White House meeting. And it makes Trump look presidential to do it, and have Bibi say how great he is, with his numbers not the toilet, so much as an overflowing port-a-potty that hasn't been cleaned since early May.
2. **Public support --and likely campaign cash--from pro-Netanyahu, pro-occupation billionaires.**
You know the ones: Not most Jews. But a few Far-Right lunatics with way-too-much money who bankroll the Far-Right in both countries (One of them may rhyme with Raid-Uhl-Sun).

**So let 's follow the smoke trail:**
* Trump changes his tune on bombing Iran (despite once claiming he was the one who could "bring peace").
* Netanyahu drops hints that Trump's reelection would "save Israel."
* Trump intervenes in a **foreign criminal prosecution** on behalf of a dictator-adjacent pr*ck.
* Bibi gets a chance to bury his corruption trial.
* Trump gets a propaganda win, donor cash, and another foot inside the authoritarian alliance.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ce881b9-c234-4c51-8031-f684fda90c1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**The love that dare not speak its name**_
This isn't diplomacy--it's a **mob deal**. A **" You scratch my back, I'll crush your prosecution"** kinda thing. Where the hell are Lucky Luciano and Meyer Lansky when you need 'em? And also, by the way, it's dangerous as hell.
This kinda grift is pretty obvious to anyone with eyes--which is to say, the entire world--_which is why Zelensky won 't tell Trump anything,_ NATO hates/distrusts Trump and dictators cozy up to him like he's a used torture chamber where the blood's still warm.
Trump's ludicrously corrupt behavior damages US credibility, intelligence-gathering and our overall defense. That's not just corrupt--it's **treason-adjacent**. **Or, call me old fashioned, but just GD f*king treason.**
**And it 's not happening in the shadows. It's all right out in public.**
The corporate press barely blinks, unless someone offers one of them a book deal, of course. Congress yawns, because Trump owns all Republicans and Mike Johnson has son-porn to monitor. And the American people? They need to know just how debased this SOB is, but who is going to tell them?
So let's get to brass tacks here ask the real questions we're all thinking: **How many bombs will Trump trade for a pardon? How many allies will he sell out to save his own skin --or for another jet plane? How many authoritarian strongmen will Trump empower just to keep himself out of prison?**
Bibi knows how this game works. He's an expert, as he's been playing it f _or a long time._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3288254b-2061-49e0-915f-670a17e708ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's make sure the rest of America knows that Trump is playing it too, if ham-handedly, before it's too late for us to recover our democracy.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/565f682b-278c-4a7e-abed-d9107bf478a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110758529/555264945/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UzOWZkYjMtYTg1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z8fjCL5T-BHzSletsd8pkNBncmATnsE_7aQiws_z2yU=) | Hey Peter, I wanted to share some good news (on an otherwise terrible news week): Trump just pulled his attack ads against me off the air. This is a huge relief — at least for now. The past few weeks have been very stressful, fighting against the Megabill in D.C. and fighting against the Trump attacks at home. I’m truly grateful to this team for standing with me. I’m also happy to share we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and consequently, were able to launch digital ads to respond to Trump’s lies. You stepped up, and it made all the difference. Trump and his cronies will be back on the attack soon, but for now, I just want to say thank you. In gratitude, Josh
---

clean_body: | = | Hey Peter, I wanted to share some good news (on an otherwise terrible news week): Trump just pulled his attack ads against me off the air. This is a huge relief — at least for now. The past few weeks have been very stressful, fighting against the Megabill in D.C. and fighting against the Trump attacks at home. I’m truly grateful to this team for standing with me. I’m also happy to share we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and consequently, were able to launch digital ads to respond to Trump’s lies. You stepped up, and it made all the difference. Trump and his cronies will be back on the attack soon, but for now, I just want to say thank you. In gratitude, Josh *

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, [“Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,”](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=231de04a9fab4b71bfea737db3729de3&_e=s8uO1wWAF8nwdWFDlJ-lo-iSsqJd2KT7WzN9tSrgUUyKFKNlVi_B8J1y82zjZK9puBH1pArm_2cXikE-ay_uNJy8WvzSABX8-RLm4YyA8k6gOQJ_xxiRnOMYX-28K-8YdAxMgnZgc_d4-rQ7AyR45aP4vthWaWmHGiuq2a43sMhxVndPHG_yb1XVFlxJSr5n0d_hdXTwvBbl2QMsm6mN9OSwneNxWCVlnAPVO_qCEqmYXC1GrzSHyXiJ_YRkY9aHDCyIFpwB_WduIlNwqzbBEdOf6pIU1wlNTYJ51JIyHd-4E-7rWa6b_5bW0DhQpE0ow1nEvKCKBmuDtGiU1i9L9RZueLbHuzmKDs2DrNUAiZ8DXIRuKOOa8rb0oR9limaEMEPyewxhZ6hmo4smKefD8xEiX_rjxVHKV6a-ZOGLO461oA0dkzlmcRU5oVeIYWLu4z9VzVATU54y9SPwDPLWEYD4kRhdp8Orx2rgZywVXnLQqWMgdWowG74c1Py3zN8Eek4uD3-weKPyDE5qVCbXulWe4VwrlqL14nKUna4NsOxrNf1dSF1qiYXSLwp95KjqV-R4isYyehtOTyAoWzpJeU-pwEvP30BpmnqPXeRNs5fGXWsLNh1x2Qa-gJQ2Ktb9S1iXhkmYCIiK-FWxfgphpcjXXZsZhJKcbO7SVj6yJMbYCvBB2XWs7Xqsxq8hquWKcsOfT06WAAuU7Rvmkk_Z2XnpgcxmLFyl8ZrK3gMIjhqTyQ4dFe3vepMPGPPHpTxFIHCUwf8CuCz-dnS91o7R7GMocOtZcKYDS5ROQHpKRnU%3D) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

| **Dear team, you may have already heard the bad news:** Yesterday, Vice President JD Vance cast the tie-breaking vote for Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill. This bill is _NOT_ “big and beautiful” like Donald Trump and his cronies call it. 👎It is a bill that kicks millions off their healthcare by gutting over $800 billion from Medicaid, Medicare, and the Affordable Care Act. 👎It’s a bill that takes away funding for rural hospitals. 👎It’s a bill that slashes food aid for over 5.5 million Californians. It’s a bill that makes life worse for so many everyday Americans while slashing taxes for oligarchs like Elon Musk. **And the billionaire tax cuts are SO large that the cuts don’t pay for them all, which means billions of dollars added to our national debt.** While this bill is now going back to the House of Representatives, we are deeply appreciative of our California Strong Senators who fought tooth and nail against this travesty in the United States Senate. Senator **Adam Schiff** spoke emotively about the impacts of this legislation on the Senate floor, saying: _“I think about the sacrifices of generations that went before, so that my generation could enjoy a better quality of life than my parents or their parents. This bill takes money from our kids and grandkids to pay for tax cuts for really wealthy people. I want nothing to do with that.”_ Senator **Alex Padilla** also spoke out against the legislation. _Senate Republicans just voted to let President Trump and his billionaire allies rob working families blind in order to cut their own taxes by trillions of dollars._ _But the fight isn't over yet._ _While Republicans work to strip healthcare from millions and nutrition assistance from children, Democrats are united in doing everything we can to kill this bill as it moves through the House._ And Senator Padilla is right. _We can still beat this bill._ That’s why we are working to turn the pressure up on swing district U.S. House Republicans here in California. They have a choice: serving their constituents, or the will of Donald Trump. **[Will you help power our organizing campaigns by making a donation of $35 or more right now? clean_body: California Strong | = | Dear team, you may have already heard the bad news: Yesterday, Vice President JD Vance cast the tie-breaking vote for Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill. This bill is NOT “big and beautiful” like Donald Trump and his cronies call it. 👎It is a bill that kicks millions off their healthcare by gutting over $800 billion from Medicaid, Medicare, and the Affordable Care Act. 👎It’s a bill that takes away funding for rural hospitals. 👎It’s a bill that slashes food aid for over 5.5 million Californians. It’s a bill that makes life worse for so many everyday Americans while slashing taxes for oligarchs like Elon Musk. And the billionaire tax cuts are SO large that the cuts don’t pay for them all, which means billions of dollars added to our national debt. While this bill is now going back to the House of Representatives, we are deeply appreciative of our California Strong Senators who fought tooth and nail against this travesty in the United States Senate. Senator Adam Schiff spoke emotively about the impacts of this legislation on the Senate floor, saying: “I think about the sacrifices of generations that went before, so that my generation could enjoy a better quality of life than my parents or their parents. This bill takes money from our kids and grandkids to pay for tax cuts for really wealthy people. I want nothing to do with that.” Senator Alex Padilla also spoke out against the legislation. Senate Republicans just voted to let President Trump and his billionaire allies rob working families blind in order to cut their own taxes by trillions of dollars. But the fight isn't over yet. While Republicans work to strip healthcare from millions and nutrition assistance from children, Democrats are united in doing everything we can to kill this bill as it moves through the House. And Senator Padilla is right. We can still beat this bill. That’s why we are working to turn the pressure up on swing district U.S. House Republicans here in California. They have a choice: serving their constituents, or the will of Donald Trump. = = Thank you so much, \- The entire team at the California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. # Mansharamani Musings
---
| This month, I provide links to my latest posts and then share a link to an excerpt from [_**The Making of a Generalist**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d7ba4711f2&e=93b2c2b824) that I posted on Father’s Day. I hope you enjoy... And as always, I welcome your feedback!
[ _B_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=61b95ea92f&e=93b2c2b824) _est,**
Vikram**_

---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1db0dddd71&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 1, 2025
On the campaign trail, President Trump made a promise to revive the American economy and deliver greater opportunity for working families: to create “a middle class that is once again the envy of the entire world.” Making that pledge a reality starts with tax cuts and deregulation but doesn’t end there. It will require policymakers to reconsider who has access to wealth-building opportunities.
Unfortunately, far too many Americans lack the tools available to the wealthy. More Americans deserve the opportunity to invest in private markets, and that’s something Trump’s administration can provide. The Securities and Exchange Commission has a unique opportunity to...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=727fc4163c&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=96362dffc0&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 4, 2025
It was a surreal moment...while Harvard’s graduation [ceremony](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0a495618a2&e=93b2c2b824) was underway last week, the Trump Administration’s effort to ban the school from enrolling international students was making its way through the courts. Alan Garber, the University’s President, took aim at this policy during his opening address when he welcomed graduating students from “[around the world, **just as it should be**](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=73f7ce9422&e=93b2c2b824)**.** ”
The assembled crowd cheered at the reference, and [speaker](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8025859150&e=93b2c2b824) after [speaker](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1efab5af19&e=93b2c2b824) reiterated the sentiment that Harvard should be free to educate the world. And when news [broke](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d6730b7148&e=93b2c2b824) that a judge had issued a preliminary injunction against the Trump attempt to ban foreign students, the _New York Times_ [reported](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=282a423969&e=93b2c2b824) that celebratory reactions rippled through the crowd...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=343e9ccd21&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=380508d648&e=93b2c2b824)
|
---
| JUNE 14, 2025
For many business leaders, the cross currents of a global trade war, military conflict in the Middle East, shifting geopolitical pressures, and disruption from new technologies have created a paralyzing level of uncertainty. Does it make sense to invest when artificial intelligence may replace your entire industry? What if tariffs create chaos in your supply chain? **For many, the obvious course of action is, well, no action at all.**
As a generalist with a contrarian bent, I’ve decided instead to look at the big picture, connect the dots across different trends, and come up with a probabilistic assessment of how the future may unfold for the pizza industry. It’s led me to a different course: I’m proactively investing amidst today’s uncertainty as I see a bright future ahead...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=99cf0d5d53&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ec5d6a7603&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 21, 2025
Recently, I’ve been intensely focused on all things pizza – a natural consequence of [my having recently started a frozen pizza manufacturing business](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c9382d1ebe&e=93b2c2b824). Pizza news, the pizza market, anything affecting the pizza ingredient supply chain...all grab my attention. And I always detour to the frozen section of any grocery store to see the offerings, placement, and pricing of the pizza products they offer. But I also continue to monitor the context in which the pizza industry operates and regularly watch Sunday morning news shows, skim about 5 newspapers each day, and religiously listen to [Bloomberg News](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=02561a2042&e=93b2c2b824).
Given my long-standing interest in foreign affairs, geopolitics, and economics, it should be no surprise that a recent headline about the “Pentagon Pizza Index” caught my attention. The index, which tracks pizza orders heading to the headquarters of the US Department of Defense from local pizza shops, tends to surge immediately before geopolitical or military events transpire. Why’s that? When the world is on the cusp of major events, those working at the Pentagon usually work late and order pizza...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a824b80fca&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1f8ce42098&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 29, 2025
Last week I [wrote](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=039e54f5a4&e=93b2c2b824) about the Pentagon Pizza Index, which for decades has seemingly predicted world events. The idea is to monitor DC-area pizza shops for spikes in business, the thinking being that a crisis would require late nights for those working in national security, and they would need to order something to eat.
The practice apparently originated with Soviet spies in the 1980’s, who used to track pizza delivery cars, and journalists at the time also noted increases before the invasions of Grenada and Panama, respectively. After pizza deliveries to the Pentagon and Langley spiked the night before the U.S. invasion of Iraq in 1990, the concept broke out into the public imagination. At the time, CNN’s Wolf Blitzer remarked, “Always monitor the pizzas.”
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5ff5c589a5&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
# Special Father’s Day (re)Post
---
| **(FROM JUNE 2024)**
While celebrating Father’s Day with my own children, I couldn’t help but think about my own father. He’s an amazing individual who embodies the adventurous spirit and can-do attitude that drives America. He came here with little, worked hard to build financial stability, and eventually started a family. He’s never felt the need to hyphenate his identity and continues to believe America is that shining city on the hill that drew him (and millions like him) to this land of opportunity. One of his proudest days continues to be the day he took an oath to America and became an American citizen. He exudes wisdom that comes from a life filled with character-building experiences. He is an inspiration to me and has been a caring and dedicated father to me and my sister and devoted husband to my mother. In honor of Father’s Day, I am posting an excerpt from my recent book, _**The Making of a Generalist**_ , about his decision to come to the United States. I hope you enjoy reading it as much as I did writing it.
### _\- Vikram
_
_**THE PURSUIT OF BETTER**_
My father arrived in America in the mid-1960s as a student seeking an automotive technical education. Armed with an associate of applied science degree that he had earned in India in 1957, he enrolled in Roberts’ Technical and Trade Schools in Manhattan and began his journey toward acquiring a skill, some know-how, that might enable a better life. Unsurprisingly, there were struggles along the way. He ran out of tuition money. To secure room and board, he lived in a hotel and worked as the overnight front-desk clerk. He made money driving a cab. Throughout it all, he never wavered. He knew America was where he wanted to stay, where he intended to set down roots.
After his stint in Manhattan and now armed with his technical certification...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=b4ee8420bd&e=93b2c2b824)

|
# NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
---
| As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---
| [Subscribe to “Navigating Uncertainty” by Vikram Mansharamani](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=743d9d22ef&e=93b2c2b824)

|

# About Vikram
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=3c53160bcd&e=93b2c2b824)
| **VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, [ _**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a1714ac2fe&e=93b2c2b824) , [ _**Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5f2de971c8&e=93b2c2b824) and [ _**Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=49d3f03e00&e=93b2c2b824). Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

Pizza news, the pizza market, anything affecting the pizza ingredient supply chain...all grab my attention. And I always detour to the frozen section of any grocery store to see the offerings, placement, and pricing of the pizza products they offer. But I also continue to monitor the context in which the pizza industry operates and regularly watch Sunday morning news shows, skim about 5 newspapers each day, and religiously listen to . Given my long-standing interest in foreign affairs, geopolitics, and economics, it should be no surprise that a recent headline about the “Pentagon Pizza Index” caught my attention. The index, which tracks pizza orders heading to the headquarters of the US Department of Defense from local pizza shops, tends to surge immediately before geopolitical or military events transpire. Why’s that? When the world is on the cusp of major events, those working at the Pentagon usually work late and order pizza... | | | JUNE 29, 2025 Last week I about the Pentagon Pizza Index, which for decades has seemingly predicted world events. The idea is to monitor DC-area pizza shops for spikes in business, the thinking being that a crisis would require late nights for those working in national security, and they would need to order something to eat. The practice apparently originated with Soviet spies in the 1980’s, who used to track pizza delivery cars, and journalists at the time also noted increases before the invasions of Grenada and Panama, respectively. After pizza deliveries to the Pentagon and Langley spiked the night before the U.S. invasion of Iraq in 1990, the concept broke out into the public imagination. At the time, CNN’s Wolf Blitzer remarked, “Always monitor the pizzas.” | | | Special Father’s Day (re)Post | (FROM JUNE 2024) While celebrating Father’s Day with my own children, I couldn’t help but think about my own father. He’s an amazing individual who embodies the adventurous spirit and can-do attitude that drives America. He came here with little, worked hard to build financial stability, and eventually started a family. He’s never felt the need to hyphenate his identity and continues to believe America is that shining city on the hill that drew him (and millions like him) to this land of opportunity. One of his proudest days continues to be the day he took an oath to America and became an American citizen. He exudes wisdom that comes from a life filled with character-building experiences. He is an inspiration to me and has been a caring and dedicated father to me and my sister and devoted husband to my mother. In honor of Father’s Day, I am posting an excerpt from my recent book, The Making of a Generalist , about his decision to come to the United States. I hope you enjoy reading it as much as I did writing it. \- Vikram THE PURSUIT OF BETTER My father arrived in America in the mid-1960s as a student seeking an automotive technical education. Armed with an associate of applied science degree that he had earned in India in 1957, he enrolled in Roberts’ Technical and Trade Schools in Manhattan and began his journey toward acquiring a skill, some know-how, that might enable a better life. Unsurprisingly, there were struggles along the way. He ran out of tuition money. To secure room and board, he lived in a hotel and worked as the overnight front-desk clerk. He made money driving a cab. Throughout it all, he never wavered. He knew America was where he wanted to stay, where he intended to set down roots. After his stint in Manhattan and now armed with his technical certification... | | | NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (It’s Free!) | | | Want Vikram to speak at your event? | Have an upcoming board meeting, corporate offsite, conference or other event in which you might want to have Vikram share his view about the global economy, geopolitical dynamics, technological developments, or social pressures? Click below to inquire about his availability! | mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com?subject=SPEAKING%20INQUIRY&body= | About Vikram | VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. | | | | | mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Vikram for New Hampshire. name: Sen. Jim Risch (R-ID)
subject: America First. Always.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

Made in USA Day is more than a celebration, it's a call to action.

It's a reminder of what makes this country great: **[Hard work. Freedom. Pride in what we build.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zipYPKbPGqggzOWWovDsaQ~~/AAVLBhA~/iNlzRpiFL1gQotYqjbJrxO2grnW5Z75p8dFQRNsTZtWtSz8PUTHlcEZs-z_mxDLyPCgliqivqc7tstUMKv-juwxd8rKejYG6-0qum40Q8pOAlyw0Cp5oqNFTdxd1zzfw4WWzfT2EklRZTrp7oVaIeldEa10Dgp1I9g1PeKds-Wah65F2flXuRT4lJva0S0PpnDVh5HYaApPlTiRmHQTpajgXOxSLPhaxUqrJ03zhh-3RF_xbMcFz1qLNwdD5XnelwPSA2rHGDDarUBRgqy3973Zz1bpBontk147BNAZCfqsfhVuhDcdRRUomM8XLSKfeSLK161Ug650PvQ2C3BzH7AIftRLwfL9j1_bJJxCrLymPwaxl020pTeS_hBwkCK88ZIux1jgD9WJ3KrN6JISeyA~~)**

I believe in an America where we make things here at home - where small businesses thrive, farms feed the nation, and our workers know their future is secure.

We need policies that put **[our people first,](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zipYPKbPGqggzOWWovDsaQ~~/AAVLBhA~/iNlzRpiFL1gQotYqjbJrxO2grnW5Z75p8dFQRNsTZtWtSz8PUTHlcEZs-z_mxDLyPCgliqivqc7tstUMKv-juwxd8rKejYG6-0qum40Q8pOAlyw0Cp5oqNFTdxd1zzfw4WWzfT2EklRZTrp7oVaIeldEa10Dgp1I9g1PeKds-Wah65F2flXuRT4lJva0S0PpnDVh5HYaApPlTiRmHQTpajgXOxSLPhaxUqrJ03zhh-3RF_xbMcFz1qLNwdD5XnelwPSA2rHGDDarUBRgqy3973Zz1bpBontk147BNAZCfqsfhVuhDcdRRUomM8XLSKfeSLK161Ug650PvQ2C3BzH7AIftRLwfL9j1_bJJxCrLymPwaxl020pTeS_hBwkCK88ZIux1jgD9WJ3KrN6JISeyA~~)** not red tape and big government regulations that punish job creators and reward waste.

As your Senator, I'll never back down from the fight to:
* Lower taxes on working families and small businesses
* Strengthen American supply chains
* Invest in rural communities and hometown economies
* Protect the values that built this country

But I can't do it alone.

**[This campaign is about more than politics-- it's about restoring American strength.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zipYPKbPGqggzOWWovDsaQ~~/AAVLBhA~/iNlzRpiFL1gQotYqjbJrxO2grnW5Z75p8dFQRNsTZtWtSz8PUTHlcEZs-z_mxDLyPCgliqivqc7tstUMKv-juwxd8rKejYG6-0qum40Q8pOAlyw0Cp5oqNFTdxd1zzfw4WWzfT2EklRZTrp7oVaIeldEa10Dgp1I9g1PeKds-Wah65F2flXuRT4lJva0S0PpnDVh5HYaApPlTiRmHQTpajgXOxSLPhaxUqrJ03zhh-3RF_xbMcFz1qLNwdD5XnelwPSA2rHGDDarUBRgqy3973Zz1bpBontk147BNAZCfqsfhVuhDcdRRUomM8XLSKfeSLK161Ug650PvQ2C3BzH7AIftRLwfL9j1_bJJxCrLymPwaxl020pTeS_hBwkCK88ZIux1jgD9WJ3KrN6JISeyA~~)**

If you're with me, chip in any amount today to help keep the Senate conservative and America first.

[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zipYPKbPGqggzOWWovDsaQ~~/AAVLBhA~/iNlzRpiFL1gQotYqjbJrxO2grnW5Z75p8dFQRNsTZtWtSz8PUTHlcEZs-z_mxDLyPCgliqivqc7tstUMKv-juwxd8rKejYG6-0qum40Q8pOAlyw0Cp5oqNFTdxd1zzfw4WWzfT2EklRZTrp7oVaIeldEa10Dgp1I9g1PeKds-Wah65F2flXuRT4lJva0S0PpnDVh5HYaApPlTiRmHQTpajgXOxSLPhaxUqrJ03zhh-3RF_xbMcFz1qLNwdD5XnelwPSA2rHGDDarUBRgqy3973Zz1bpBontk147BNAZCfqsfhVuhDcdRRUomM8XLSKfeSLK161Ug650PvQ2C3BzH7AIftRLwfL9j1_bJJxCrLymPwaxl020pTeS_hBwkCK88ZIux1jgD9WJ3KrN6JISeyA~~)

Let's make sure the next generation still believes in "Made in the USA."

For freedom,
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zipYPKbPGqggzOWWovDsaQ~~/AAVLBhA~/iNlzRpiFL1gQotYqjbJrxO2grnW5Z75p8dFQRNsTZtWtSz8PUTHlcEZs-z_mxDLyPCgliqivqc7tstUMKv-juwxd8rKejYG6-0qum40Q8pOAlyw0Cp5oqNFTdxd1zzfw4WWzfT2EklRZTrp7oVaIeldEa10Dgp1I9g1PeKds-Wah65F2flXuRT4lJva0S0PpnDVh5HYaApPlTiRmHQTpajgXOxSLPhaxUqrJ03zhh-3RF_xbMcFz1qLNwdD5XnelwPSA2rHGDDarUBRgqy3973Zz1bpBontk147BNAZCfqsfhVuhDcdRRUomM8XLSKfeSLK161Ug650PvQ2C3BzH7AIftRLwfL9j1_bJJxCrLymPwaxl020pTeS_hBwkCK88ZIux1jgD9WJ3KrN6JISeyA~~)
Senator Jim Risch

[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zipYPKbPGqggzOWWovDsaQ~~/AAVLBhA~/iNlzRpiFL1gQotYqjbJrxO2grnW5Z75p8dFQRNsTZtWtSz8PUTHlcEZs-z_mxDLyPCgliqivqc7tstUMKv-juwxd8rKejYG6-0qum40Q8pOAlyw0Cp5oqNFTdxd1zzfw4WWzfT2EklRZTrp7oVaIeldEa10Dgp1I9g1PeKds-Wah65F2flXuRT4lJva0S0PpnDVh5HYaApPlTiRmHQTpajgXOxSLPhaxUqrJ03zhh-3RF_xbMcFz1qLNwdD5XnelwPSA2rHGDDarUBRgqy3973Zz1bpBontk147BNAZCfqsfhVuhDcdRRUomM8XLSKfeSLK161Ug650PvQ2C3BzH7AIftRLwfL9j1_bJJxCrLymPwaxl020pTeS_hBwkCK88ZIux1jgD9WJ3KrN6JISeyA~~)

name: Elect Common Sense
subject: Fairness is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
But the fight is FAR from over.

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcjb9jq1o4tfh9e7pkf00h9s8fjtmeno542rc2a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

President Trump has taken decisive action to protect female athletes, resulting in the **University of Pennsylvania 's recent decision to ban men from women's sports and strip the records of Lia Thomas.**

_[But the fight is FAR from over.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ze6ogfthjubnv06n73p6i6rhdsg8750pbstkc268_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs "But the fight is FAR from over.")_

Other schools and states like California are still pushing back, **[allowing biological males to compete against women despite President Trump's executive order.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2ffrqe237j3fbtjk6dokk21kigdjijvp34ru460_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs "allowing biological males to compete against women despite President Trump’s executive order.")**

This is an outrage, Friend.

That's why we launched the **[Title IX Defense Coalition](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zo5nhlhn5s13t6miednoqert7lrj24qihrina6p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs "Title IX Defense Coalition")** , a new movement of Americans who believe women's sports are worth defending.
[JOIN THE COALITION](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0514lglb25u7qlfj429h86p5s6aqv82i3bsfhg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)
---

We need YOU to join to:
* Support President Trump's unwavering commitment to fairness
* Fight back against the radical Left's agenda
* Ensure a level playing field for female athletes

_**[Will you step up right now and become a Founding Member of the Title IX Defense Coalition?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2znp7rkjfm4rh31qmj1s16jjn2filquu4p260tmk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)**_
. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvfh8j0hg154p1d0ndss47hhfripj2r4u12gg72g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs) [JOIN THE COALITION](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zapl1r2ss6vpskvqc5krsm0tmp0b2e0bhhkl2p18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)
---

This is personal, Friend. Generations of young women are counting on us to protect the sports they love and the opportunities they've earned.

**[Fairness. Integrity. Biology. These aren't political talking points -- they're common sense.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmjiti5cdn7jv4vuijceebv67fgt680tsf6ohk28_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs "Fairness. Integrity. Biology. These aren’t political talking points — they’re common sense.")**

_[Let's make sure common sense wins.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmph7i20trf6kb7t3psmcbifbi2o7qg2buoa0v78_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs "Let’s make sure common sense wins.")_

_**[Stand for truth and the safety and future of our daughters by joining the Title IX Defense Coalition now.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zo66ptmk20fq8ufimo0qnecfasmes6i2ttqpnqho_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)**_

Thank you,

Title IX Defense Coalition

This is personal, Friend. Generations of young women are counting on us to protect the sports they love and the opportunities they've earned. "Fairness. Integrity. Biology. These aren’t political talking points — they’re common sense." "Let’s make sure common sense wins." ** Thank you, Title IX Defense Coalition Paid for by Elect Common Sense. 11 Convent Road #25, Convent Station, NJ 07961 Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: You unlocked a two million percent match
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Sorry to say it, but that's impossible, Friend. But there's some truth to it - just this once.

"You unlocked a TWO MILLION PERCENT MATCH!"
"You've unlocked a HUGE 6 MILLION TIMES Match!"
"$1 = $1,000 FOR THE NEXT 5 MINUTES!"
SURE. And I have some oceanfront property to sell you in Wisconsin.
Friend, this is Derrick Van Orden.

Look, I hate to say it, but these messages aren't real, and it makes me spitting mad that some folks think it's alright to sell you a false bill of goods when raising cash for their cause.
You're never going to see any of that from me.
I grew up dirt poor, so I know the value of a hard-earned dollar & I know that, when you give to the causes you care about, it means something. And it sure as heck means a whole lot to me.
[If you're like me, you want to make sure your contributions to the America First movement make a difference - and I have a plan I want to share with you that will ACTUALLY make your donation go 13X farther than it would anywhere else.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6jbnhr82f42i20al98jjld71qp49jl2pkgk752o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)
Friend, I'm a retired Navy SEAL who served for 26 years and did 5 combat deployments.
I'm a true MAGA conservative who won one of the TOUGHEST races of 2024.
I always speak my mind, and my opinion and my vote are not for sale.
I've got nothing to sell you. I just love this country and want to share with you the very best plan to MAGA in 2025 and 2026.
[To say I need every good conservative in my corner to fix our country is a huge understatement - but I'm not just asking for you to support me.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zprs6a68852l5fmito950fvjai8u6iuh7ktrhpto_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)
I'm partnering with the House GOP's campaign team - the guys and gals that delivered the House Majority to complete the GOP trifecta in 2024.
Listen - there's no such thing as a "two million percent match," but I've helped create a plan of attack for the 2026 midterms that'll make your donation go 13X as far as it would anywhere else.
You see, in 2024, there were 13 DEMOCRAT politicians who won, despite their district voting REPUBLICAN in the Presidential Race.
And House GOP is launching a genius plan to knock every single one of them out of their seats next year.
[This is YOUR opportunity to knock out 13 dirty, wacked out, RADICAL Democrats who exist only to kill the America First Agenda.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7jcimrjiqq284at7rlbrlungnokk1ad3ljdtbc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)
Words can't express how grateful I am for your consideration and support.
God bless you,
Derrick Van Orden & House GOP | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv6b0luq2kdlccjd6vf9u2r3io0ocnd92jh9e6t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9k4423ga9b6pr5dcuel38vgb6n50mcsue1cjndo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9jfckcoltu2fdgmbn0o1orla002rq2gcq6f1u9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8r7p8hnmdeh2v7d8cingv02pu8akb6obuju3uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z01h80ngre203d6q8ues2mm7ge915cl2h5occ78o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clj66o71cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
Peter, blue states are DESPERATE to hang onto power.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Trump Poised to Remove Noncitizens from Census 🚨**BREAKING NEWS:** President Trump is again leading the charge to protect the integrity of our democracy – **this time by ensuring that only U.S. citizens are counted in the official U.S. Census.**
Peter, for far too long, blue states have inflated their political power by counting illegal immigrants in their census totals, gaining extra congressional seats and electoral votes as a result.
_That ends now._
This bold move strikes at the heart of the Democrats’ scheme to manipulate our system and tip the scales in their favor.
This is about restoring fairness, upholding the rule of law, and ensuring that American citizens, **not illegal aliens** , determine our political future.
But make no mistake: the Left is desperate to block this effort, because without inflated census numbers, they’ll lose their power. That’s why we need every Patriot to step up now. **
** **[Sign our Official Petition to Remove Illegal Aliens from the U.S. Census:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._3mb04mfUVa7uRZeAEz7OQ)** [ SIGN THE PETITION
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Don’t let them rig the system any longer. Demand a fair, lawful count now.**_Stand with President Trump and defend the integrity of our elections and the U.S. Census._**

And as a part of our 249th Independence Day Celebration, we're offering the next 300 patriots who renew their House GOP Membership a REDUCED renewal fee! Please don't miss this opportunity! name: Bill of Rights Institute
subject: Celebrate the American Revolution
body:
On April 19, 1775, the world changed forever.

| |
---
Friend,On April 19, 1775, the world changed forever.British troops marched on Lexington and Concord to arrest patriot leaders and seize their arms.But the American colonies fought back, Paul Revere took his now-famous ride, and _the Revolutionary War began._ We know we can't take you back to the moment, but you can get as close as possible with our new mini-documentary capturing the explosive beginning of the American Revolution.[**If you make a donation of ANY amount to the Bill of Rights Institute today, we’ll send you a mini-doc on the American Revolution as a special thank you.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmducu20g2rqjqnojn8jemsg50mkqpleegggcgmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clgm0ob2chh2bs)| [**Unlock Our New Mini-Doc Today**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf13b999mnfqb6vjc3ln7ttbor1puq3cd3elktto_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clgm0ob2chh2bs)
---
****
**Our mini-documentary will take yourself right back to the start of one of the most influential moments in our nation’s history.**
With our mini-documentary, you can immerse yourself in the world of the American Revolution.
Whether you're a teacher wanting to share the history with your class or just a history buff with a spirit of the 1700s, we want you to join us.
[**Pitch in now to watch our Lexington & Concord mini-documentary today and unlock the world of the American Revolution!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqt264fm5tf9u7ptb4nfta21qagl43p7tslnc4f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clgm0ob2chh2bs)
At the Bill of Rights Institute, we're determined to spread civic education one American at a time.
We're putting civics back at the top of the docket and creating an engaged population dedicated to defining American principles like freedom of expression and individual liberty.
With your help, we can save America from our civics crisis.
[**Watch our new mini-documentary now with your contribution. Your support helps us bring civic and history education to Americans from coast to coast. So please make a donation of $500, $250, $100, or even just $50 right now!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0b3ufjnbg8m5v2tcg731tcosus3r3vd91d8lca0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4clgm0ob2chh2bs)
Thank you,
Bill of Rights Institute Team

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: 'As a woman': Duke Law quietly pushes insane diversity statements for law journal applicants
body:
Duke Law at Duke University distributed an information packet that puts bizarre diversity sentiments front and center for possible applicants.More than two years after the Supreme Court struck down affirmative action in college admissions, some major schools are still in the weeds regarding preferential treatment of candidates based on skin color or ethnicity.This week, Duke Law's very own publication meant to produce "scholarship by premier legal thinkers" was exposed for heavily encouraging students to include diversity statements in their applications to work for the journal. | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We need to KEEP DEI OUT of our nation’s military!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This fight is far from over – we must remain vigilant.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9LZWVwLURFSS1PdXQtT2YtTWlsaXRhcnlfMjAyNTA2MTkmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1LZWVwLURFSS1PdXQtT2YtTWlsaXRhcnkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/XkHbf9mLM12iQ7sVRuBeOw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The Biden-Harris administration, the most radical in American history, inflicted immense damage to our country over just four years - from economic pain to open borders chaos to the worst U.S. foreign policy failure ever witnessed.

_And where do I start with their woke DEI agenda?_

Let's call Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion what it really is: **Hateful discriminatory GARBAGE.**

I've led the charge to expose how this poisonous ideology imposed far and wide by the Biden-Harris administration has corrupted our federal government, from billions diverted from scientific research to a weakened State Department and on and on.

I know you agree on this point too: We need to **KEEP DEI OUT** of our nation's military!

Thanks to President Trump's bold and decisive leadership, DEI is dead for now across our federal government and our military. But you know the Democrats would LOVE to bring it back if they get the chance.
**It 's vital that we pass legislation in Congress to eradicate DEI for good.** [**RUSH CRITICAL SUPPORT TO FUEL OUR FIGHT >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9LZWVwLURFSS1PdXQtT2YtTWlsaXRhcnlfMjAyNTA2MTkmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1LZWVwLURFSS1PdXQtT2YtTWlsaXRhcnkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/mocSbsbVavMgzMQYXI37cg) Our military had always been a meritocracy prior to the Biden-Harris administration - and it's vital that we restore our fighting force now and refocus its mission. The politicization of our military by the radical left has resulted in recruitment falling to its lowest level since before World War II.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH of their woke crap putting Americans at risk!**

DEI has no place in our United States Armed Forces, period. This fight is far from over and we must remain vigilant.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. Any support you can send - **[even just $10, $25, or $50](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9LZWVwLURFSS1PdXQtT2YtTWlsaXRhcnlfMjAyNTA2MTkmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1LZWVwLURFSS1PdXQtT2YtTWlsaXRhcnkmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/I2Wx2XOdsq2evvwErMxxzA)** - will help us share my message with folks across Texas and the nation and win hearts and minds for our America First agenda. **THANK YOU for being part of our fight-to-win conservative team!**
---

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~)

Friend,

President Trump has taken decisive action to protect female athletes, resulting in the **University of Pennsylvania 's recent decision to ban men from women's sports and strip the records of Lia Thomas.**

_[But the fight is FAR from over.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~ "But the fight is FAR from over.")_

Other schools and states like California are still pushing back, **[allowing biological males to compete against women despite President Trump's executive order.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~ "allowing biological males to compete against women despite President Trump’s executive order.")**

This is an outrage, Friend.

That's why we launched the **[Title IX Defense Coalition](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~ "Title IX Defense Coalition")** , a new movement of Americans who believe women's sports are worth defending.
[JOIN THE COALITION >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~)

* Support President Trump's unwavering commitment to fairness

_**[Will you step up right now and become a Founding Member of the Title IX Defense Coalition?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~)**_
.[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~) [JOIN THE COALITION >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GTkHMHvMX-bZmeBisu2_9g~~/AARclBA~/AKAM40TJnFMv-pDHVK8MnBX3QagCktwdQTaQlhCZKavLNV5c7Zx9NB0nzMM1k7gxzpi0gzO-TM_tBh7FTkpKNQO2MP0tYFtN3HJKt0tKEqVADye6glu0hTj3MnV9MCtkj4s5yUJ6BOgJt4AqE_nO1pNPXhRBr6_YTzZF4w4iLxZowzlWJMDoAvwYpnrkCEcnBAt1VpbBeb1dBVjStqphkE6cjnpoKC_dRJ05llui0RpqKD6slqj9gA_noa07KNTR7h-oF09mymNFWBbi9HlCKq5Rq8zlZ0E_yjm7_NoLRkqeuVV-pO2JsRmvgpEWqYUxGbvWObO--o4fmLvtSgAMIV8hvN4hsUo2CIWfd_vmesk~)

**[Fairness. Integrity. Biology. subject: Space Shuttle Battle, New Austin Bishop, and Thief's Hurt Feelings
body:
The Congressional budget reconciliation bill, known as the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," includes $85 million in funding intended to [relocate the space shuttle Discovery](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8mdBkl5u9SpNiG7m67JTKJA5YCGRFzZ3j7FaN9g23c2Pp8vvPne_pGTrwvv3EjJ--Yp51eJZEIHVN5oqeyniKJZrznTi88i0xgoNWm16aeAnK6pqYKbjZhsBU527e2bUxbd9Xq0ANi03Vfgx3m2Ia-o9qHeUADHhG-KnY3zPSmttaAbR8wDBhpsND3MTY-qMZQYMnHQ1YSemOJ6co_dDx83qrkVpFnUfUvBaOCEY8i5NedPd57BePHQsF4v1Ewmk7BeFDKHoXzrnPUnwv9T1QHLv7GX3rDS6-8L6Tzrmde9Ex4Cscz6ZlTUjBWhwvPF6fEpetVY5YNOX1yyf-1-ePgbwAAAP__43eLgQ) from the Smithsonian’s National Air and Space Museum to Houston’s Johnson Space Center.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuq4zAQQL9G7mKkkWXFhYoF4y4LyxZbCtkaxQL5gTWOk79fnFy4H3CbKWYOh-H8u9mbiynO999uQkPPsNgZj5yQCDebVzdgHneihL0754yH2zNZ4KAuXF-4tN7F9LJV4U3PfSMKNEIroSquZF2MBoXyVaiV8zr4RgcllKz7K_ROANSDKqI5ZVxzKQQHoUpoGhewEaB1CNXgWcXRR1q2kkYkfLoc0mt54FYOy1QkMxKtmclfDDoG3XEc5YRxJtwGXOlkGHRSNxL-MOiUutV_T1J2e_RMtkKJa8OgznsvmGxpxC97Jkf4OQCT7XeWz04y2XJtuXy3KDbj1yOmFHOtWcXvk4vp_R_9rOrDwP8AAAD___z5iM0) | |
# Thursday, July 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1884, the first public hospital in Central Texas opened in Austin. The [City-County Hospital](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAQAF-Du1iwtkNcUFzjLtdeaa3NYlAIWLCJk9-fcl-4ZsoZaX6u8xVDDGn7xjsZfrk8JzpqJGYqc91xpeofzJEW_DDRgY_KM0gYTlKfZDdbDPE99401i7SjasgoPaihl0N3brwBpVDD4KS7DHpFGC1e1ks_ugXdmQibYD4yqWWnlAQ1tDCO6GhUoLVz_WpFL8kGzqVlT0wvrC6-85NKu-Z7E41n3qvovgRMAqbjOFquHnOKIVGbyyZg8pjskvNNwESJS6AqYFoKrjdKJdiNTj7XPTDGphi7HyHGUM9a9HK7Y4h_If7fnqeB3wAAAP__0tx8mw) was renamed in honor of hospital board chairman Dr. Robert J. Brackenridge in 1929, and it remained in operation until 2017, when it was replaced by Dell Seton Medical Center at The University of Texas. Water and oil typically don't mix, but when they do, fracking is probably why. Check out today's _Roundup_ section to learn why the Texas Supreme Court [weighed in](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOrCAUhJ8GOwwcVNaC4jZ0e9tbGtZzUBIUA7juvv3NbvI_wd9MM5OZyffvPt1diGFf_rqNTH35NO10lUi1Up7K4WYq61lrpIf76E6XO0udQEDPheZCTehCfE9dg-YhcJQNGal72XeiV0OzmkFAJ4XSXt2kV2pExBuShtuIo55RNsF8yoQWSkoBsm9hHJ2nUYLW3nczsk4QhppyW1eq9HLFx3d6Um7ntDXRrLUehak_DCwD65YcYvDUprwwsN-8W6K7GNjPEAMrBgZWiR-Xl_PItBGf05krP3LCcybkl6uUebp2Qv548y3slF3kkUohYmCbbPC4QoyhDJp1YtlciN9P9Xcknwb-BwAA__9dh4it) on this issue. Yesterday, we let you know about our editor in chief, David, who underwent surgery on Monday, and your response was unbelievable. So many of you responded with prayers, hugs, and heartfelt messages. That outpouring of love must’ve helped: David was released from the hospital last night and is resting at home now. We will be sharing your wishes with David when he is better. We’re so grateful for your kindness, and so lucky you are a part of _The Texas Flyover_ family. Today, the language learning software [Babbel](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuq4zAQQL9G7mKkkWXFhYoF4y4LyxZbCtkaxQL5gTWOk79fnFy4H3CbKWYOh-H8u9mbiynO999uQkPPsNgZj5yQCDebVzdgHneihL0754yH2zNZ4KAuXF-4tN7F9LJV4U3PfSMKNEIroSquZF2MBoXyVaiV8zr4RgcllKz7K_ROANSDKqI5ZVxzKQQHoUpoGhewEaB1CNXgWcXRR1q2kkYkfLoc0mt54FYOy1QkMxKtmclfDDoG3XEc5YRxJtwGXOlkGHRSNxL-MOiUutV_T1J2e_RMtkKJa8OgznsvmGxpxC97Jkf4OQCT7XeWz04y2XJtuXy3KDbj1yOmFHOtWcXvk4vp_R_9rOrDwP8AAAD___z5iM0) is sponsoring us and offering [a special Fourth of July sale](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuq4zAQQL9G7mKkkWXFhYoF4y4LyxZbCtkaxQL5gTWOk79fnFy4H3CbKWYOh-H8u9mbiynO999uQkPPsNgZj5yQCDebVzdgHneihL0754yH2zNZ4KAuXF-4tN7F9LJV4U3PfSMKNEIroSquZF2MBoXyVaiV8zr4RgcllKz7K_ROANSDKqI5ZVxzKQQHoUpoGhewEaB1CNXgWcXRR1q2kkYkfLoc0mt54FYOy1QkMxKtmclfDDoG3XEc5YRxJtwGXOlkGHRSNxL-MOiUutV_T1J2e_RMtkKJa8OgznsvmGxpxC97Jkf4OQCT7XeWz04y2XJtuXy3KDbj1yOmFHOtWcXvk4vp_R_9rOrDwP8AAAD___z5iM0) to our readers.

## TX Supreme Court: Drillers Get Leftover Water
The Texas Supreme Court ruled Friday that water produced during oil and gas operations [belongs to the leaseholder,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7rDg-Ie4oNjG3d12Swubg42EAcFxSN5-lbzCbaaaGX36_v2sP9p5F46_-kJFLxvXgLV4JMK8lqR3LOdN5HHTnwxY9V1oBQ4j45LxfjXa-fc6tEZt3MyiRSXkKMaBj_3UnuoxTf0Mj82gADON-9zDsPUPKwWYYTTYOvU545L3QnAQYwfzrC3OAqS0dthNM3A0jmLu6ETCly7Wv-MTc7fHq_XqJEql6f80sDSw1Fq76LwO5tDF6_rGvPl4fLoNLN85K3fKeCHb452JxeQCFhYDizVgLqdLLFqWcjT3joZVTZgbWNqsTKrOe1cm2Qz8uLTzXwb6nbmngv8BAAD__x5YhmM) not the landowner, unless explicitly stated otherwise in the contract. The landmark ruling originated from a dispute in Reeves County between Cactus Water Services and COG Operating. Disposing of produced water—a mix of formation water, fracking fluid, and naturally occurring chemicals—is a significant cost for drilling companies. However, new restrictions on wastewater injection wells have led producers to [consider other solutions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O4yAURJ_G7mzBNTZLQbGNu2y7pcXPJUZLjAU3IXn7lfMKXzPFjHRGOn9v283EFI_7H_NATe-QtwNbTUiEZauncVj3J1FCa648sJlnpQ0YzAOTA5s2b2L6bKL32jKveI-ay5nPgs3T0u_aLhaC8HaRPlgWghIwc2vV5OCXVzP2UV8wJtnEOQM-j6CUCag4SBmCcL4TDH2kXEbakfBtakif_MIyuvzok96JztpNvztYO1hba6PbSz6utYP1zClSdLWD1RSKLuFVluyfDv3QDGEZvtAhFOP-xeM-ABNs4gsfz_3si_ZniynFushOsPvDxPQ9pp_pemn4HwAA__8kX4Cx), like reusing it in fracking operations or treating it for resale. There are also pilot projects testing the feasibility of using produced water to grow crops. One company announced last year that it had successfully [extracted lithium from produced water](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GOww8RdaCYhu72XZLg_JQEhQDz3Hm7zfOL2xzqpN7kvv7GB82xLAvP3ZDQy-fxh2vEpEI81gOO2NZT6KIk72542XPQiMIUFxoLprR2RDfY1s5MwnXywqN1EqqVqimq1bjtLWdalpvhULd9wInmGQH7eynL6-gCuYeE1o0UgqQqoa-tx57CVp7386OtQJdoJRrWpHwZYuP7_TEXM9pq6JZiY7Cmm8GA4Phuq76I1EO07ljnfLCYLgbDAahb0gGw8fh5TwybsjndGbiR07unNHxyxJmnkLkiy0Mhiobd1whxlA6zVqxbDbET57-d9rTwF8AAAD__xcrgZA) in the Permian Basin, where drilling activity generates about half a billion gallons of produced water every day. In its opinion, the court dismissed the argument that produced water is groundwater, which belongs to the landowner. _“While produced water contains molecules of water, both from injected fluids and subsurface formations, the solution itself is waste—a horse of an entirely different color,”_ [the justices wrote](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOrCAUhJ8GOwwcVNaC4jZ0e9tbGtZzUBIUA7juvv3NbvI_wd9MM5OZyffvPt1diGFf_rqNTH35NO10lUi1Up7K4WYq61lrpIf76E6XO0udQEDPheZCTehCfE9dg-YhcJQNGal72XeiV0OzmkFAJ4XSXt2kV2pExBuShtuIo55RNsF8yoQWSkoBsm9hHJ2nUYLW3nczsk4QhppyW1eq9HLFx3d6Um7ntDXRrLUehak_DCwD65YcYvDUprwwsN-8W6K7GNjPEAMrBgZWiR-Xl_PItBGf05krP3LCcybkl6uUebp2Qv548y3slF3kkUohYmCbbPC4QoyhDJp1YtlciN9P9Xcknwb-BwAA__9dh4it).
## High-End Auto Theft Ring Busted
Police recovered six luxury vehicles [worth an estimated $1.5 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAUhE-DOyx-g11QbOMu225pEXjESC_GAhzHt195r7DNVKNvNN_Pfb67hGl9frsX2PaJeV7hqAitQZnr5jzUZW8N4eGuXOFwe22zYEJTZiiTc3AJz1l1wT5YGHkHlhvNtWJa3rrFKqeY8uFxE3IYeFQ8eqOFHINX3gg_dMleMGaY5JwJrnsxji7CyIUxMSofiGIQUsulbws0-Lga8cxvKL3Prw7t0tpWifwiYiJiOo6jx-wdbiXHhHCViJiuV0RMG7o10y1j8kAL-AtDa8sIK8X9s5eTelcq5WwYmR5kV2zYjoSY6s0QxZ4vl_Bvt_3P1tuK3wAAAP__Kg2ANQ) from three suspects in South Dallas last month. The investigation, led by Plano and Dallas police with help from the FBI and Texas Department of Public Safety, began [after the theft](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u6yAMgJ-GbERAoDQDw12y9a5njAiYBomGCpymefsj8gpnsaXP8uefn8f8sDHF7fnfvsDgN-R5g6MmQIQy17d1UNcdMcFiW9zgsHvFWTChKNOUDbO3MZ2z7LxZmB95B4ZrxZVkarh1qwEppQz3O6ibZtq7UcHgl7uz0o_Bat1F02RMs4FzJrjqxTjaACMXWocgnSeSgY-YS48rIHxtDenMHyi9y68umRXxXcnwj4iJiOk4jt4ttV3R6kRMVwsRU0Mt5YIrvSBN-3cvJ3W2UFwhIC1xe9KSU6q05NMBLeDaqJPaUqBiE3TF-PcRU4r1polkz5eN6doF__bBjxG_AQAA__-Ae4k2) of a 2024 Rolls-Royce Spectre from a valet stand on June 6. SWAT officers executed search warrants at two homes on June 11, apprehending Miguel Hernandez, 27, Salvador Hernandez, 29, and Oscar Ivan Valdez, 28. The recovered vehicles include a Rolls-Royce Cullinan, a Rolls-Royce Spectre, Cadillac Escalade-V, Maserati Levante, Audi RS7, and Mercedes S63 AMG. [See photos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOqP1YsJP4eJv6HLtlWhjr4MlB5C9BPL2J-4VrhlNMZrRfN_36U4xxeX5RS-2coZ1WvgoiUU4T2Ujx2XeRRI_6NKFD9qLTAjYKegVtJOnmD6Tqb19gB90zVb3ne4MdO2tnm3rAXXw2iE4wMFp14Z_BoCJWOubrqO9yqCHVmtA3TU4DBR40Nj3IRjnKwPso6y5kZmFTyohfdY358atrzrZWWQrVfu_wrHC8TiOJqynuW5cgQrHy1Y4bomWVaX93PNHOcpKZg6iclye6rEXYV9n67cjphTLra8MPF8U0--K_I3N2-JPAAAA__-QeHqH).
