## Space Shuttle Could Be Coming to Houston
The Congressional budget reconciliation bill, known as the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," includes $85 million in funding intended to [relocate the space shuttle _Discovery_](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8mdBkl5u9SpNiG7m67JTKJA5YCGRFzZ3j7FaN9g23c2Pp8vvPne_pGTrwvv3EjJ--Yp51eJZEIHVN5oqeyniKJZrznTi88i0xgoNWm16aeAnK6pqYKbjZhsBU527e2bUxbd9Xq0ANi03Vfgx3m2Ia-o9qHeUADHhG-KnY3zPSmttaAbR8wDBhpsND3MTY-qMZQYMnHQ1YSemOJ6co_dDx83qrkVpFnUfUvBaOCEY8i5NedPd57BePHQsF4v1Ewmk7BeFDKHoXzrnPUnwv9T1QHLv7GX3rDS6-8L6Tzrmde9Ex4Cscz6ZlTUjBWhwvPF6fEpetVY5YNOX1yyf-1-ePgbwAAAP__43eLgQ) from the Smithsonian’s National Air and Space Museum to Houston’s Johnson Space Center. While neither the space shuttle nor its intended destination is specifically mentioned in the bill’s text, Sen. John Cornyn [celebrated the passage of the provision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8GMyzAH8aAYBOz2XRDC6XRrmLAklbHt99y5r7BTTrprq_Pd_49h6fFgHH-a19g6O3TEOHMAYhgG_JqJ8jLThRgtPeMcNo906CEarjQXFSDsxiuoS6cGYXrZAFG6kY2tWiqtliMs3oSoxaPrqp8W_nW-UfjHo3V3jklXYHmhgktKimFkk2pus566KTS2vt6cqwW4JDSVtICBG-bfbjSAVs5pVcRzEK0Zlb9Yapnqj_Ps5zSFq9YZoiWoJzTwVR_azHVf1d83dKBGVPklPi4YZz5R5b_2HKHebp_XPfBkvZMKfLV5gyOY-RfdOYpAh9x5iPYndDvgY8YAlN9sRm3nhgC5lazWswvi-ETmH5X82HU_wAAAP__LVGXsA), saying that “it’s long overdue for Space City to receive the recognition it deserves by bringing the Space Shuttle _Discovery_ home.” When the space shuttle program ended, Houston missed out on getting one of the four remaining orbiters, which went to Florida’s Kennedy Space Center, Los Angeles, New York City, and Washington, D.C. In April, Cornyn and his colleague Sen. Ted Cruz introduced legislation aimed at “righting this egregious wrong.” However, the Smithsonian estimated it [could cost as much as $325 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdF7ZBpZQuEhD99KmRIM9wEjGRvbAvv37yKv8wWtuM1dzj87fr_kLKFDc_sCBlr_XNEd8lYDMmOdygsOyX8wBF6gZ8QVX4dko00s1SNXOHii8567xdlF-1A1aPfS671TfPpvdqnF5Kte6X86DXo0GZwDHUZmxhcE71ZCtz9SgWq2V0f3DjCOsOGozDOvaOS86hZ445QfvyPgNZQ3vdGN-uHQ0we7MZxHtb2EmYaaYMu-Y4015o0hwwFZ79YKvIsxU14SZ1FBDCzNxvo6zyBRRLrTJBeFiWq8gFwpBUnTh8ljkmdNNhVKUnOSRbpS8o_wokv8dSU_FVbJ37XxQhZmabP35ohCoPAfRqe0ACh92_pnx25p_AQAA__-H5Zj8) to move _Discovery_ and build a new facility. _“Our position is that the Discovery is staying right where it is,”_ said National Air & Space Museum Director Chris Browne.

Brackenridge in 1929, and it remained in operation until 2017, when it was replaced by Dell Seton Medical Center at The University of Texas. The landmark ruling originated from a dispute in Reeves County between Cactus Water Services and COG Operating. Disposing of produced water—a mix of formation water, fracking fluid, and naturally occurring chemicals—is a significant cost for drilling companies. However, new restrictions on wastewater injection wells have led producers to , like reusing it in fracking operations or treating it for resale. There are also pilot projects testing the feasibility of using produced water to grow crops. One company announced last year that it had successfully in the Permian Basin, where drilling activity generates about half a billion gallons of produced water every day. In its opinion, the court dismissed the argument that produced water is groundwater, which belongs to the landowner. “While produced water contains molecules of water, both from injected fluids and subsurface formations, the solution itself is waste—a horse of an entirely different color,” . High-End Auto Theft Ring Busted Police recovered six luxury vehicles from three suspects in South Dallas last month. The investigation, led by Plano and Dallas police with help from the FBI and Texas Department of Public Safety, began of a 2024 Rolls-Royce Spectre from a valet stand on June 6. SWAT officers executed search warrants at two homes on June 11, apprehending Miguel Hernandez, 27, Salvador Hernandez, 29, and Oscar Ivan Valdez, 28. The recovered vehicles include a Rolls-Royce Cullinan, a Rolls-Royce Spectre, Cadillac Escalade-V, Maserati Levante, Audi RS7, and Mercedes S63 AMG. . Police also recovered firearms, body armor, and tools commonly used in auto thefts. Valdez remains in custody with 15 active felony warrants, while the two other suspects have been . Space Shuttle Could Be Coming to Houston The Congressional budget reconciliation bill, known as the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," includes $85 million in funding intended to from the Smithsonian’s National Air and Space Museum to Houston’s Johnson Space Center. While neither the space shuttle nor its intended destination is specifically mentioned in the bill’s text, Sen. John Cornyn , saying that “it’s long overdue for Space City to receive the recognition it deserves by bringing the Space Shuttle Discovery home.” When the space shuttle program ended, Houston missed out on getting one of the four remaining orbiters, which went to Florida’s Kennedy Space Center, Los Angeles, New York City, and Washington, D.C. In April, Cornyn and his colleague Sen. name: Jason Ross, The LaRouche Organization
subject: Creativity Can Escape a Doomed System — An Inside View of LaRouche's Philosophy of Science
body:
Explore genius, creativity, and discovery—from Socrates to AI—using the LaRouche approach.

| | | [ ](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HM6Vx3bJFWn0kHCKwY0V20z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_class_series_invite_2&n=1&v=85)
---
## Get an Inside View into Scientific Discovery:
Class Series this Summer
---
Friend — What is required, to change the hypothesis upon which a society is based? When dangerously incompetent fools have taken the wheel, what can be done, to prevent the ship from crashing on the rocks? Only human creativity can break mankind free from the strictures of a doomed system. And there is a science to human creativity—a method of making it voluntary! The universal genius Lyndon H. LaRouche, Jr. made it his life’s work to understand, practice, and promote the method of hypothesizing higher hypotheses. I’d like to invite you to join me this summer in **[a six-part series of classes](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygWkJdA6jdHeMNuecTJWTauY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_class_series_invite_2&n=2&v=85)** , readings and discussions, running from **July 20 through August 27** , under the theme “Lyndon LaRouche's view of human creativity, from the standpoint of history's greatest scientific geniuses and their discoveries.”
---
| [](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygWkJdA6jdHeMNuecTJWTauY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_class_series_invite_2&n=3&v=85 "Count me in!") [Count me in!](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygWkJdA6jdHeMNuecTJWTauY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_class_series_invite_2&n=3&v=85)
---
On **Sundays at 11 a.m. EDT (3 p.m. GMT)** —and with additional “office hours” / free discussion on **Wednesdays at 7 p.m. EDT (11 p.m. GMT)** —we’ll explore a “narrow path” of discovery charted by some of history’s most revolutionary thinkers. At the recent Schiller Institute conference I discussed the rationale and overview of the project:
---
[ ](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygWkJdA6jdHeMNuecTJWTauY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_class_series_invite_2&n=4&v=85)
---
The full schedule can be found on [the class registration page](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/science2025?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_class_series_invite_2&n=5&v=85). The first five sessions will introduce key concepts from **Socrates** , via the writings of Plato, including his famous Cave allegory; Johannes **Kepler** , the first astrophysicist; Pierre de **Fermat** , who showed the scientific value of _intention_ ; the genius Gottfried **Leibniz** , who gave us the language of causes; and Carl **Gauss** and Bernhard **Riemann** , who together redefined the relationship we have to our senses. Each of these thinkers contributed essential concepts to make the modern world possible. The sixth class will bring together what we've discussed, to apply that thinking to some modern questions of the relationship between what is called **AI** (or Machine Learning) and human intelligence, and for general group discussion of the topics covered. Those who sign up will be directed to a page where you’ll have the option to support this initiative. Your participation—and your backing—make this kind of work possible. I hope to see you there!**** Jason Ross,
[The LaRouche Organization](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_class_series_invite_2&n=6&v=85)

clean_body: Explore genius, creativity, and discovery—from Socrates to AI—using the LaRouche approach. | | | Get an Inside View into Scientific Discovery: Class Series this Summer Friend — What is required, to change the hypothesis upon which a society is based? When dangerously incompetent fools have taken the wheel, what can be done, to prevent the ship from crashing on the rocks? Only human creativity can break mankind free from the strictures of a doomed system. And there is a science to human creativity—a method of making it voluntary! The universal genius Lyndon H. LaRouche, Jr. made it his life’s work to understand, practice, and promote the method of hypothesizing higher hypotheses. I’d like to invite you to join me this summer in , readings and discussions, running from July 20 through August 27 , under the theme “Lyndon LaRouche's view of human creativity, from the standpoint of history's greatest scientific geniuses and their discoveries.” | "Count me in!" On Sundays at 11 a.m. EDT (3 p.m. GMT) —and with additional “office hours” / free discussion on Wednesdays at 7 p.m. EDT (11 p.m. GMT) —we’ll explore a “narrow path” of discovery charted by some of history’s most revolutionary thinkers. At the recent Schiller Institute conference I discussed the rationale and overview of the project: The full schedule can be found on . The first five sessions will introduce key concepts from Socrates , via the writings of Plato, including his famous Cave allegory; Johannes Kepler , the first astrophysicist; Pierre de Fermat , who showed the scientific value of intention ; the genius Gottfried Leibniz , who gave us the language of causes; and Carl Gauss and Bernhard Riemann , who together redefined the relationship we have to our senses. Each of these thinkers contributed essential concepts to make the modern world possible. The sixth class will bring together what we've discussed, to apply that thinking to some modern questions of the relationship between what is called AI (or Machine Learning) and human intelligence, and for general group discussion of the topics covered. Those who sign up will be directed to a page where you’ll have the option to support this initiative. Your participation—and your backing—make this kind of work possible. I hope to see you there!**** Jason Ross, | "Register for the Classes" | | | ---|---|--- The LaRouche Organization · 2 University Plaza Dr, Suite 100, Hackensack, NJ 07601, United States

# [The Dangerous Allure of Zohran Mamdani's Socialist Nightmare](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=167378662&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3Mzc4NjYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE1NDc5OTksImV4cCI6MTc1NDEzOTk5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6V-S-8nS1hW_5m2mxrDjPGbYHyE4o3YC4hTmr7WSXmQ)
### The irony is that New York's greatness stems from the very capitalist system Mamdani seeks to dismantle...
| | [Matthew Miller](https://substack.com/@mattmiller737)
---
| Jul 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mattmiller737)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=167378662&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3Mzc4NjYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTU0Nzk5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzU0MTM5OTk5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0EHQVe-_qgth7b9blLlS6_CGMblgabYfbJfzGO-Tuso&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=167378662&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3Mzc4NjYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE1NDc5OTksImV4cCI6MTc1NDEzOTk5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6V-S-8nS1hW_5m2mxrDjPGbYHyE4o3YC4hTmr7WSXmQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=167378662&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3Mzc4NjYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE1NDc5OTksImV4cCI6MTc1NDEzOTk5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6V-S-8nS1hW_5m2mxrDjPGbYHyE4o3YC4hTmr7WSXmQ)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcG9saXRpYnJhd2wvcC90aGUtZGFuZ2Vyb3VzLWFsbHVyZS1vZi16b2hyYW4tbWFtZGFuaXM_.YhEzR1-0f_I6eyztyP41KK1tqM1qn7SSDh4N9xMVRRM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/the-dangerous-allure-of-zohran-mamdanis?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5cfbc6ac-a661-42c3-860f-2fd7faa5d2c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
New York City, once a beacon of capitalism and innovation, is at a crossroads. Young voters, increasingly drawn to Assemblyman Zohran Mamdani's radical socialist ideas, are captivated by promises of equity and justice. Yet, their enthusiasm coincides with a dangerous ignorance of history and economics, threatening to unravel the very systems that made America--and New York--a global powerhouse in the first place.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..68TWkH2eSbjEQz_HESWTFFvJAztsXRESehgGS2lOVJ8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167378662)
Mamdani's vision, **[cloaked in ultra-progressive idealism](https://substack.com/redirect/d448ed16-63a9-4486-973f-525cdd417c3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , risks plunging the city into economic decay, as it ignores the lessons of past failed socialist experiments and the virtues of free enterprise. Young New Yorkers, who have always leaned heavily left, view capitalism with disdain, blaming it for inequality while romanticizing socialism as a utopian fix. They lack the historical context of the Soviet Union's collapse, Mao's catastrophic Great Leap Forward, or Castro's Cuba, where centralized control crushed innovation and prosperity and shattered whole societies. These regimes, which Mamdani's policies echo, led to food shortages, stagnation, and **[suffering on unprecedented levels.](https://substack.com/redirect/5c8ebff8-305f-45ac-9e24-7d3c44147fcf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Yet, without lived memory of these failures, young voters are seduced by Mamdani's rhetoric, blind to the economic devastation it could unleash.
Mamdani's proposals, like rent freezes and government-run grocery stores with fixed prices, understandably sound appealing to those struggling with rising costs. But they ignore basic market realities. Rent control discourages developers from building new housing, as capped profits make risk-taking investments untenable. Cities like San Francisco, with stringent rent controls, face housing shortages and skyrocketing prices for unrented units.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**Together with Goldco**
# **[The "Death Spiral" Threatening Your Savings](https://substack.com/redirect/503c0213-257c-4ff6-92ba-58812b46b7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# _Expect an economic "heart attack"..._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/503c0213-257c-4ff6-92ba-58812b46b7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Death spiral. **Economic heart attack**.
These are the **urgent warnings** from billionaire and founder of the world's largest hedge fund, Ray Dalio.
He's talking about the $36 Trillion national debt, and **only the ignorant** would dismiss his words...
Because it was **Dalio who tried warning the world** of a coming financial crisis in 2007.
The world **didn 't listen**...
But this time, **it 's not just Dalio ringing the alarm** bells...
**[Click Here to Keep Reading...](https://substack.com/redirect/503c0213-257c-4ff6-92ba-58812b46b7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ National Debt & Your Retirement](https://substack.com/redirect/503c0213-257c-4ff6-92ba-58812b46b7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
Mamdani's government grocery stores, plagiarized from Fidel Castro himself, would stifle competition, reduce quality, and create inefficiencies. Historical examples--Venezuela's state-controlled food markets come to mind--show shelves empty of essentials while black markets thrive. Young voters, unfamiliar with supply and demand or the role of competition in driving innovation and affordability, fail to see how these policies would harm consumers and businesses alike.
Moreover, Mamdani's radicalism extends beyond economics. His inflammatory calls for "Intifada" and alignment with anti-Israel movements have stoked fear among New York's Jewish community. While not all criticism of Israel is antisemitic, the undertones in parts of these movements--evident in campus protests and public rhetoric--have left Jewish New Yorkers feeling unsafe. This divisiveness undermines the city's social fabric, alienating a community integral to its cultural and economic vitality.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..68TWkH2eSbjEQz_HESWTFFvJAztsXRESehgGS2lOVJ8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167378662)
Mamdani's opposition to the Trump administration and his support for sanctuary city policies further exacerbate New York's challenges. Sanctuary laws, while framed as compassionate, strain public resources and compromise safety by limiting cooperation with federal immigration enforcement. The costs--billions in taxpayer dollars--divert funds from schools, infrastructure, and public services. Young voters, enamored with the idea of resistance, overlook how these policies erode the city's fiscal health and security.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5cfbc6ac-a661-42c3-860f-2fd7faa5d2c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The irony is that New York's greatness stems from the very systems Mamdani seeks to dismantle. Capitalism, for all its flaws, fosters competition, rewards innovation, and attracts entrepreneurs. The profit motive drives businesses to meet consumer needs efficiently, from corner bodegas to global corporations. If Mamdani's policies prevail, high taxes, suffocating regulations, and anti-business measures will drive entrepreneurs and investors to flee for freer markets like Texas or Florida. New York's economy, already reeling from post-pandemic challenges, could face decades of decline.
Young voters must wake up to the consequences of Mamdani's vision. They cannot explain how markets allocate resources or why competition benefits consumers, yet they champion policies that would cripple both. History offers stark warnings: socialism's promise of equality always delivers scarcity, suffering and overreaching state control. If New York embraces Mamdani's agenda, it risks becoming a cautionary tale--a once-great city kneecapped by economic ignorance and ideological zeal. The lessons of the Soviet Union, Mao's China, and Castro's Cuba are not abstract; they are a roadmap to ruin. New York's youngsters must learn them before it's too late.
* * *
| | POLL
---

name: Pete Hegseth Alerts
subject: Pete Hegseth’s bone-chilling warning to the radical left
disclaimer_text: Paid For By America First Patriots PAC
body:
We’re shocked at what happened to his mother

| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znpqbseq3p88hlvl72skgmm4fms0rtlg3oed8s0g_)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7k6g2akdh0fs91h0orv9vjshkmc62g6u49cufvg_)
|
---

**"I will not be bullied or intimidated. Never. President Trump has called on me to serve—and that is what I intend to do."**
Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth is the next target of the Radical Left’s hit list.
As President Trump’s **right-hand man** , he slashed the Radical Left’s Woke agenda and is propelling our military to the strongest it's ever been.

President Trump’s political team is pressuring Texas Republicans to redraw redistricting maps in a blatant attempt to rig elections and cling onto their fragile House majority.

**If they succeed, they could create 4 to 5 new Republican seats by slicing up Democratic districts - silencing voters of color and intentionally diluting Democratic voices.**

And it’s not the first time: in every decade since the Voting Rights Act was enacted in 1965, Texas has been found by a federal court to have violated federal law by illegally discriminating against voters of color.

_Now they’re doing it again,and the stakes couldn’t be higher._

**While Republicans work behind closed doors to suppress the vote and rig the rules of our elections, New Dems are fighting back** — to protect fair representation, to uphold the law, and to defend our democracy.

clean_body: I’m not here to win popularity contests in the Senate| | | Friend, Washington insiders want me to play the game. To keep quiet. To rubber-stamp their trillion-dollar spending binges and endless debt hikes. But I didn’t come to the Senate to make friends in the Swamp. I came here to fight for you, the taxpayers, the workers, the families trying to survive in a nation saddled with $34 TRILLION in debt. We can’t keep kicking the can down the road. | | | | | Let’s show them that liberty is still popular. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | | Contribution rules: I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). We’re celebrating America’s 250th in
| | | | Friend,
I’m excited to announce that in celebration of America’s 250th birthday, I’m giving away one of my favorite guns!
**The FN M249S PARA is one of the most iconic guns in American history, and now you have a chance to win mine!**

Fellow American,

3,000 left-wing activists filled Dickies Arena this weekend in the heart of North Texas.

And leading the parade?

**Bernie Sanders. Robert Francis “ _Beto_ ” O’Rourke. Greg Casar. The Communist All-Stars!**

They didn’t come to enjoy the barbecue. **They came to FLIP this seat.**

**I represent one of the most competitive districts in Texas — and the radical left knows that if they can knock off a conservative like me, they can start tipping Texas blue for good.**

[**Support Beth →**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59bc5c6d874f4e5e85c52e5656e16484&_e=6L0ZQXZ5S1MULdoMT3gYljZq-9RGtMCENHQexTXkl3bwcV1FDhvnYHbIs0KRw1TvwUtw49JFpMYl0EmyiGbvmhJv_81ftTbeDv_aUVIhrZaK-gXpnBWyODHKnMIPVntRyKs7BMLLutkzyuuBXJgl1cqZDiIDpWN3rQ5BZkggnLFoYRy_jX30k_q653Vb-9LxtcuoENN_BORw0rp0rQzTH23zpmCKSpTQ4E9a-fTdI5L4KKrv925MdogbKRKCSSvH_su3yAbKQ4whX4SdqFy_SQU4AcuDH-rjfFkOVCqQZflNKreIsE4X4JENll2-nsWb3TkG9F-IvWGVbPCAWKOUq3Er5nyD6CS60jXQ_o6y4V6EJ-vvdq14mAEkBfIFXSXCNsStRftAlqc_PVdA6pDbIyg98tw46W8Xo_3zpG_u3rSBCRaCg4_wHEvUjLJVlCy1wjBlGJ1B5X2M7k5ZdwMfiHzwdsueiyFlAg5WepbyvJdtmrhgMlkztfR5ut9UyA-eJ6GS1GZ9-oBnPKYNaNgYy0yE9APxREfenGn9lQqp_KvkLI4df9nIQfKglSLd2OMyPOVp_m92ZOWSYNYll2MA_WdAPXyJHgwr7jlyiq9aGPjuGAoMRmddAFdmTsQ27r3X9NLkyA2dqDmw6q2J6B3ao0qS-IsFxddXw95bA3lz1y06ICv537IooUlxI7g4JIj8wyKw_3YzqISHhQ9KqwInYcqqqBI5tbmaPS9wuvq0SSbPffDTBSnKgDk07ZI8cqtJHtIqQEMEZ9_1AqxnpiINSpibR-6iDurS476YtyFGUUI%3D)
This isn’t just about my race. This is about stopping the socialist, anti-American energy, open-borders agenda they’re trying to force on all of us.

**And with our end-of-quarter deadline just _days_ away, I need you to step up and help me hold the line.**

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

Fellow Conservative,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=460ef9927b5e490b88e3fd45eba36ada&_e=Ga5oGLwaqgtpPTVH0SmRbyQ9Tly9ujTZejMCM9jjCN6fnpn44nIwm75340BCw4puDI7LVn7k3dWIMmL0q3qT13GxTj2Ei9kImotXzix9biI1nQZybCq-NV-kyCTE0hMZ5JJPEo9u0HexgG46oL_WJMPLIePBdb1MlmH6UHKNWxsogJQQ5F5ksgpBjST1Ob6x1sxPzpKXZM_HbPAMahDHTH6d4YDOf8PUcwHbMkkn7Pztj1Y2rZm_OYi7Vu8XW5qGLbUoEmCMNCmbqbxcrlvVD-6FQ5lewJJUqLXU96gCudd8AP2HKEeirLUQe6jYTFzTb6yodDypJlF-XtNaB54HmOBeMYK35Eif76ug_hSjaIWUcfE3EEBE7xKDaIdD6W8Fb4IzOqIlOm-q5r-Y524qvi9Too76c-GGOu8b_K3mfH_vTRedZ6YoLj93R-LHgaF671SsTHfJqYyGj5PsGc9LEtE5lwOlDJQKHLe39tdM-1_JvQFrisJKbFOR4bHwUy_5xtL5x6vhIyaXudDJszk0ADt-VtD1nfibUQtskZdTZtXCqngCCwXArVs3HRAwks9GJK5KJgjWxVL42VdQZbpi8Ehg3QdBk4jw5Y35u9O0g6fz68DqqgR93esvSAhVMo1pZnEsvMj4CFVjcfT8TbmQQXpvNs1iE3qtmuuz2HDU_nR0eOCltq_wO1ypu70z_weBlum1taAF7iHTwMoZ12oijJhByzfIh8_9zSzXO6qlsyB1RmasiosjFMi76xrd0ZdGv3SMceVsCg6y1TUAW83lAllT7aa3n880Ksy4G-vHYxI%3D)
**_ **_Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win._**
_
_ _[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=460ef9927b5e490b88e3fd45eba36ada&_e=Ga5oGLwaqgtpPTVH0SmRbyQ9Tly9ujTZejMCM9jjCN6fnpn44nIwm75340BCw4puxmIIfxHWdlRFHZBRsfpTNwZOsvCD7GvzoaOd4Bs9AXXfy8fSkcjqdozBXKrCUxDX9Echz4LsmzeRbzwA4wPiBOLOhbTulOTfMNsfFLWWRzWkK2J6wVVl7vZ0zXmW0sR_K4ZSoTbPF-bTVQdqNfH-busqXj7jpuYJK7ex8aRs95remRgODkq4TTS7fyY3Dk8mCkMT3X8qitI3fSw1qZBIt4eN1eGOVq9RZ22hFIEXGINYLwAYRXUiL6H81yoT8-3wXriyp3gAebdyZaY3bCP4dzSWo0wY4wrknnYemI9eGYcgBfeFsCwd1KnlapXY4uEm3Ujh-1lKQGK7hHvd7dyjWWAMUg7G729MjLOeyHsi2HTsdp9-d6SDyiUizViTbSMC2f8LEueW0Kwonf_jQrLpybQOJalCsjmsmrkgWRbVJSTTvJvVYpMxR8nmmPnJHWtbZoWRhObOGlT4yVHzzQnxeiO4PXKvKptHn9hFsf2OatPAl699Qg_dhn_2b4SGlYLVBbWW2fsZWSgm2aiyChDylsnAiKPtfPiDGn7mgoA60IL0N9YkKDZhsPhcjDcRSQ11fJPxGQedhBaYQqtesJ_xMF_H50IlNuyx6GDO3IPtLffyKVpixH0L8HxeLu2fNhvXFQUWp4e6cRb8uVf_Agm837_v5egP_XC6HStWFtq5kee52UEu-psjLlNmjsMhVDBrXZj0ppFp70GmhBDB8S0JrszBy8_8zFve1FZI6VDAasA%3D)_

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=460ef9927b5e490b88e3fd45eba36ada&_e=Ga5oGLwaqgtpPTVH0SmRbyQ9Tly9ujTZejMCM9jjCN6fnpn44nIwm75340BCw4puDI7LVn7k3dWIMmL0q3qT13GxTj2Ei9kImotXzix9biI1nQZybCq-NV-kyCTE0hMZ5JJPEo9u0HexgG46oL_WJMPLIePBdb1MlmH6UHKNWxsogJQQ5F5ksgpBjST1Ob6x1sxPzpKXZM_HbPAMahDHTH6d4YDOf8PUcwHbMkkn7Pztj1Y2rZm_OYi7Vu8XW5qGLbUoEmCMNCmbqbxcrlvVD-6FQ5lewJJUqLXU96gCuddmtfQYzk2LScNQHsgF7SpJHUowOx3gjY0FoMyseR5M0KXEIq8wQqpnLsdzMAnS71qp2wfhFcMwDXGcmtC8NIiiA_fiCPt8iydlxCc4yq79h7VeiVU_1P_1FN_QsAjJsd5yc8UzpfM2rfmtzD3N9fGHM8pVFuhdwsnonuYFF7Aq_6zr9VGz-z0jcZstogE_9ucn7LfRSANqBnMf5IE9R8TKg_cQGMXUg-MaUIlkBnBzbjwdFjpZXAPA_JxMbec9noyul-o7k60Gm5Iga9xfU-H0Z--KEApnuzljJZWBkzDPUXermspgD6wxLLSZIOKJ7pPCnb3aOuAiL9Fli0s_Lv3L1X2zdj4cQA3L3VNUl1tbSPEQH7RHilHHILP-97wVRvCUVdyc1ascXYYTD9Bxjb9WOEbKfXql9LYITt8OpmTE5lBHf5beoM3-ou4z_ORKykKdSWr-LQcsXSc_fUwyfD0ZR5BUYCY7Nf98ipyc4qm5e5fW_fBhUythKXuQkSfF6Z8%3D)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

clean_body: I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. | Fellow Conservative, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. * * *
Friend – Donald Trump’s attacks on the press have been despicable.

He’s threatened to PULL _MSNBC_ off the air, FIRE Rachel Maddow and Nicolle Wallace, and now he’s banning news organizations from the White House Press Briefings.

_All because they report the TRUTH, not just what Trump wants people to know._

**It has never been more important to stand up for the free press Friend.**

[**_So PLEASE, we need 150,000 people to sign TODAY to stand with the _Associated Press_ and the free press nationwide →_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63668?t=7&akid=23183%2E4449941%2ESmXI67)
[SIGN MY NAME NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63669?t=8&akid=23183%2E4449941%2ESmXI67)

name: Team Deluzio
subject: does Derek believe we need to raise the minimum wage?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Nearly one in four workers makes less than $17 per hour. The federal minimum wage is still just $7.25 per hour. _Derek, that’s absurd._ **That’s why Chris Deluzio is co-sponsoring the Raise the Wage Act of 2025—to give roughly 22 million Americans a long-overdue raise.** **Sign the Petition:[_**Stand with Chris and become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the Raise the Wage Act →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110778801/555314502/-1601456534?refcode=email_070325_raisethewage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg3YjFjZS0xMTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XUPpZQYe6hfvIL1BTipKa4VHBeQoM5H4unhVl1gfyk0=&emci=91a86178-5e2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5b87b1ce-1158-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)** | | **[Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110778803/555314507/-1601456534?refcode=email_070325_raisethewage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg3YjFjZS0xMTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XUPpZQYe6hfvIL1BTipKa4VHBeQoM5H4unhVl1gfyk0=&emci=91a86178-5e2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5b87b1ce-1158-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)**
---
Derek,
The federal minimum wage was created in 1938 to ensure workers could earn a living wage and allow them to live with dignity.
Since then, it has been raised 22 times, but has remained at $7.25 for the last 16 years— _the longest period in American history without an increase._

$7.25 is way too low, especially as prices keep rising. We need a government that helps build an economy that rewards work, not just wealth. Raising the minimum wage is part of that.

**That’s why Chris Deluzio is co-sponsoring the Raise the Wage Act,** which would finally increase the minimum wage to $17 per hour. This much-needed raise would benefit nearly 22 million Americans—including nearly 68,000 Pennsylvanians—and improve the quality of life for hardworking people.
[_**We want to show that this bill has nationwide support. So Derek, can you add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the Raise the Wage Act and show that PA supporters are demanding Congress raise the minimum wage?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110778806/555314510/-1601456534?refcode=email_070325_raisethewage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg3YjFjZS0xMTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XUPpZQYe6hfvIL1BTipKa4VHBeQoM5H4unhVl1gfyk0=&emci=91a86178-5e2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5b87b1ce-1158-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)

clean_body: | Nearly one in four workers makes less than $17 per hour. The federal minimum wage is still just $7.25 per hour. Derek, that’s absurd. That’s why Chris Deluzio is co-sponsoring the Raise the Wage Act of 2025—to give roughly 22 million Americans a long-overdue raise. Sign the Petition: | | Derek, The federal minimum wage was created in 1938 to ensure workers could earn a living wage and allow them to live with dignity. Since then, it has been raised 22 times, but has remained at $7.25 for the last 16 years— the longest period in American history without an increase. $7.25 is way too low, especially as prices keep rising. We need a government that helps build an economy that rewards work, not just wealth. Raising the minimum wage is part of that. That’s why Chris Deluzio is co-sponsoring the Raise the Wage Act, which would finally increase the minimum wage to $17 per hour. This much-needed raise would benefit nearly 22 million Americans—including nearly 68,000 Pennsylvanians—and improve the quality of life for hardworking people. | ** Thank you, Team Deluzio | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Hi Peter,

In September 2020, Dayton, Ohio, was named “one of the most impoverished cities in America.”

With a claim to fame like that, we think it’s time for some new leadership.

**That is why we are very proud to announce our endorsement of Shenise Turner-Sloss** , who is ready to revitalize her city.

**Here is a look at Shenise’s platform:**

✅ Aggressively removing abandoned housing and redeveloping properties to create sustainable communities
✅ Attracting, regaining, and retaining businesses that have fled the city
✅ Creating and retaining service industry jobs

Shenise’s deep concern for this work was born from her work co-founding the non-profit, “Neighborhoods Over Politics,” which advocates for policies and programs that address social ills and inequities that impact the daily lives of community and neighborhood development. Now, she wants to bring that passion to improve Dayton for everyone.

From Shenise: _“I will always represent and promote a sense of pride and accountability within our neighborhoods by working directly with residents to streamline the ability to acquire property, develop land, and maintain a clean and safe environment.”_

[**We are very proud to support Shenise in her campaign to bring new leadership to this community. Help us support her campaign by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110778895/555314631/-862190968?refcode=EM_F_250703sloss_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzODdiMWNlLTExNTgtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8xrQpe3SGYtzt7tTMtjpZymd4sV2aseCD6lMfT2XbjQ=)

Together,

Erica Henry

From: Katherine Clark <info@fairshotpac.org>
Subject: I’m giving this everything I’ve got
**The GOP’s Big Ugly Bill passed the Senate, and now, it’s headed to the House for another vote.**
Peter — This is the cruelest, most callous bill I’ve seen during my time in Congress.
Here are some highlights:
* It will close hospitals and nursing homes
* It will rip health care away from millions
* It will increase energy & grocery costs
* It will add $3.3 TRILLION to our country’s debt

Bottom line: Republicans are using their power to take food away from families and health care away from sick kids — all so they can give more tax breaks to billionaires.
We’re running out of time as this bill moves through the House, and with a slim Republican majority, it’s going to take everything we’ve got to make sure this bill doesn’t become law.
[**The truth is, winning a Democratic majority in the House next year is the only foolproof way to put a check on Trump and his administration. One of my most popular articles. I republish it every July 4

# [A Fourth of July Salute to the Anglo-Saxons](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=167437527&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NDM3NTI3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE1NTA5OTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NDE0Mjk5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.iA435fz57tC1uAHSI8-lJqqhtKQnPzdh0hcgggrDcDU)
### One of my most popular articles. I republish it every July 4
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Jul 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=167437527&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NDM3NTI3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTU1MDk5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzU0MTQyOTk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.WuWRtExmVS_XPJezinoTwvtkcH-WbRLNWT5erz3dtNs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/a-fourth-of-july-salute-to-the-anglo-1c3?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

##### **

July 4, 2025**
We Americans love to celebrate our diversity. We have Columbus Day, St. Patrick's Day and Martin Luther King Day. Various ethnic groups have parades to honor their culture; and this is fine. But we often forget about the one group to whom we owe our freedom and prosperity - the Anglo-Saxons.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ce60361d-2120-445f-bf6e-f3c61b67ca05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
King Charles III
Tenth century England was a primitive place. It was barely an Iron Age culture, with marauding tribes engaged in internecine struggles among themselves and against the invading Vikings. Illiteracy was the norm. Meanwhile, Japan had established an advanced culture of writing and literature. Thirteenth century China built ships ten times the size of those Columbus used to cross the Atlantic. The Arab world invented algebra, advanced architecture and a body of literature that delights children to this day. Meanwhile, the English survived by subsistence farming, lived in huts and walked around in clothing that was nothing more than a burlap sack. Yet the people from this small island established global hegemony. Why? Because while other cultures lived under Rule of Men, the English developed Rule of Law.
Ever since King John was forced to sign the Magna Carta at Runnymede in 1215, the English people chipped away at privilege and power, enabling all citizens to be equal in the eyes of the Law. The Magna Carta allowed heirs to inherit property without confiscation by the State. It ended the practice of forcing wealthy widows to marry politically connected nobility and merchants. Parliament was eventually established. The much maligned Richard III promulgated the concept of a free press and bail for the accused. [The Petition of Right in 1628](https://substack.com/redirect/a0c25975-4ef5-40c2-ba85-f67393434ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) prohibited excessive taxation and the quartering of soldiers in one's house. It created the concept of habeas corpus - meaning you could not be arrested without being accused of a crime. The English fought for the right to bear arms, worship freely and not have to pay damages for a crime one did not commit. These became known as the Rights of Englishmen and when King George III refused to extend these rights to the American colonies, our forefathers rebelled.
It has become fashionable among our cultural elite to disparage our forefathers as racists, homophobes, misogynists and elitists. But they were great men. The entire planet dreams of living in England or one of its children - whether it be the United States, Canada, Australia or New Zealand. Iran does not have an illegal immigration problem.
So this Fourth of July, permit me to raise a glass of cognac to the man who sailed to Sicily and convinced my grandfather and my great uncles to immigrate to the United States and work in the coal mines of Pennsylvania. My grandfather despised this man, disparaging him with the term "Johnny Bull." He felt he had been deceived as this life-threatening, back breaking work paid poorly. But when my grandfather made money, he got to keep it. And when he built a house for my grandmother, my father and his five siblings; no Mafia thug could take it away from him. And his children became college professors. And his grandchildren became doctors and lawyers. And his great grandchildren went to fine universities and live a life style and have opportunities my grandfather could never have conceived.
So I hope the descendants of this man are as fat and happy as we are; and I hope that at some time in my career, one of his descendants came into my office, shook my hand and thanked me when I handled his eye problem competently.

We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war

| | Peter, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---

**And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. clean_body: We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Peter, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. clean_body: Thousands have signed. But your name is still missing and time is running out. | Peter, We’re disappointed to see your name still isn’t on the letter to Governor Gavin Newsom. While Trump threatens to JAIL Democratic leaders for defending our democracy, you’ve stayed silent. Governor Newsom showed courage. The very least we can do is show we have his back. But right now, your name is still missing. Don’t let Trump’s authoritarian tactics slide, take a stand for our democracy: = | = — Democracy On the Line FWD: \--------------------------- After Trump attacked Governor Newsom over the unrest in Los Angeles, he’s facing a new wave of right-wing rage! Look ↙↙ = So tomorrow at 9am sharp we’re going to send a letter to Governor Newsom to let him know: Democrats across the country have his back. We only have [48] open signature spots left for grassroots Democrats, Peter. = = TO: Gov. Gavin Newsom FROM: A loyal Democrat RE: Democrats stand with you Dear Governor Newsom, Thank you SO much for standing up for our democracy by suing the Trump Administration! Trump is clearly threatened by how you exposed him to his unconstitutional and authoritarian actions. His threat to jail you is not only baseless, it’s a power-grab and another attempt to launch us into a MAGA dictatorship. This marks a terrifying point in our nation’s history. That’s why I’m so grateful to have leaders like you who won’t back down in the face of these anti-democratic threats. = | = **X Peter Willis – Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. body:

body:
| | | Hi there team, I'm Devan, and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC.

It's my job to develop our winning strategy to put Democrats in the _strongest_ position possible to flip the Senate blue. But I can't do that without insights from supporters like you, so one of my top priorities as Executive Director is to build a team of Democrats to inform my advisors.

**They told me that you were in our top ten percent of supporters last year -- so it's clear that I can rely on _you._ That's why I'm asking you to take my new strategy survey:**

[**Please, click here to enter my official Democratic strategy survey >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21862?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20670%2E9716520%2EnGP5XI)

| | [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21862?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20670%2E9716520%2EnGP5XI)
---

With competitive elections all over the map and _even more_ MAGA loyalists up for re-election, we have a golden opportunity here. **We have the chance to unseat far-right Republicans AND replace Trump's worst enablers with strong Democrats who will fight for our rights.**

But in order to lock in our victory, I need to gather critical data immediately from motivated supporters like you. **I'm _100% confident_ your insights will sharpen our strategy.**

[**So please, will you accept the invitation to join my strategy survey before the midnight deadline? I'm waiting to review your responses before I make my next move, so please click here to enter the survey now >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21862?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20670%2E9716520%2EnGP5XI)

| [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21862?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250703-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20670%2E9716520%2EnGP5XI)
---

I'm looking forward to hearing from you. **Together, we'll lead the fight to win back our Senate majority.**

Thank you,

Devan
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

name: Albert
subject: Freedom isn’t free — and neither is accountability
body:
| | | | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cf35a7e207&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| | | Dear Reader:

We don’t do this for clicks. We do it because we believe that the public deserves the truth — especially when others won’t go looking for it.

And that’s where you come in.

As fireworks light up the sky and flags wave across our neighborhoods, we’re reminded that Independence Day isn’t just about history — it’s about values.

You’ve probably heard the old line: “ _Freedom isn’t free._ ” Usually it’s said to honor the service and sacrifice that protects our country. But we think it applies here, too.

**A free press — one that holds government accountable and gives voice to the public — takes time, money, and commitment. It takes a sacrifice by all of us.**

The founders didn’t just declare freedom from a king. They laid the groundwork for a government that’s accountable to the people — transparent, limited, and answerable to citizens, not insiders.

That idea still matters. At Broad + Liberty, we carry that tradition forward — not with muskets and quills, but with records requests, data analysis, and investigative journalism.

That’s why we’re asking you to [make your best tax-deductible donation today](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=195f224f11&e=b7b3eddce2).

This past year, we’ve forced transparency from the Pennsylvania governor’s office, uncovered questionable use of public funds, and asked hard questions about safety, spending, and public integrity in communities across southeastern Pennsylvania.

As the Irish statesman John Philpot Curran once warned, “The condition upon which God hath given liberty to man is eternal vigilance.” In other words, if we stop watching, if we stop paying close attention, we stop being free.

Big media has national advertisers and institutional donors. We rely on people like you — citizens who still believe that sunlight matters, and that independence doesn’t mean much if no one’s watching those in power.

**So this Independence Day, we’re asking: if you believe in the work we’re doing,[will you support it](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3f4a72efe&e=b7b3eddce2)?**
Your donation helps us pursue public records, challenge secrecy, and elevate voices that too often go ignored.

We ask you to join us in making this Fourth of July not just a celebration of liberty, but a recommitment to the _vigilance_ that liberty requires.

If you agree that the media must hold our state establishment to account, and support our fearless journalism, please make your best [tax-deductible donation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e1f6885d7d&e=b7b3eddce2) today.

Thank you, and onwards!

The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
---

And that’s where you come in. As fireworks light up the sky and flags wave across our neighborhoods, we’re reminded that Independence Day isn’t just about history — it’s about values. You’ve probably heard the old line: “ Freedom isn’t free. ” Usually it’s said to honor the service and sacrifice that protects our country. But we think it applies here, too. A free press — one that holds government accountable and gives voice to the public — takes time, money, and commitment. It takes a sacrifice by all of us. The founders didn’t just declare freedom from a king. They laid the groundwork for a government that’s accountable to the people — transparent, limited, and answerable to citizens, not insiders. That idea still matters. At Broad + Liberty, we carry that tradition forward — not with muskets and quills, but with records requests, data analysis, and investigative journalism. That’s why we’re asking you to . This past year, we’ve forced transparency from the Pennsylvania governor’s office, uncovered questionable use of public funds, and asked hard questions about safety, spending, and public integrity in communities across southeastern Pennsylvania. As the Irish statesman John Philpot Curran once warned, “The condition upon which God hath given liberty to man is eternal vigilance.” In other words, if we stop watching, if we stop paying close attention, we stop being free. Big media has national advertisers and institutional donors. We rely on people like you — citizens who still believe that sunlight matters, and that independence doesn’t mean much if no one’s watching those in power. So this Independence Day, we’re asking: if you believe in the work we’re doing,? Your donation helps us pursue public records, challenge secrecy, and elevate voices that too often go ignored. We ask you to join us in making this Fourth of July not just a celebration of liberty, but a recommitment to the vigilance that liberty requires. If you agree that the media must hold our state establishment to account, and support our fearless journalism, please make your best today. Thank you, and onwards! The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. ---
The Salem Fair is back! The Salem Fair is the largest fair in the state and has been recognized as one of the top 100 fairs and expositions in the country. The Salem Fair does not charge the public an admission fee for this event. Entry is free and you instead pay to ride rides, games, food and vendors. Parking is also free. The Salem Fair is located at the Salem Civic Center Complex.

**Summer Discovery Days****-******July 8****
---
This summer, give your kids the chance to step into history as the O. Winston Link Museum explores new ideas and embark on adventures they won’t forget—all while having so much fun they won’t even realize they’re learning! On Tuesday, July 8 is the N&W; Walking Tour of Roanoke’s railroad roots where kids will discover how trains shaped the city we know today.

# NEW EDUCATION LAWS IN EFFECT
---
As of July 1, several new education-related laws have taken effect in Virginia.[. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787632/555332437/1707926909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010)_[HB 196](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787633/555332438/1707926909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010)_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787634/555332439/1707926909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010)[ 1 directs each school board to develop and each public elementary and secondary school to implement cell phone policies for students during school hours](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787635/555332440/1707926909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010). [SB 908](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787636/555332441/-2134949950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010) requires schools to implement policies addressing cyberbullying. [SB 817](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787637/555332442/-1744718762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010) mandates that every public school develop a cardiac emergency response plan to improve student and staff safety. Additionally,[ HB 2774](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787638/555332443/-606715057?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010) requires schools to notify parents if their child is involved in a drug overdose incident on school property within 24 hours.

# RCPS SUMMER MEAL SERVICE
---
Roanoke City Public Schools will offer free summer meals to children ages 18 years or younger through the USDA's Summer Food Service Program (SFSP). Meals are provided on-site on a first-come, first-served basis at school locations. Full times, dates, and locations can be found [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110787641/555332446/801713345?fbclid=IwY2xjawK3pr1leHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETE3UmczVUw4STQzcllhRkx4AR7xTz53HGhPyd349Uni_9Ng3nSSmzO9LZZuK7sQl7uP60z-nD9816wF8HXlnw_aem_0dGCGVohuGizgTqT_dcnSw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRiMGZhZC0xOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHRPSrZQpY0UsOXL-QMAie7TG3Z5d7_vHVHWfyU-Bc0=&emci=18958ab2-4c57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=294b0fad-1958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010).

Contact: youngdemocratsroanoke@gmail.com to get involved! | | | | Legal Aid Society of Roanoke Valley The Legal Aid Society of Roanoke Valley provides a full range of civil legal services to low-income area residents, including issues involving housing, family, employment, consumer debt, and domestic violence. Free legal services are provided to qualified residents of the cities of Roanoke and Salem, along with the counties of Roanoke, Botetourt, Craig, Bedford, and Franklin. Email: info@lasrv.orgPhone: (540) 344-2080 | | Contact Your **Federal Representatives In many ways, it feels like our federal government is under attack by the current administration. While our office is happy to assist however we can, it is still crucial that you engage our federal representatives. Find the contact information for the Virginia Congressional Delegation . | | | | KNOW YOUR RIGHTS WITH ICE There have been recent reports of ICE throughout the state. The ACLU has created a collection of resources in the case you or someone you know interacts with ICE agents. Read and share the resources found . | | Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime. My very best, | | Del. Sam Rasoul | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P.O. Box 13842 Roanoke, VA 24037 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter,
I owe you my sincere thanks. Because of your support, we just crushed our latest end-of-quarter fundraising goal.
This is no small feat, Peter. In a moment when Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are threatening Minnesotans’ health care, food assistance, and other vital services, your support means more than ever.
Your support helps us stand up for the values we all share. Without you, it wouldn’t be possible to push back against those who seek to divide us—or continue building One Minnesota.
We’ve got plenty of work ahead, but I’ve seen what we can accomplish when we stand together. With your help, I know we can keep moving forward.
I'm grateful,

Tim Walz

Hey there — before you log off to celebrate the 4th of July, [**will you chip in a few dollars to support Jocelyn?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250703_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=467%2E181023%2EqV8kZG)

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Grateful for you–for people fighting for America and Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
As we enter July, and the Congress rushes to pass one of if not the most regressive bills in our country’s history, I am reminded how much what you do makes the work of fighting back possible. We will fight back in Congress and try to stop the recklessness and lawlessness in the White House, enabled and encouraged in the current Congress as we have seen this week. What we have also seen this week is that, to be able to do so, we must win the 2026 mid-term elections. And to that end, I want to thank all of you who answered the call to help us raise the funds we need and contributed in the second quarter of this year. I am so grateful to have you on this team. We need you.
A recent opinion piece in the New York Times , “How Awful Is the Republican Megabill? Here Are Four of the Worst Parts,” observes: “break through the deception and misdirection, and Republicans’ signature policy bill, which President Trump and G.O.P. lawmakers call the One Big Beautiful Bill, seems more aptly named Elites Over Working Families.”
And it’s true. This budget bill is awful for our community and for our country. There is so much in this nearly 1,000-page bill, but here are some key things to know:
* The bill will eliminate health care for an estimated 17 million people and will make premiums, deductibles, and copays soar for millions more. It cuts more than $1 trillion from health care, including the largest-ever cut to Medicaid, and will cause a $500 billion cut to Medicare, too. (It also “defunds” Planned Parenthood, cutting off essential, nonjudgmental reproductive health care for more than a million people across the country.)

* The bill contains the largest cut to nutritional assistance ever: an estimated 5 million people will lose food assistance (SNAP/food stamps) and tens of millions of kids will be at risk of losing school breakfast and lunch.

* The bill increases energy costs. Cuts to clean energy investments are estimated to increase the American families’ utility bills by an average of $400 per year. Seniors and low-income Americans will also have an even harder time getting assistance to pay their energy bills. These cuts are also expected to eliminate more than 840,000 jobs in just the next 5 years and an additional 790,000 jobs over the next 10 years.

* The bill adds $4 trillion to the debt, including $700 billion in interest payments on the debt, all for the purpose of making permanent tax cuts for the wealthy and well-connected. Estimates show that people making more than $1 million per year will have an average tax cut of $222 per day while people making $50,000 or less will get an average of 68 cents per day. And once you add in the cuts to health care and programs, people making under $50,000 per year will get less, the middle class will get nothing, and the top 1% will get the biggest benefit of all.
This bill is full of terrible policies. And these are difficult days. But they are not over. We are not done.
We have the opportunity to win back the House majority in 2026, and the obligation to do everything we can to make that happen. This week has made that clear.
We will continue fighting back—in the Congress, in the courts, and in our communities. We will share the contents of the reckless Republican budget—the big, ugly bill that President Trump has demanded—as we work to stop it in every way that we can. We will work to protect the programs it dismantles and the people it hurts.
But we can’t do all these things without you. We are all in this together. And that is why I am so very grateful to you for being in and staying in the fight. Today and every day.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250703?refcode=lpfe250703]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=R3mHg4axWZkczjOTDgzFAaAzga6%2BHbcmEG%2BcRoGZm5xHmdKtBfEdEC2XAHSPtsrPtJxZZJ%2FKcTsuyzl5pOrtp%2BKQHEVTDzo8ey41CIMeoW6z%2F7Dz%2FSsb6VtlcUrJEKxQ0xil2bTZ%2B0JSESLve%2B11G8yBG1bg3Q%2FaCcRF9B1uJ2TaPsvNxpd9155VEuruZvuiH5ndV6Jq61OuMxzKqY45YNMt4%2FwlapCJQCvhZpSaG5Us3msDHN06nO4vDv80w%2FGxO%2BxKaSXzZwqRqkyajGh9TeXyZKvVWAkMlYLD5RJKhuhn9%2BLt1%2Bdx3eiEKsg1FQvhZXIbT4xak7FIYMV1c1jNuL5jfMI6fLGYSz6JkmuuP6TnTkCKjy27R9tUPevhSyktIXLfmOQt6nmx0ROQWHSACih61QXDrhQEqUX5Pi0wLvB3k4XzwL5mAmXaDSBuXX%2Fr www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

The bill contains the largest cut to nutritional assistance ever: an estimated 5 million people will lose food assistance (SNAP/food stamps) and tens of millions of kids will be at risk of losing school breakfast and lunch. The bill increases energy costs. Cuts to clean energy investments are estimated to increase the American families’ utility bills by an average of $400 per year. Seniors and low-income Americans will also have an even harder time getting assistance to pay their energy bills. These cuts are also expected to eliminate more than 840,000 jobs in just the next 5 years and an additional 790,000 jobs over the next 10 years. The bill adds $4 trillion to the debt, including $700 billion in interest payments on the debt, all for the purpose of making permanent tax cuts for the wealthy and well-connected. Estimates show that people making more than $1 million per year will have an average tax cut of $222 per day while people making $50,000 or less will get an average of 68 cents per day. And once you add in the cuts to health care and programs, people making under $50,000 per year will get less, the middle class will get nothing, and the top 1% will get the biggest benefit of all. This bill is full of terrible policies. And these are difficult days. But they are not over. We are not done. We have the opportunity to win back the House majority in 2026, and the obligation to do everything we can to make that happen. This week has made that clear. We will continue fighting back—in the Congress, in the courts, and in our communities. We will share the contents of the reckless Republican budget—the big, ugly bill that President Trump has demanded—as we work to stop it in every way that we can. We will work to protect the programs it dismantles and the people it hurts. But we can’t do all these things without you. We are all in this together. And that is why I am so very grateful to you for being in and staying in the fight. Today and every day. Together, we can do anything, Lizzie Signature [] DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] 3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098 PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

subject: Standing for What’s Right Starts with What We Teach
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bundleoffer-12849152?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
In today’s culture, our kids are being told to question everything — their identity, their history, even the goodness of their country. We believe now more than ever, they need to be reminded of what’s _true._ _What Makes America Special_ is our answer — a message of hope, rooted in faith, freedom, and truth. It’s a beautifully written book that helps children see America for what it truly is: a place of opportunity, courage, and blessings. And with every purchase, you’ll receive a free American flag, a PDF activity book, and a special guide to the Stars and Stripes — tools to help your family stand strong in a culture that often tears down.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump has never put America first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, As we approach another Independence Day and reflect on the values that make our nation great — liberty, justice, and equality — I find myself deeply concerned with the current administration’s vision for our country. Donald Trump has set an arbitrary, self-imposed deadline of July 4th to push through what he calls his "big, beautiful bill." But the truth is, this Big Ugly Bill is devastating to the vast majority of Americans. **It’s a stark illustration of the America Last, Billionaires First approach that has defined Trump's presidency from Day One.** This bill, which Senate Republicans just passed, includes the biggest cut in health care in American history and the largest-ever transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich. In addition to the crushing safety net cuts, Trump’s rampant corruption is yet again directing this bill. During his campaign, Trump reportedly promised oil executives that he would take care of them if they contributed $1 billion to his campaign. After the oil industry donated $500 million to Trump and the GOP last cycle, Trump is indeed taking care of them by eliminating clean energy subsidies that not only are essential to address climate change but have created hundreds of thousands of jobs and more than $400 billion of investment in American energy — most of it in Republican districts! **So he’s not only destroying our environment to pay back the oil industry, he’s also killing American manufacturing and increasing energy prices. ** And while he cuts nearly $2 trillion from health care, food assistance and other vital programs, he is tripling the budget for ICE. Worse yet, this bill gives the masked ICE officers snatching immigrants from their court appearances an average bonus of more than $40,000. We need to ask ourselves, _“Is this truly the future we envision for America? A nation where the wealthy few thrive while countless others struggle? A government where big oil and corporations get subsidies as a corrupt repayment for campaign assistance? A nation where nonviolent, noncriminal immigrants are snatched by secret police who get $40,000 bonuses?"_ **It’s most definitely not the America I want to live in. ** Now is the time to stand for a government that safeguards our rights, our environment, and our democracy. **[If you believe in my work and stand with me in the fight against Trump and Republicans’ billionaire-first agenda, I hope you’ll chip in to support me today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110792464/555341806/534100113?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODU4YTk2MS0xZTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UQA9Az1vQYyNy6aBCbLUr-vnLdyX3RinS41RrK4ywjo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110792467/555341810/534100113?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODU4YTk2MS0xZTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UQA9Az1vQYyNy6aBCbLUr-vnLdyX3RinS41RrK4ywjo=)
