name: Wes Moore
subject: The status quo won’t do
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=267%2E1086043%2E4PGxfz ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=267%2E1086043%2E4PGxfz ]Wes Moore for Governor

This week, Senate Republicans passed the worst budget bill in modern
American history.

This bill takes away health coverage for nearly 200,000 Marylanders.
Hundreds of thousands of Marylanders could have a harder time affording
groceries or keeping the lights on.

My team and I are facing this moment of crisis with courage to protect
Maryland. At a time when
the federal government is attempting to sever ties with its people,
Democratic governors are on the frontlines of defense. So, that’s why I
have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250703-1?refcode=em-20250703-1&refcode2=267_1086043_4PGxfz&akid=267%2E1086043%2E4PGxfz ]Will you chip in $5 to power our mission? We need your
help to continue our mission to reset the status quo and stand up for
Marylanders.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250703-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250703-1&refcode2=267_1086043_4PGxfz&akid=267%2E1086043%2E4PGxfz ]Donate $5 ››

You know, Thurgood Marshall Day was this past week in Maryland. And, as
the famous Supreme Court Justice once said, “democracy cannot flourish
amid fear, liberty cannot own amid hate, justice cannot take root amid
rage and America must hit its work.”

He was dissatisfied with the status quo and traditional solutions to
persistent problems. He knew that the time to analyze the problems was
over. We must take a page from his book.

With so much at stake, we’ve got to activate the fierce urgency of now
that Justice Marshall fought for until the day that he died.

We must start facing our problems with action.

Thank you for standing with us,

Wes

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.wesmoore.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=267%2E1086043%2E4PGxfz

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. | Just kidding: while we do love a beach day (or a High School Musical rewatch), we're still working hard towards a more affordable Virginia. We're super excited that hidden fees legislation went into effect this week, but the work is far from over. Here are a few ways you can get involved, even from your pool floatie!

name: Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden
subject: My mom didn’t raise a quitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and read this email.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
I've never been one to shy away from a fight.
Whether overseas as a Navy SEAL or right here at home defending conservative values in Congress, I have always stood on the front lines, ready to serve, lead, and protect the country I love.
**_Now, I'm in the political fight of my life._**
Cook Political Report labeled my race a toss-up, and the radical Left believes they can buy this seat and flip Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District blue.
**Let me be clear:** that's not going to happen.
_Not on my watch. _
_Not with your help._
Democrats are furious that I've stood with President Trump every step of the way. They're pouring money into my opponent's campaign because I don't play by their rules.
And I REFUSE to quit.
They want to shut me up because I call out Biden's failures, and the Left’s attempt to rewrite our history and redefine gender, family, and morality.
**But I didn't run for office to cozy up to the D.C. elites. I ran to serve the people and protect the country I risked my life for.**
This race will come down to the wire, and every dollar counts.
[I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and pitch in today. Your support could make the difference between victory and defeat.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._w)[SEND HELP NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Rush help now and help me keep this seat red, defend the House, and return power to We the People.
Thank you for your kind support,
Derrick Van Orden U.S. Congressman (WI-03) Navy SEAL (Ret.)| |
---

If you're looking for a fun way to close the summer, look no further!

Virginia Moms for America is inviting you to attend their one-day summit at Regent University in Virginia Beach on Friday, August
1st. Come be encouraged and uplifted by messages of unity, light, and purpose offered by Moms for America’s founder and president,
Kimberly Fletcher, and Lead Cottage Meeting Instructor, Juleen Jackson. Dr. Kelly Kohls, the founder of the National Schoolboard
Leadership Council, will also attend to help concerned parents learn how to get involved with their local schoolboards from
general attendance to running for office.

Moms for America is dedicated to helping moms, future moms, and Grammy Grizzlies of all ages, circumstances, and demographics
learn to address and combat the negative influences infecting our modern culture. Come meet and mingle with like-minded women as
you learn what it is you can do for your Country, State, or County right from your own kitchen table!

Join us for an infusion of inspiration and encouragement!

clean_body: Join Moms for America for a One Day Virginia Summit - Friday, August 1, 2025 If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] If you're looking for a fun way to close the summer, look no further! Virginia Moms for America is inviting you to attend their one-day summit at Regent University in Virginia Beach on Friday, August 1st. Come be encouraged and uplifted by messages of unity, light, and purpose offered by Moms for America’s founder and president, Kimberly Fletcher, and Lead Cottage Meeting Instructor, Juleen Jackson. Dr. Kelly Kohls, the founder of the National Schoolboard Leadership Council, will also attend to help concerned parents learn how to get involved with their local schoolboards from general attendance to running for office. Moms for America is dedicated to helping moms, future moms, and Grammy Grizzlies of all ages, circumstances, and demographics learn to address and combat the negative influences infecting our modern culture. Come meet and mingle with like-minded women as you learn what it is you can do for your Country, State, or County right from your own kitchen table! Join us for an infusion of inspiration and encouragement! [] [] SUMMIT LOCATION [] Regent University Library 1000 Regent University Drive Virginia Beach, VA * Meet Like-Minded Moms Prizes & Treats • Breakfast & Lunch Included Tickets are $65 per person REGISTER TODAY! [] Room Block If you’re looking for a convenient place to stay, look no further than the Founders Inn and Spa! Located right on Regent University’s beautiful campus, this Hilton-run property has a fabulous restaurant, two pools, a fitness center, and some of the best inland views available! Virginia Moms for America has a discounted room block available on a first-come-first-served basis until July 2nd. Rooms sell out fast, so book your stay today! Book Your Room Now! [] [] Take advantage of this opportunity to connect and rejuvenate with your peers, then enjoy the weekend with your family! Virginia Beach is a beautiful hub for various destinations including world-class beaches, Busch Gardens, Colonial Williamsburg, and much more. * We look forward to seeing you there! REGISTER TODAY! [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Team Scalise
subject: Karoline Leavitt makes a DEFIANT STATEMENT all voters must read immediately:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
She struck gold with this one.

President Trump's FEARLESS Press Secretary - Karoline Leavitt - makes a DEFIANT STATEMENT all voters (who still support Trump) must read immediately:[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zip1odudvqdjgepi1pec02403m5nskml48a1j2o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cljmcpr6c1h2bs)"The Democrats are doubling down on craziness and radical policies that are undermining the very fabric of our country. Just look at the Democrat nominee for NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani - he's a Democrat Socialist... Meanwhile, under President Trump's leadership, Republicans are fighting tirelessly for everyday, Middle Class Americans who reelected this President and who are carrying out a revolution of common sense"She struck gold with this one.
Zohran Mamdani is the canary in the coal mine for everything to come if Conservatives back down and allow the Democrat Machine to barge back into power.
Look, we've seen the Democrats' true face since President Trump took office. Since the SECOND he put his hand on the Bible, they threw decency and commonsense out the window to unleash a revolution of their own.
They're hell-bent on taking down Conservatives - and our country with them.

If we surrender power, they'll IMMEDIATELY move to impeach President Trump, shut down the MAGA agenda, ram through the woke agenda, and charge ahead to investigate our President and every single one of his allies.
We can't let that happen.
House Republicans are doing EVERYTHING they can to hold the line but it's time for Conservatives everywhere to help us out and take a stand.
So here's what we're asking:
We're pleading with EVERY SINGLE Conservative reading this email to go on the record right here and right now and confirm their support for the entire MAGA movement. [It's going to take a grassroots army - approximately 1,000,000 strong - to help us hold the line and take on the Democrat Machine.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsbgmok813t8dj0cco1v58u4k76gbjhob35iq7q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cljmcpr6c1h2bs)
Can we rely on you to be one of them?[GO ON THE RECORD >>
](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcgpnmjd864rrs0ouvqt50mgri3upsn84ormsf90_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cljmcpr6c1h2bs)Friend- not only does the Democrat Machine have Congressional Democrats... But they have Hollywood bigwigs, scores of Silicon Valley elites, and powerful lobbyists on speed dial.
Unless we want the country we all know and love to become a socialist paradise, we need your help right here and right now.
[And STEP ONE is confirming whether or not you're on our side.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zinlin7777e4lvui40kt7sf3gmdj7nrsmueamlhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cljmcpr6c1h2bs)
We can't hold the line alone.
- House Republicans(Sent via Team Scalise)[GO ON THE RECORD >>
](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5662291qlkmrksdikn9tdn5ajo7hivmdallsiig_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cljmcpr6c1h2bs)
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk6be7htv2pv4hbhj6of076en32ok8rgtdb1vt28_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cljmcpr6c1h2bs) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!
**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zda6md8v30fntrb1b3mf498kshb3jt0j6qv513f0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cljmcpr6c1h2bs)| | |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec6b2600-bd02-4c97-86ac-59543ec3957d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

This week, The Atlantic launched a hit piece attacking me as a “Christian Nationalist.” They aren’t the first, and they won’t be the last.

In an ironic twist that I’m sure is lost on the author, the article reads like high praise for the effectiveness of our efforts. “Given his rallies and political connections, Feucht is ‘maybe the most effective evangelical figure on the far right,’” said Matthew D. Taylor, a senior Christian scholar at the Institute for Islamic, Christian, and Jewish Studies.

Here’s another excerpt: “After rising to prominence during the early days of the coronavirus pandemic by throwing Christian rock concerts in violation of lockdown orders, Feucht has built a massive audience of devotees. His constant stream of worship events across the country makes Christian nationalism more accessible for the religious masses, as does his prolific social media presence (he has half a million followers between Instagram and X).”

They think pointing out that we violated lockdowns to worship—or that we host a constant stream of worship events—is some kind of attack. But it couldn’t be further from the truth.

Then there’s this: “Under pressure from parents and lawmakers, schools have banned lesson plans and library books related to LGBTQ themes. Feucht is not single-handedly responsible for these wins for Christian nationalists, but his influence is undeniable.”

The media is blind to the desires of the American people. We’ve seen how far a secular government can sink this great nation. But people are waking up, turning their hearts to Jesus, and demanding that their lawmakers legislate based on truth.

So why, after all these years, are they still coming after me? clean_body: | | | | | This week, The Atlantic launched a hit piece attacking me as a “Christian Nationalist.” They aren’t the first, and they won’t be the last. In an ironic twist that I’m sure is lost on the author, the article reads like high praise for the effectiveness of our efforts. “Given his rallies and political connections, Feucht is ‘maybe the most effective evangelical figure on the far right,’” said Matthew D. Taylor, a senior Christian scholar at the Institute for Islamic, Christian, and Jewish Studies. Here’s another excerpt: “After rising to prominence during the early days of the coronavirus pandemic by throwing Christian rock concerts in violation of lockdown orders, Feucht has built a massive audience of devotees. His constant stream of worship events across the country makes Christian nationalism more accessible for the religious masses, as does his prolific social media presence (he has half a million followers between Instagram and X).” They think pointing out that we violated lockdowns to worship—or that we host a constant stream of worship events—is some kind of attack. But it couldn’t be further from the truth. Then there’s this: “Under pressure from parents and lawmakers, schools have banned lesson plans and library books related to LGBTQ themes. Feucht is not single-handedly responsible for these wins for Christian nationalists, but his influence is undeniable.” The media is blind to the desires of the American people. We’ve seen how far a secular government can sink this great nation. But people are waking up, turning their hearts to Jesus, and demanding that their lawmakers legislate based on truth. So why, after all these years, are they still coming after me? P.S. Our new album Worship From the White House releases TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT!! name: Michael Bennet
subject: Team, a huge thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250703_eoqthankyou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250703_eoqthankyou_act]
Friend, it’s Michael.
I know you’ve heard a lot from me and my team in the last week about our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.
I’ll be honest: fundraising is one of my least favorite parts of this job. But in a statewide race like ours, hitting our goals is really important—especially since we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs.
That’s why I wanted to express my deep gratitude for your continued support of our campaign. Thank you to everyone who donated a few dollars before our end-of-quarter deadline.
It will help us lay the groundwork for the months ahead so we can spread our message, connect with as many Coloradans as possible, and succeed in what we know is an important race. From every corner of Colorado, we’re coming together to make a difference.
With deep gratitude,
Michael
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250703_eoqthankyou_act]
https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet [https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet] https://x.com/MichaelBennet [https://x.com/MichaelBennet] https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet [https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet]

clean_body: [] Friend, it’s Michael. I know you’ve heard a lot from me and my team in the last week about our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I’ll be honest: fundraising is one of my least favorite parts of this job. But in a statewide race like ours, hitting our goals is really important—especially since we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs. That’s why I wanted to express my deep gratitude for your continued support of our campaign. Thank you to everyone who donated a few dollars before our end-of-quarter deadline. It will help us lay the groundwork for the months ahead so we can spread our message, connect with as many Coloradans as possible, and succeed in what we know is an important race. From every corner of Colorado, we’re coming together to make a difference. name: BREAKING NEWS [VPP]
subject: Hakeem Jeffries just stunned us all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He’s fighting back against the Big Ugly Bill
| _**BREAKING NEWS:**_
_**The Hill:**_ Jeffries stalls final vote on Trump megabill with marathon floor speech _"People will die. Tens of thousands, perhaps year after year after year, as a result of the Republican assault on the healthcare of the American people...I'm sad. I never thought I would be on the House floor saying this is a crime scene."_

We’re SO grateful he’s standing up to fight this disastrous bill! So we’re launching a MASSIVE thank you letter to Leader Jeffries: | [**10,000 SIGNATURE SPOTS AVAILABLE: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK LEADER JEFFRIES »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91753?t=6&akid=20512%2E878179%2ExWwfPZ)
---
* * *
**TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries**
**FROM: A Grateful Democrat**
**RE: Your Bold Leadership**
Leader Jeffries,

Thank you SO much for taking a stand on the House floor and pointing out exactly who the Big Ugly Bill will hurt – families, elderly folks, and children.

Your brave stand is exposing Republicans for their callousness and disregard for the most vulnerable among us.**

[**That’s why I’m rising to join you in the fight by signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to advance our progressive agenda and elect more Democrats to fight alongside you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91753?t=7&akid=20512%2E878179%2ExWwfPZ)**

name: Becca Balint
subject: Freedom, Equality, and Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110801254/555368434/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTdjNTU1Zi0yYjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3PcINeQYtsvku9BCv-iY3DqySfnQVlLiBjT04_WciE=)
---
Peter, Independence Day is tomorrow, and I’ve been reflecting on what this holiday truly means for us in this moment. It's a celebration of our shared values: **freedom, equality, and democracy.** In Congress, I'm committed to ensuring these values aren't just ideals, but realities for all. Every voice deserves to be heard, and every vote counted. Our democracy is something we must work actively to strengthen and protect, especially now. It’s a centuries long experiment. We’re facing attacks from the Trump administration as they try to take more power and undermine our democratic processes. And it’s up to us to hold the line. Whether it’s advocating for fair voting laws or our constitutional rights, or standing against divisive rhetoric, it is going to take all of us standing up together. We must all commit to a future where our democracy can thrive. A future where voting rights are protected and democratic institutions are strengthened. And a future with absolutely NO kings. **[So I’m asking, Peter, will you sign on to renew your commitment to our democracy this Independence Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110801255/555368435/1950090626?contactdata=jwSt7H9OEmz+UEl5m6UVjHiGXJ9ym2raevLdlhJN8lYOr56Sl1xou45mL5YXCSpRSWegOU53uKC2K/DqxXhsXM/j2H9TP1sftFUqhFWFmlqt0nzk7lQXCqN9ekgH0CofHx8YuvAmHXlJ41lyNQonUp4ZHmK5vvoZ7Zt/fNkz3Yk=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTdjNTU1Zi0yYjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3PcINeQYtsvku9BCv-iY3DqySfnQVlLiBjT04_WciE=&emci=da762356-8a57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=257c555f-2b58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110801256/555368436/1950090626?contactdata=jwSt7H9OEmz+UEl5m6UVjHiGXJ9ym2raevLdlhJN8lYOr56Sl1xou45mL5YXCSpRSWegOU53uKC2K/DqxXhsXM/j2H9TP1sftFUqhFWFmlqt0nzk7lQXCqN9ekgH0CofHx8YuvAmHXlJ41lyNQonUp4ZHmK5vvoZ7Zt/fNkz3Yk=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTdjNTU1Zi0yYjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3PcINeQYtsvku9BCv-iY3DqySfnQVlLiBjT04_WciE=&emci=da762356-8a57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=257c555f-2b58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272)

name: Maggie Goodlander
subject: I’m a hard no on the biggest cuts to healthcare in American history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for Congress
body:
We fought through the night last night as Republicans tried to jam their Big, Brutal Budget Bill through Congress in the dead of night.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110801497/555369350/2145345036?refcode=BLU_EM_GOOD_2025-07-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTMwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NhYzM1ZWUtMmI1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MX8e4XR_-AND7vL-BOV0toE-RI2oGKhXjtt-h5rndGQ=)

| Peter,

We fought through the night last night as Republicans tried to jam their Big, Brutal Budget Bill through Congress in the dead of night. The GOP’s budget bill will skyrocket our national debt to pay for trillions of dollars in tax giveaways to billionaires and big corporations who don’t need them. Millions of Americans are at risk of losing their healthcare, including right here in New Hampshire. Under this bill, everyone’s costs will go up.

This bill is bad for the people of New Hampshire. That’s why I’m a hard no. And that’s why I’m never giving up in the fight to lower your costs and protect what is yours.

But I can’t do it alone.

[_**If you’re with us in this fight, will you join our people-powered campaign and chip in today to help protect healthcare for millions of Americans?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110801500/555369353/2145345036?refcode=BLU_EM_GOOD_2025-07-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTMwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NhYzM1ZWUtMmI1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MX8e4XR_-AND7vL-BOV0toE-RI2oGKhXjtt-h5rndGQ=)

clean_body: We fought through the night last night as Republicans tried to jam their Big, Brutal Budget Bill through Congress in the dead of night. | = | Peter, We fought through the night last night as Republicans tried to jam their Big, Brutal Budget Bill through Congress in the dead of night. The GOP’s budget bill will skyrocket our national debt to pay for trillions of dollars in tax giveaways to billionaires and big corporations who don’t need them. Millions of Americans are at risk of losing their healthcare, including right here in New Hampshire. Under this bill, everyone’s costs will go up. This bill is bad for the people of New Hampshire. That’s why I’m a hard no. And that’s why I’m never giving up in the fight to lower your costs and protect what is yours. But I can’t do it alone. = | = | = | = | = | = Onward, Maggie = * | | = Paid for by Maggie for Congress Maggie for Congress 131 Daniel Webster Hwy #949 Nashua, NH 03060 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

Peter — Earlier this week, Senate Republicans passed their “Big, Beautiful Bill”. This bill is nothing more than another GOP tax scam dressed up in MAGA buzzwords. It hands out **more billionaire tax breaks, slashes Medicaid and food assistance, and shovels $46 billion into building more border wall. It even bans federal Medicaid funds from being used for abortion care.** And if that’s not enough, it **adds $3.3 trillion** to the national debt. Even some of his own Republican allies called it _immoral._ Here’s the truth: this bill is a blueprint for Trump’s authoritarian vision — one where billionaires thrive and democracy takes a backseat to raw power. That’s why it’s never been more urgent for Democrats to regain the House majority. clean_body: It’s a billionaire tax scam. | Peter — Earlier this week, Senate Republicans passed their “Big, Beautiful Bill”. This bill is nothing more than another GOP tax scam dressed up in MAGA buzzwords. It hands out more billionaire tax breaks, slashes Medicaid and food assistance, and shovels $46 billion into building more border wall. It even bans federal Medicaid funds from being used for abortion care. And if that’s not enough, it adds $3.3 trillion to the national debt. Even some of his own Republican allies called it immoral. Here’s the truth: this bill is a blueprint for Trump’s authoritarian vision — one where billionaires thrive and democracy takes a backseat to raw power. That’s why it’s never been more urgent for Democrats to regain the House majority. We’re working around the clock to flip the House in 2026, but that takes serious resources — and we need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Onward, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you! Peter, it's Charlie. The House is expected to vote on Trump’s “big, beautiful” (read: really ugly) bill today, and it’s set to be one of the most destructive pieces of legislation in history. It guts SNAP, the Child Tax Credit, and makes deep cuts to Medicaid — **risking health coverage for up to _800,000_ Georgians.** Leading the assault on Georgia’s families? Buddy Carter. Yes, that Buddy Carter. The self-proclaimed “MAGA warrior” who cheered on Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs and called the hellscape we’ve been living in for the last six months a "**GOLDEN AGE**." And now? He wants a promotion to the U.S. Senate. He’s auditioning for Trump, pledging loyalty to a billionaire who’s only ever looked out for himself — and dragging Georgia families down in the process. Let’s be clear: Buddy Carter isn’t standing up for the Georgians who elected him. Carter and his MAGA allies are about to hand Trump a blank check to destroy Georgia families with higher prices and lost jobs and slash critical programs like SNAP, Medicaid, and the Child Tax Credit. All to line the pockets of Trump and his billionaire buddies. This isn’t policy. **This is a power grab — and Georgia families are being forced to pay the price.** [We need to close our $25,000 budget gap before midnight to keep Georgia’s Senate seat blue, flip the Senate, and bring Trump’s agenda to a screeching halt. clean_body: The House is expected to vote on Trump’s “big, beautiful” (read: really ugly) bill today If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it's Charlie. The House is expected to vote on Trump’s “big, beautiful” (read: really ugly) bill today, and it’s set to be one of the most destructive pieces of legislation in history. It guts SNAP, the Child Tax Credit, and makes deep cuts to Medicaid — risking health coverage for up to 800,000 Georgians. Leading the assault on Georgia’s families? Buddy Carter. Yes, that Buddy Carter. The self-proclaimed “MAGA warrior” who cheered on Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs and called the hellscape we’ve been living in for the last six months a "GOLDEN AGE." And now? He wants a promotion to the U.S. Senate. He’s auditioning for Trump, pledging loyalty to a billionaire who’s only ever looked out for himself — and dragging Georgia families down in the process. Let’s be clear: Buddy Carter isn’t standing up for the Georgians who elected him. Carter and his MAGA allies are about to hand Trump a blank check to destroy Georgia families with higher prices and lost jobs and slash critical programs like SNAP, Medicaid, and the Child Tax Credit. All to line the pockets of Trump and his billionaire buddies. This isn’t policy. body:

President Trump is truly the _“Man In The Arena”_. He has _**bled** _for our country. He has withstood the _**arrows and attacks**_. _All while being targeted by a dishonest media_. ** ** Let’s deliver him a _**groundswell**_ of support. He is the only leader trying to _bring peace to the world_ and _prosperity to America_. **P.P.S. Will you rush over your signed MAN IN THE ARENA survey in the next 24 hours? Fight, fight, fight!**

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: We have to start making spending decisions soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39863%2E3422442%2EF4zSfA)
Dear Derek,
We know it feels like the 2026 election is far away, but the truth is that campaigns like ours are going to have to start making spending decisions sooner than you think.
Around the start of the new year is when we’ll start making choices about how much to actually spend in different buckets, like TV ads versus digital ads. **That’s less than six months away!**
If we don’t raise enough, we may have to make tough cuts and scale back some of our voter contact efforts. On the other hand, if we keep hitting our targets—or we even beat expectations—we have the ability to get the best deals on TV ad time and we can even increase our pace of communications.
Nobody wins a campaign by themselves. Every time we’ve asked Porter Supporters to chip in, you’ve always stepped up. That’s the strength of this movement, and we’re so grateful to be in this fight with each and every one of you.
**[If you can, will you consider donating $5 to our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250703_1_ak?refcode=em20250703-39863&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39863_3422442_F4zSfA&akid=39863%2E3422442%2EF4zSfA)**

—Team KP26

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250703-39863&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39863_3422442_F4zSfA&akid=39863%2E3422442%2EF4zSfA)**

FFPC #1479597
clean_body: Dear Derek, We know it feels like the 2026 election is far away, but the truth is that campaigns like ours are going to have to start making spending decisions sooner than you think. Around the start of the new year is when we’ll start making choices about how much to actually spend in different buckets, like TV ads versus digital ads. That’s less than six months away! If we don’t raise enough, we may have to make tough cuts and scale back some of our voter contact efforts. On the other hand, if we keep hitting our targets—or we even beat expectations—we have the ability to get the best deals on TV ad time and we can even increase our pace of communications. Nobody wins a campaign by themselves. Every time we’ve asked Porter Supporters to chip in, you’ve always stepped up. That’s the strength of this movement, and we’re so grateful to be in this fight with each and every one of you. —Team KP26 Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

Peter, There are folks in Washington, and even some in the media, who say I’m just talking about fixing the debt crisis... Let me be crystal clear:
* I’ve introduced balanced budget amendments.
* I’ve put forward plans to cut $500 billion from the budget.
* I’ve forced votes on reading the bills, exposing the waste, and opposing blank checks to bureaucrats.

That may not make headlines. But it does make enemies in the Swamp. **_[This is why I need your help before the Q2 fundraising deadline.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6c9c48b98ce541ed904d221aff54e0b4&_e=dPzLOtZLhWCFOIuguAMFbMvqR9McFiivKLAncEPpBKflwW3Z3aWxCioqD1Ra6jUf2ExfnelwlpmV68N5y_BDBXKk5rwCuqckS1GXBcwOENzjaFzrdP7bhE0T1nS_f6VV9oKB2B4CtTo7rdZcTYnN5Rb2pf4d8Mp2du2WwpF95hnFUzFZRxp7F_ZBiwNEw0mujWr_megkRj97wi5uBPguNKpdfYFVcnoC30Gxp7m0LJ24x158-aS5bttYhqINDUzwdi0i7L7bQxnqEbWLAR81TyR-ze6Bc6hN4VjL-kxv-fLfgQUNm0yhf_JD2uDY4HjPqMNtcwWEvUBw0UXFT7_NJEFc_APufqJCccrRvvsBBSP5Z4z5J1f01sjelGwH0s20hT6NVNcbJBvKENEDBjyY1Tt447xZZBecUs8HzcKlFnb43cinBfkX_3hczZ3Thr-dPngFIoBJGVRNxfsfp3Oo_92_lBP3ELj_NrLLiVQ7XF5u9Ok71zVTAEI6O5VjiViOdqrPopbqvi2f7to_QD_9N5XbJvlHl-1RuF6doUdmCd8Z1VKTTMwivgQYCvLxHdF5dBfK4YaPjEPAtREJy5LLVjfIkGmWfbT1t95gJ4d1fIRqQrKTFuAx1vL4MZEw8IculTS7y2pPuqo3_qddeI1obSNlAbB8S89WbSrSrHTjQ6BT1CgntxCOQyojJvFnKNbT)_** This is why I need your help before the Q2 fundraising deadline. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: LEAKED: Mamdani ADMITS his end goal is to “seize the means of production"
body:
This is truly the final battle for New York.
| **_AN EMERGENCY MEMO FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
New York is in grave danger.
---
In a leaked video, Zohran Mamdani – _who was just confirmed as the Democrat nominee for mayor of America’s largest city_ – admitted he’s a devout communist whose end goal is to **“seize the means of production”** despite a lack of public support.
---
In his own words:
---
**"But then there are also other issues that we firmly believe in, whether it's BDS or whether it is _the end goal of seizing the means of production_ , where we do not have the same level of support at this very moment."**
---
Communists like Mamdani know they’ll never truly have the support of the American people, which is why they resort to deception, tyranny, and abuses of power to achieve their radical goals.
---
His ideology has killed _HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS_ of innocent people all over the globe!
---
**Make no mistake: The principles that we hold dear as freedom-loving Americans – liberty, justice, capitalism, and the rule of law – are about to come under unprecedented assault.**
---
Last year, President Trump boldly declared that 2024 was the “Final Battle” to SAVE America.
---
If we didn’t win back White House, our __free__ Republic would have ceased to exist.
---
**Now, as New York Democrats’ fully embrace Zohran Mamdani, it’s become abundantly clear that the 2026 elections are the FINAL BATTLE to _SAVE_ New York. **
---
**This is our LAST CHANCE to _FIRE_ Kathy Hochul and stop Marxism, antisemitism, jihadism, and the tyrannical, extremist policy agendas they entail from completely taking over our state. **
---
_This is bigger than just New York. If we fall to communism, it will only be a matter of time before the whole of America comes under threat._
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help SAVE New York before our FIRST state-level reporting deadline on July 11th – _and for the next 60 minutes, I’ll ensure it goes FIVE TIMES AS FAR._**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bff045a2bb9f4df29d740548b7c256e5&_e=P4hNMWgM5rZg73PWaAobg-CEe1nimKt4pqXBdCbe4G0S7LX6VQz77zmFJUPHjMCmtqzrDtD4cDC3GqrNY7JmcjnGu-GkXRq1x7F1EZWWp-J5zbzF0L6fRBV3-oEjETaQm0f6ElpjB_OQ4IXYuzZSelsrxYCf4DXK-rNsA2L3OUFkRHDv6iubvXXMVmeH4Af5JdzvibFs8gVc2xvXL26tUr2V83okP4x2jTswE9h9wSuHs_HWlNJBs6H4oQYmN_UlrZRx-PD2qZdJDV3JKkgyKNH7jyD3OR_w-RP8WWqvsZ0LyRBkzV0kDfbXuRCahtv4J2NHblstNL5j7i-Zig_oIvyHBBEjAAvpoVEWTZxXYtuTcUXRepL1Sg9pJllHDE1DfxZTzIN1yuaMeMYpJpFirTphrnQl8XxiXjIvWvqrbjKyy_JSTILibA7XVMp3hRlhDudtdIB9PyLPhs7L57mPKzjzqltYArvInkiEgOto9uUp9oM_EX4fAOrrMbLcN9jMewSGUszaCg6BIE6Oj7nLxFvVD8_wR635ONxwndl2F8xmHj-GfsWfHsKPdMVNDMQh5ZYiCYP7o8UnI8J5bAN6qOjvcpF6Nbh_xhn2wxMyzq0dNVYKRyX_XHtr_lxMab2H)

clean_body: This is truly the final battle for New York. | AN EMERGENCY MEMO FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK Friend, New York is in grave danger. In a leaked video, Zohran Mamdani – who was just confirmed as the Democrat nominee for mayor of America’s largest city – admitted he’s a devout communist whose end goal is to “seize the means of production” despite a lack of public support. In his own words: "But then there are also other issues that we firmly believe in, whether it's BDS or whether it is the end goal of seizing the means of production , where we do not have the same level of support at this very moment." Communists like Mamdani know they’ll never truly have the support of the American people, which is why they resort to deception, tyranny, and abuses of power to achieve their radical goals. His ideology has killed HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS of innocent people all over the globe! Make no mistake: The principles that we hold dear as freedom-loving Americans – liberty, justice, capitalism, and the rule of law – are about to come under unprecedented assault. Last year, President Trump boldly declared that 2024 was the “Final Battle” to SAVE America. If we didn’t win back White House, our free Republic would have ceased to exist. Now, as New York Democrats’ fully embrace Zohran Mamdani, it’s become abundantly clear that the 2026 elections are the FINAL BATTLE to SAVE New York. This is our LAST CHANCE to FIRE Kathy Hochul and stop Marxism, antisemitism, jihadism, and the tyrannical, extremist policy agendas they entail from completely taking over our state. This is bigger than just New York. If we fall to communism, it will only be a matter of time before the whole of America comes under threat. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise New York Victory, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Save New York, Elise for Congress, E-PAC, and NY Republican Federal Campaign Committee. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/3/2025 🇺🇸
body:
Final Mountain Minute before the 4th: Gun chaos, water fights & a win for women’s sports
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Just a quick heads-up: this will be our last Mountain Minute of the week as we head into the Fourth of July holiday! Independence Day is more than fireworks—it’s a reminder that liberty is worth fighting for. Let’s honor that legacy with joy, gratitude, and a whole lot of red, white, and blue! ❤️🤍💙
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado’s new [concealed carry law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is drawing fire from sheriffs and instructors who say it’s confusing, rushed, and burdensome. Also as of July 1, all firearm store employees must undergo fingerprinting—small businesses say it’s [regulatory overkill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). A $99M deal led by the Western Slope to secure Shoshone water rights—seen by local leaders as critical to [preserving historic river flows](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and long-term water security—has sparked debate over future Colorado River access, prompting questions from Front Range utilities ahead of a key fall hearing.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Stanford has [halted pediatric gender surgeries](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) amid legal and federal pressure, while UPenn will [restore women’s swimming records](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after a Title IX probe. Meanwhile, the EPA is ending [long-term animal testing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), following a Trump-era directive to modernize research.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Jeff Hunt urges Americans to [celebrate the Fourth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with gratitude and faith in our founding values. C .J. Garbo unpacks Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”—a sweeping plan to [redefine the role of government](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Together, the columns offer a bold call for reflection and renewal.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, July 3, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Garbo: The ‘One Big Beautiful Bill’ is an all-or-nothing bet on reshaping America](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
The “One Big Beautiful Bill Act,” introduced in the House as HR 1, represents one of the most sweeping legislative proposals in recent political history. Spanning hundreds of pages and touching nearly every corner of federal governance, it combines tax reform, healthcare restructuring, social policy shifts, and regulatory rollback into a single omnibus package.
This article provides a nonpartisan, objective analysis of the bill’s major provisions and potential consequences. The intent is not to promote or condemn HR 1, but to inform readers – citizens, policymakers, and professionals – about its complex and far-reaching components.
HR 1 aims to reshape the federal government’s fiscal, regulatory, and social policy framework. The bill’s authors argue it will increase economic freedom, restore federalism, and reduce dependency on government. Opponents warn it may strip critical protections, expand federal overreach, and destabilize programs millions rely upon.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Hunt: Take pride in America this Fourth—and give thanks to God](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [JEFF HUNT, SUBSTACK](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Jeff Hunt urges Americans to take pride in their country this Fourth of July, emphasizing that America is not an accident of history but a divine blessing founded on biblical values and God-given rights.
* He warns against the secular left's efforts to shame patriotism and rewrite history, calling instead for a renewed commitment to truth, liberty, and personal responsibility.
* Hunt encourages families to celebrate the holiday by honoring the nation’s founding, praying together, reading the Declaration of Independence, and giving thanks to God for America’s enduring greatness.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Instructors, sheriffs warn: New concealed carry law causes confusion, long lines statewide](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* New concealed carry requirements under HB24-1174 now mandate eight hours of in-person training, live fire practice, and coverage of all firearm laws from the past five years—overwhelming both instructors and applicants.
* Sheriff's offices like Weld County's saw a surge in permit requests before the law took effect, with June processing over double the usual monthly applications.
* Instructors warn that cramming topics like de-escalation and complex legal updates into a single course is unrealistic and may compromise effective firearm safety education.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[A deadline without a plan”: how rural Colorado is building the energy future the state won’t](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | JULY 1** _In May 2023, Gov. Jared Polis signed HB 23‐1247, directing the Colorado Energy Office to study advanced energy solutions — from nuclear and geothermal to long-duration storage — in regions facing coal-plant closures like Craig Station. The law included $50,000 from the Just Transition Fund and federal support to study firm energy options in northwest Colorado._
__
**[Pastor Bob: Careful, Major—you serve at the pleasure of the President](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY REV. ROBERT BABCOX | COMMENTARY | JULY 1** _In a recent op-ed in the New York Times, a U.S. Army Major vehemently disagreed with President Trump’s order to remove transgender individuals from military service. He noted that as an evangelical conservative Christian, most wouldn’t expect him to disagree with the order. He’s right—evangelical conservative Christians would never support something so far left._
__
**[Armagost to Step Down: What His Departure Means for House District 64](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF | STATE | JUNE 30** _In a move that marks the end of an era for one of the most outspoken conservatives in the Colorado legislature, House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost announced Monday that he will officially resign his seat in House District 64, effective September 1._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** Every Fourth of July, Americans eat an estimated **150 million hot dogs** and spend millions on dazzling fireworks displays—but did you know the **largest firework ever** launched came from Steamboat Springs, Colorado? It weighed a whopping 2,797 pounds and lit up the sky in record-breaking fashion.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “America. It is the only place where miracles not only happen, but where they happen all the time.” – Thomas Wolfe

Hunt encourages families to celebrate the holiday by honoring the nation’s founding, praying together, reading the Declaration of Independence, and giving thanks to God for America’s enduring greatness. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | New concealed carry requirements under HB24-1174 now mandate eight hours of in-person training, live fire practice, and coverage of all firearm laws from the past five years—overwhelming both instructors and applicants. Sheriff's offices like Weld County's saw a surge in permit requests before the law took effect, with June processing over double the usual monthly applications. Instructors warn that cramming topics like de-escalation and complex legal updates into a single course is unrealistic and may compromise effective firearm safety education. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ JEN SCHUMANN| STATE | JULY 1 In May 2023, Gov. Jared Polis signed HB 23‐1247, directing the Colorado Energy Office to study advanced energy solutions — from nuclear and geothermal to long-duration storage — in regions facing coal-plant closures like Craig Station. The law included $50,000 from the Just Transition Fund and federal support to study firm energy options in northwest Colorado. REV. ROBERT BABCOX | COMMENTARY | JULY 1 In a recent op-ed in the New York Times, a U.S. Army Major vehemently disagreed with President Trump’s order to remove transgender individuals from military service. He noted that as an evangelical conservative Christian, most wouldn’t expect him to disagree with the order. He’s right—evangelical conservative Christians would never support something so far left. RMV STAFF | STATE | JUNE 30 In a move that marks the end of an era for one of the most outspoken conservatives in the Colorado legislature, House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost announced Monday that he will officially resign his seat in House District 64, effective September 1. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW? Every Fourth of July, Americans eat an estimated 150 million hot dogs and spend millions on dazzling fireworks displays—but did you know the largest firework ever launched came from Steamboat Springs, Colorado? It weighed a whopping 2,797 pounds and lit up the sky in record-breaking fashion. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY “America. It is the only place where miracles not only happen, but where they happen all the time.” – Thomas Wolfe | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

body:
This is why I stayed in Congress.

| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.stefanik-emails.com/unsubscribe?e=3728ad8c6f8ddbe0dac3adde2aa5e2bd&utm_source=hdteamelise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_83b1f898838899ffcba3bacab08&n=1).
---
| | **_A LETTER FROM THE DESK OF THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR, REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Peter,
---
I just cast the tie-breaking vote to pass the President’s “Big Beautiful Bill.”
---
**__That__ is exactly why I made the difficult decision to withdraw my nomination to become U.N. Ambassador so I could remain in Congress.**
---
_Without my deciding vote, the President’s agenda may have never passed!_
---
This vote alone makes my sacrifice worth it.
---
As I’ve said before, “America first” is not just a slogan – it’s an _oath_ of leadership to the American people.
---
Ensuring the President’s America First agenda is enacted into law is simply much more important than my own political career.
---
Peter, when I say _America_ FIRST, I mean it!
---
_But all of that being said, the fact that passing the President’s agenda came down to my tie-breaking vote shows just how critical it is for Republicans to PROTECT and EXPAND our House GOP Majority in the midterms._
---
If the Democrats held just **__ONE_ _MORE__** House seat, this vote would have failed.
---
**That is why I’ve unlocked a MAXIMUM 1500% MATCH for the next hour to help us follow up the passage of the President's “Big Beautiful Bill” with our biggest grassroots fundraising surge of the entire year!**
---

name: Beth Van Duyne
subject: I authorized this myself. We NEED to make up ground.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Amanda Collins Johnson did everything right that night – but the results were terribly wrong. She parked in a well-lit garage, walked with a group of classmates, and followed campus policy, leaving her legally owned firearm at home.
---
| | But none of that stopped a man who was hiding behind her car, waiting with a gun in a gun-free zone. _What happened next is every woman’s worst nightmare._ **At our 2024 College Women’s Summit in Nashville, Amanda shared her harrowing story of surviving an assault on her college campus – a place where women should feel safe.**
---
| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1zqjwcRz9N3MUhLwRZsNDy2PFpx1pvvX3ZMCH5p9AhBEOQ2k9_B8e6yeKXkzmZI23X1OacoWSFKK1q3SNKEVsiSo_vo_XDl324x87uHT6KrY2nW3p3RU_0BrdKfpNVeJe7w65_g59Nsn9-PZEbHs4d3OCrdA5W1s20JvlMZ8zoiM8gI0lMYsEYFbMqUyYhoDmjxiyI4FpTzSUpTQpMpZySWZ3RiMZREjGSUMLFnMWqTE0sNEgOTESIRxfPXFrwtZKkD6P03jk7V87OmqwKoesvH1sjuu5BDR7msgXtwkQgulaN9IBL50IFuBkUYAVtAI-N81i5tgd_kqE-AR6dhRbRtdBRuZAEMCnLCHMqUlzKVGKAiMfJQpbcsMnH1kOwRe8GrwCxvOqLaxMx7RZ0PVjE8t-xqHpoFWJ5R5fbY_jBi-3Th8qFyB-KJ7N-tOPOpl4f3gZbm2_89nTeLI3b2rN4zT8Ou8eExsJv-MvzF8vT3B8Wx83S6e6qU9J2sv5sEct_mxar_L64Wz0Wy7v_i_1_f4s_L8s9no7rmwDeXvhFyorRk5nPdDfWTVP3IkE8-rykn0KfMvovAAD__2Acwco)
---
| | But because it was a gun-free zone, she was prohibited from carrying her legally permitted firearm, leaving her without the means to defend herself when it mattered most. Now, Amanda speaks out – so other women aren’t left defenseless like she was. She’s urging women to use their voices to fight for their Second Amendment rights and for policies that recognize every woman’s right to defend herself and her family. As Amanda puts it, women are too often first in line when facing danger. That’s why they must be prepared to defend themselves and the people they love. And at the **Luce Center** , we equip young women with the courage and skills they need to stand up for their Second Amendment rights. Through our _Day at the Range_ program, young women receive life-saving professional firearms training at ranges across the country. This program teaches essential self-defense skills while encouraging women to advocate for the rights that protect their freedom. But our _Day at the Range_ program wouldn’t be possible without the generous support of freedom-loving Americans like you. [**Will you help us equip the next generation of American women with the confidence and skills necessary to defend themselves and their rights by making a tax-deductible gift today?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1zqjwcRz9N3MUhLwRZsNDy2PFpx1pvvX3ZMCH5p9AhBEOQ2k9_B8e6yeKXkzmZI23X1OacoWSFKK1q3SNKEVsiSo_vo_XDl324x87uHT6KrY2nW3p3RU_0BrdKfpNVeJe7w65_g59Nsn9-PZEbHs4d3OCrdA5W1s20JvlMZ8zoiM8gI0lMYsEYFbMqUyYhoDmjxiyI4FpTzSUpTQpMpZySWZ3RiMZREjGSUMLFnMWqTE0sNEgOTESIRxfPXFrwtZKkD6P03jk7V87OmqwKoesvH1sjuu5BDR7msgXtwkQgulaN9IBL50IFuBkUYAVtAI-N81i5tgd_kqE-AR6dhRbRtdBRuZAEMCnLCHMqUlzKVGKAiMfJQpbcsMnH1kOwRe8GrwCxvOqLaxMx7RZ0PVjE8t-xqHpoFWJ5R5fbY_jBi-3Th8qFyB-KJ7N-tOPOpl4f3gZbm2_89nTeLI3b2rN4zT8Ou8eExsJv-MvzF8vT3B8Wx83S6e6qU9J2sv5sEct_mxar_L64Wz0Wy7v_i_1_f4s_L8s9no7rmwDeXvhFyorRk5nPdDfWTVP3IkE8-rykn0KfMvovAAD__2Acwco) And here’s what your gift can do:
---
* Gifts of $100 provide the **essential training resources** needed for a single event!
* Gifts of $250 will **sponsor one young woman** to receive expert instruction and hands-on experience at the range!
* Gifts of $500 cover **ammunition****and gear** for a single event!
* Gifts of $2,500 underwrites **a complete Day at the Range** for a group of 10-12 young women!

---
But every gift, no matter how big or small, can mean the difference between a young woman being **peaceful versus defenseless**. Amanda’s story is a powerful reminder that every woman deserves both the right – and the ability – to protect herself. That right must never be taken for granted. Thank you for standing with the young women of America and our Second Amendment Right. In Friendship and Freedom,
---
**Kimberly Begg** **President, Luce Center**
---
| | P.S. We can only share the stories of courageous women like Amanda because of generous supporters like you. If you believe in giving women the ability to protect themselves and their families, [**please consider making a tax-deductible donation today.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1zqjwcRz9N3MUhLwRZsNDy2PFpx1pvvX3ZMCH5p9AhBEOQ2k9_B8e6yeKXkzmZI23X1OacoWSFKK1q3SNKEVsiSo_vo_XDl324x87uHT6KrY2nW3p3RU_0BrdKfpNVeJe7w65_g59Nsn9-PZEbHs4d3OCrdA5W1s20JvlMZ8zoiM8gI0lMYsEYFbMqUyYhoDmjxiyI4FpTzSUpTQpMpZySWZ3RiMZREjGSUMLFnMWqTE0sNEgOTESIRxfPXFrwtZKkD6P03jk7V87OmqwKoesvH1sjuu5BDR7msgXtwkQgulaN9IBL50IFuBkUYAVtAI-N81i5tgd_kqE-AR6dhRbRtdBRuZAEMCnLCHMqUlzKVGKAiMfJQpbcsMnH1kOwRe8GrwCxvOqLaxMx7RZ0PVjE8t-xqHpoFWJ5R5fbY_jBi-3Th8qFyB-KJ7N-tOPOpl4f3gZbm2_89nTeLI3b2rN4zT8Ou8eExsJv-MvzF8vT3B8Wx83S6e6qU9J2sv5sEct_mxar_L64Wz0Wy7v_i_1_f4s_L8s9no7rmwDeXvhFyorRk5nPdDfWTVP3IkE8-rykn0KfMvovAAD__2Acwco) Thank you for your support!

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Republicans just chose billionaires over families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4854%2E35263%2Epr8hV7)
Peter, Senate Republicans are going full steam ahead on Trump’s big, ugly bill, effectively choosing the interests of billionaires and big corporations over the well-being of American families. **This is a critical moment for all of us.** Their dangerous bill aims to dismantle essential health care and food assistance programs, impacting millions across the country just to hand out tax breaks to the wealthiest among us. This isn't politics as usual, Peter — _it's a direct threat to families who depend on these lifelines daily._ Throughout my career, I've fought tirelessly for affordable health care and support systems that protect our most vulnerable. Whether it's lowering prescription drug costs or safeguarding coverage for pre-existing conditions, I know how crucial these protections are. **But now, the GOP wants to strip them away, leaving tens of millions of Americans to fend for themselves.****_We must take a stand._** **[Join me in opposing the GOP's harmful bill by signing our petition today. Every signature sends a clear message: we're ready to fight for our families and our future.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/gop-budget-2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4854%2E35263%2Epr8hV7)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/gop-budget-2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4854%2E35263%2Epr8hV7)
---
Wisconsinites and a majority of people across the country have said loud and clear that they don’t want their health care and food assistance taken away.
By **[signing on today**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/gop-budget-2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4854%2E35263%2Epr8hV7), you’re helping us show the GOP that everyday people are ready to stand up for working families, stand up for health care, and stand up for a country that works for all of us.
Thanks for taking action,
Tammy

name: Caroline
subject: The big, ugly reality of Trump’s budget bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=3ocu5WRkQ15EILVi2b0IIpkbL96188B4CbFV%2FxFAkAnuT0%2BXY6T6A730QYENhFJwojyNSVMgSM7G5DGw0X%2FZvZ%2FHxv%2B0JGRtXttqFYKKKLGKlnv6STR1Q5DBUcbFko0KyctpULLBloXMJOcn4pjwhmtzPXMIs3vFtf5VrIoLanv3liJDdqQOzlvfBtiS2R%2FtOnwXcAtffWczkk2tkTvAo%2BqynesvM7wD%2BMf%2BP6%2FK2IaVD%2Fu1STre1siqcsMeuGhB7CcgenQhXtbCKqbSHynWljlL7DE8ycROMYD5H7wMVgT3Lpi439FPbt3ZTWa%2FYwo7LIycZAmGwhwKqUx8cJAhPWHOExTw6lITUbvNlr4MRhlx%2BPrVilCrotkcXAbfEpeul9lm0IQwFGnopXqX8hA6bM5uUVeKl6TsIbGBM%2F69PZsQSIuaMuyeUoFKieyH5okT)

Hi, it's Caroline, Dr. Ruiz's Finance Director. I'm reaching out because Dr. Ruiz is busy fighting back against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda at the Capitol. The House is expected to vote on the Big Ugly Bill today after it passed the Senate, and House Democrats are doing everything in their power to hold the line. Here’s the reality of what’s to come if Trump’s Big Ugly Bill becomes law:
* $1 trillion in cuts to Medicaid will cause hospitals to close and millions to lose their healthcare coverage.
* Countless children and families will go hungry with the most significant cuts to SNAP in history.
* And billionaires like Donald Trump and his friends will get richer at the expense of everyday Americans.

We can’t let MAGA extremism destroy the lives of working people and families while the billionaire class profits off their suffering. The only way to fight back is to build the infrastructure we need to flip the House blue next year — but it's going to take all of us. Republicans are already dishing out their deep pockets to try to flip this seat. They know that if they can flip CA-25, their majority is safe and sound for another term. Let's prove them wrong. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi, it's Caroline, Dr. Ruiz's Finance Director. I'm reaching out because Dr. Ruiz is busy fighting back against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda at the Capitol. The House is expected to vote on the Big Ugly Bill today after it passed the Senate, and House Democrats are doing everything in their power to hold the line. Here’s the reality of what’s to come if Trump’s Big Ugly Bill becomes law: $1 trillion in cuts to Medicaid will cause hospitals to close and millions to lose their healthcare coverage. Countless children and families will go hungry with the most significant cuts to SNAP in history. And billionaires like Donald Trump and his friends will get richer at the expense of everyday Americans. We can’t let MAGA extremism destroy the lives of working people and families while the billionaire class profits off their suffering. The only way to fight back is to build the infrastructure we need to flip the House blue next year — but it's going to take all of us. Republicans are already dishing out their deep pockets to try to flip this seat. They know that if they can flip CA-25, their majority is safe and sound for another term. Let's prove them wrong. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight, Caroline | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress. | = = PAID FOR BY DR. name: Young Democrats of America
subject: YDA Statement: Medicaid Saved My Life — We Must Fight the Big Ugly Bill
body:
For inquiries contact: comms@yda.org | |
---
|
---
**STATEMENT FROM LESLIE TEMPLETON, CHAIR OF THE YOUNG DEMOCRATS OF AMERICA DISABILITY CAUCUS: MEDICAID SAVED MY LIFE. THE "BIG UGLY BILL" WOULD TAKE THAT CHANCE AWAY FROM MILLIONS, AND WE NEED TO FIGHT BACK NOW.**
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **July 3, 2025**
**Contact: Leslie Templeton -- communications@yda.org **
---
Right now, Republicans are trying to rip Medicaid away from millions through their so-called "Big Ugly Bill." For people like me, this isn't just cruel, it's dangerous.

In 2020, I was diagnosed with kidney disease. While most people would immediately ask, "What's the treatment plan?" my first thought was, "How much is survival going to cost me?" That's the reality too many of us face in a healthcare system that puts profits over people.

Thanks to Medicaid, my kidney disease has been in remission since January. It gave me a future I wasn't sure I'd have. **That 's why it's been so painful and enraging to watch elected officials question whether Medicaid, and by extension, my life, is worth protecting. When they come for Medicaid, they're not just attacking a program; they're attacking the people whose lives depend on it.**

**Now, Republicans are trying to take that same lifeline away from millions of others. Their bill would gut access to life-saving care, especially for disabled people, low-income families, and chronically ill individuals.**

Our lives are on the line. But the fight isn't over.

We have a chance to stop this. Call your representatives. Tell them to vote NO on this inhumane and catastrophic bill. We're not disposable, and we're not bac
---
###
---
|
---

body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110806660/555384989/-272311645?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_BUBill_250703_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTgxZGVhNi0zNjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3WYvRhcJTNYAlWMbaSiCgrUAmU11E9qq_ceB4sg91WE=) Derek, any moment now House Republicans are expected to pass Donald Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill – and tomorrow Trump will likely sign it into law.

First off, if you’re feeling angry, disappointed, or scared – you are not alone. It’s a terrible and cruel piece of legislation. Even my Republican colleagues know it and voted for it anyway. I spent weeks trying to convince them to vote with their conscience and not cave to Donald Trump.

It's disappointing to say the least, but we can’t allow ourselves to be demoralized into inaction at this moment. We have to stay engaged in this fight. Because come the midterm elections, voters will have an opportunity to hold Donald Trump and Republicans accountable for:
* Ripping millions of Americans off their health insurance
* Gutting food assistance
* Raising energy prices while cutting clean energy jobs
* Failing our children and grandchildren by exploding the national debt

_**And for what? To give even larger tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans.**_

One man and one party are responsible for this mess: Donald Trump and the Republicans. And the fight to hand them a devastating defeat in the midterms starts now.

[_**So if you are able to, will you donate to my reelection campaign today? Together, we will organize all across Virginia – and the country – to hold Republicans accountable at the ballot box for this dangerous legislation.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110806661/555384990/-272311645?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_BUBill_250703_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTgxZGVhNi0zNjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3WYvRhcJTNYAlWMbaSiCgrUAmU11E9qq_ceB4sg91WE=) clean_body: | | | = Derek, any moment now House Republicans are expected to pass Donald Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill – and tomorrow Trump will likely sign it into law. First off, if you’re feeling angry, disappointed, or scared – you are not alone. It’s a terrible and cruel piece of legislation. Even my Republican colleagues know it and voted for it anyway. I spent weeks trying to convince them to vote with their conscience and not cave to Donald Trump. It's disappointing to say the least, but we can’t allow ourselves to be demoralized into inaction at this moment. We have to stay engaged in this fight. Because come the midterm elections, voters will have an opportunity to hold Donald Trump and Republicans accountable for: Ripping millions of Americans off their health insurance Gutting food assistance Raising energy prices while cutting clean energy jobs Failing our children and grandchildren by exploding the national debt And for what? To give even larger tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans. One man and one party are responsible for this mess: Donald Trump and the Republicans. For inquiries contact: comms@yda.org | |

**STATEMENT FROM LESLIE TEMPLETON, CHAIR OF THE YOUNG DEMOCRATS OF AMERICA DISABILITY CAUCUS: MEDICAID SAVED MY LIFE. THE "BIG UGLY BILL" WOULD TAKE THAT CHANCE AWAY FROM MILLIONS, AND WE NEED TO FIGHT BACK NOW.**
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **July 3, 2025**
**Contact: Leslie Templeton -- communications@yda.org **
---
Right now, Republicans are trying to rip Medicaid away from millions through their so-called "Big Ugly Bill." For people like me, this isn't just cruel, it's dangerous.

In 2020, I was diagnosed with kidney disease. While most people would immediately ask, "What's the treatment plan?" my first thought was, "How much is survival going to cost me?" That's the reality too many of us face in a healthcare system that puts profits over people.

Thanks to Medicaid, my kidney disease has been in remission since January. It gave me a future I wasn't sure I'd have. **That 's why it's been so painful and enraging to watch elected officials question whether Medicaid, and by extension, my life, is worth protecting. When they come for Medicaid, they're not just attacking a program; they're attacking the people whose lives depend on it.**

**Now, Republicans are trying to take that same lifeline away from millions of others. Their bill would gut access to life-saving care, especially for disabled people, low-income families, and chronically ill individuals.**

Our lives are on the line. But the fight isn't over.

We have a chance to stop this. Call your representatives. Tell them to vote NO on this inhumane and catastrophic bill. We're not disposable, and we're not backing down. Find how to contact your representative here: [https://www.aapd.com/medicaid](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRuTo7ylbKzSmazI8lCq7X9Fl3TG5dyvReXmeC9qoAgC-aPSkJMS-020K4UuhmwMq63XhVEkNkXrbsjucW0I6CQohNbScIsHhHU-LLpSsrbSBEFkEg6qwtpRFhGVkOui861sw7-LSInCMJQqVGdGJfg02vxBDVe6uDlryso_8MQEtTK-He8MbyR2jZ3GRa7nPJJQNZrMA1Gu_Oyn7mplTuQdotL1wKLwUB-9i7NhL1v0MyNAHTY6Q0iMo4tSODdl2uY0ugF_gO1R8E_lt0FBIMlGMUaD7nB_WXHBfAQmhvEgg5Gb_Lg9VI_EQCSfXTeYH5pjkm5aWphFrMPrEgXoPwdg1E3MJGNzDM5oXGXgBYzm/4hv/7SnqaDfBR6C_E6nZdmyrKQ/h0/h001._B5QHGaLk-ACr2LHCZ42C707T7lQQ-5Eyc900CAgD0A)

Even better, for the second straight month, not a single illegal crosser apprehended was released into our country. | Friends, For the first time in years, we finally secured our southern border. Last month, Border Patrol had the lowest number of nationwide encounters in CBP history. Even better, for the second straight month, not a single illegal crosser apprehended was released into our country. | President Trump wasted no time after January, invoking emergency powers to treat the border crisis like the invasion it is—Swift deportations, no catch-and-release, wall construction restarting – promises made, promises kept. But now the open-borders left is furious. Biden’s allies are suing to stop these policies. They want to throw open the floodgates again. I won’t let them. I stand unapologetically with our Border Patrol and law enforcement. We will not return to the Biden border chaos. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Nicole | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

### **Breaking: Court deals final blow to Kendall lawsuit over ranked-choice voting repeal petition**
---
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6866c55aabbf86010b1a693c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fbreaking-court-deals-final-blow-to-kendall-lawsuit-over-ranked-choice-voting-repeal-petition%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68663fe54806ef3f11268847&l=en-US&s=T877Z5q8sPcPASY9ZzRUUvdQkCs%3D)
---
**A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week.**
---
### The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission
When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote **three books** and created a **30-part animated video series** to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, **RCValert.org** and **RemoveRCV.com** , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over **700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers**. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over **42,000 signatures** —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering **one hundred to one** , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly **$150 million** between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.**Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America.**
---
