The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6866c55aabbf86010b1a693c&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68663fe54806ef3f11268847&l=en-US&s=A1VykTfziNolUllK-BpNEF0aXA8%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6866c55aabbf86010b1a693c&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68663fe54806ef3f11268847&l=en-US&s=Drh4u7nroki1IstBmRM9LIEA3Ng%3D)

The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.The phase approach is:1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / EducationOur team at, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history. | | Tropic Tundra Tech 12110 Business Blvd Ste 6 PMB 113 Eagle River United States | ---|---

A few weeks ago, the U.S. Supreme Court announced it would not hear _L.M. v. Town of Middleborough_ , a case where a Massachusetts school punished a student for wearing a t-shirt to school with the words "There are only two genders."

Liam's case was about much more than just a t-shirt. The school actively promotes its view about gender through posters and "Pride" events, and it encourages students to wear clothing with messages on the same topic--so long as that clothing expresses the school's preferred views on the subject.

This is a disappointing development--a setback for free speech.

By denying the case, the Supreme Court leaves in place a lower court ruling that denied Liam's clear constitutional right to free speech.

We believe public school officials cannot censor a 7th grader's speech by forcing him to remove a shirt that respectfully states scientific fact. This is a gross violation of the First Amendment.

Do you agree with Liam that there are only two genders?

We believe public school officials cannot censor a 7th grader's speech by forcing him to remove a shirt that respectfully states scientific fact. This is a gross violation of the First Amendment. Do you agree with Liam that there are only two genders? Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 | |

| I just finished my second all-nighter trying to stop Trump’s Big Ugly Bill.

Let me be absolutely clear: This bill is a betrayal of the American people. Plain and simple. I am not giving up on protecting the millions of Americans who will be impacted by cuts to healthcare, SNAP benefits, and the rising costs as a result.

Last night’s tally was **219-213**. Just ONE Republican voted no on the bill. A single one. And the tight margins on this vote remain frustratingly evident. This is why flipping the House matters. A democratic majority will fight to lower costs, protect healthcare and SNAP benefits, and advocate for working families.

House Democrats may not ultimately be able to stop this bill, but we’ve been on the House floor lead by Hakeem Jeffries for hours hoping to stop the passage—every hour we delay is another hour that Americans have healthcare, kids have food security and Americans are not saddled with trillions in debt.

**When this bill passes, it will be a Republican majority in Congress that worked to sell out the working and middle class to reward billionaires with tax cuts.**

If we want to have a fighting chance, a Democratic majority is our path. MI-03 has been one of the most competitive districts in the country, cycle after cycle. Winning and then holding this seat means we turned a “yes” vote into a “no” vote.

**That’s why, as I work to push back against disastrous Republican legislation, I’m continuing my work on the ground to flip even more seats like mine.[_If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in whatever you can below:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110808340/555390774/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-07-03_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjI1NWE3Yi0zOTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvaPEWTeTYoyuChNyKvvwH3hOx6qDuK_Aop-LF8Ip3Q=)**

body:
This could reshape the midterms.

| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.stefanik-emails.com/unsubscribe?e=3728ad8c6f8ddbe0dac3adde2aa5e2bd&utm_source=hdteamelise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_d5d2d16579ede8e0d1d468bb194&n=1).

| | **_A SECURE REPORT FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR_**
---
Peter,
---
As I reported last fall, foreign money is allegedly being illegally funneled to Far Left Democrat candidates via the Democrats’ top donation platform to influence our elections.
---
**Now, the Department of Justice is taking action to** _STOP_** this Democrat cheating. **
---
**_AP: Trump orders Justice Department to investigate Democrats’ top fundraising platform_ **
---
“The presidential memorandum notes that a congressional investigation revealed significant fraud schemes using ActBlue and, over a 30-day period during the 2024 election cycle, hundreds of ActBlue donations from foreign IP addresses using prepaid cards, despite it being illegal for foreign nationals to contribute to U.S. elections.”
---
American citizens have also reported that contributions were made to Democrat candidates and committees in their name that they did not make themselves.
---
**This fraud would explain how Democrats like Kamala Harris – _running on one of the most extreme, unpopular platforms in history_ – were able to shatter fundraising records last year! **
---
Clearly, the Democrats think they can’t win without cheating. But look, even with this scheme exposed, we can’t discount that the Left will find _another way_ to break the rules and give themselves an advantage.
---
That is why we need to do everything in our power to make sure the midterms are FREE and FAIR!
---
**_As House GOP Leadership Chair, I’m leading the charge to FIGHT BACK against Democrat cheating, both in Congress and by verifying results on the ground._**
---
But going toe-to-toe with the Democrats to dismantle their political machine isn’t going to be easy, which is why I’m asking for your grassroots support.

_**...And to ensure your grassroots donation goes as far as possible, I’ve authorized a 500% MATCH for the next 60 minutes!**_

clean_body: This could reshape the midterms. | Not interested? . | | A SECURE REPORT FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR Peter, As I reported last fall, foreign money is allegedly being illegally funneled to Far Left Democrat candidates via the Democrats’ top donation platform to influence our elections. Now, the Department of Justice is taking action to STOP this Democrat cheating. AP: Trump orders Justice Department to investigate Democrats’ top fundraising platform “The presidential memorandum notes that a congressional investigation revealed significant fraud schemes using ActBlue and, over a 30-day period during the 2024 election cycle, hundreds of ActBlue donations from foreign IP addresses using prepaid cards, despite it being illegal for foreign nationals to contribute to U.S. elections.” American citizens have also reported that contributions were made to Democrat candidates and committees in their name that they did not make themselves. This fraud would explain how Democrats like Kamala Harris – running on one of the most extreme, unpopular platforms in history – were able to shatter fundraising records last year! Clearly, the Democrats think they can’t win without cheating. But look, even with this scheme exposed, we can’t discount that the Left will find another way to break the rules and give themselves an advantage. That is why we need to do everything in our power to make sure the midterms are FREE and FAIR! As House GOP Leadership Chair, I’m leading the charge to FIGHT BACK against Democrat cheating, both in Congress and by verifying results on the ground. But going toe-to-toe with the Democrats to dismantle their political machine isn’t going to be easy, which is why I’m asking for your grassroots support. ...And to ensure your grassroots donation goes as far as possible, I’ve authorized a 500% MATCH for the next 60 minutes! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership

We can't emphasize enough that this legislation will be **_devastating_** for millions of Americans.

Republicans have made their priorities crystal clear: strip away health care, housing support, and child care funding from the people who need it most — just to hand massive tax cuts to their billionaire donors.

This is not governance. It's a wholesale sellout of the American people. **🛑 FIGHT BACK RIGHT NOW 🛑**
We're laser-focused on flipping the House in 2026 and ending this GOP cruelty. That's why we've _already_ endorsed 13 Democratic pro-choice House candidates so far this cycle.

This bill is cruel by design. It slashes funding for Medicaid, undercuts access to reproductive health care, and dismantles vital safety net programs — all while giving the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations a major windfall.

Make no mistake: _If you're not rich, this bill will make your life harder_. Republicans know that, and they passed it anyway.

They've proven, once again, that they cannot be trusted with our lawmaking institutions. They don't care about the daily lives and struggles of their constituents — only about protecting their own power and enriching their allies.

That's why EMILYs List is committed to taking back power **as soon as possible** , starting with the House in 2026. We've already endorsed 13 women running to flip Republican-held seats and defend vulnerable blue districts. But they can't win without our support.

We don't have billionaires bankrolling us. What we have is this grassroots community — and right now, we need you.

clean_body: Now, we fight back. | = BREAKING: Trump's shamelessly mistitled "Big Beautiful Bill" just passed the U.S. House, and will soon be signed into law. We can't emphasize enough that this legislation will be devastating for millions of Americans. Republicans have made their priorities crystal clear: strip away health care, housing support, and child care funding from the people who need it most — just to hand massive tax cuts to their billionaire donors. This is not governance. It's a wholesale sellout of the American people. 🛑 FIGHT BACK RIGHT NOW 🛑 We're laser-focused on flipping the House in 2026 and ending this GOP cruelty. That's why we've already endorsed 13 Democratic pro-choice House candidates so far this cycle. Help power their campaigns: | = This bill is cruel by design. It slashes funding for Medicaid, undercuts access to reproductive health care, and dismantles vital safety net programs — all while giving the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations a major windfall. Make no mistake: If you're not rich, this bill will make your life harder. Republicans know that, and they passed it anyway. They've proven, once again, that they cannot be trusted with our lawmaking institutions. They don't care about the daily lives and struggles of their constituents — only about protecting their own power and enriching their allies. That's why EMILYs List is committed to taking back power as soon as possible , starting with the House in 2026. We've already endorsed 13 women running to flip Republican-held seats and defend vulnerable blue districts. But they can't win without our support. We don't have billionaires bankrolling us. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: One big beautiful bill for billionaires
disclaimer_text: paid for by working families
body:
Working families paying for billionaire handouts.

| |
---
Team, the Big Beautiful Bill for Billionaires has been forced through Congress, and I can sum it up for you: **it's a handout for billionaires, paid for by working families.** It will kick nearly 500,000 Ohioans off their health insurance. It will slash clean energy and infrastructure investments. It will not create jobs. It will transfer even more wealth to billionaires. It is bad for Ohio. It is bad for America. And it is why we need to take back the House and stop Trump's agenda in its tracks. I voted to defend Ohio families, but extremist MAGA Republicans are going to try to punish everyone who didn’t vote with them. Even Republican Senators are retiring because they are scared of the consequences. **I’m not scared, friend.** **[Super PACs and special interests are already flooding my district with lies and distractions, just like they did last cycle. I’ll need your help to fight back. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | |
**As the House sends the Big Ugly Bill to the President's desk...** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuO3YbgPpASNBD5VcYYax6A02r1hbaPRA-JLEy9shQrRfVvv9q2d_I4pVJhBJiQwZEKAJRoeMKVZMpTgn_PLtzZdTo2VC5BC3Q5ZL2_R9zwJk1L6oMQMalNzI6PUsftAMWJfAed5NfUl8mecr5qU9fUqsSxK7AME2CE3Uq7qK9hP_bau0-zLlImiIT88Ca-xGfE3wnpPW4wZ84bj8EgKufMyhKRB11sribrL-2x4M4HmP21SEVQePX11u48zj4B2PGo6aBjku-VforVtdm2fS84B9gUTWdwCGUbFE8j5Lvr2OtcoGavofS_jwohusWH6Zk0jZmxCH6F4HrfhjWv3UQZ4-psbZMGqMlc8kDFyhT5WEEoz1Vlma6xkFtew6T2xgb_KAb-SikWMIfyes8x6Dp4EBoouou6Iwl6Ufpv2-jzxyI/4hv/TRMpx4RSR0eB-ECwXqguVw/h0/h001.odImoaT3nlIR9vuA1Hgu54HTbCB1_Rx3aTpBQyEqtTE)**[Will you chip in to expand our national ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard campaign so we can be rid of this incompetent fool?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuO3YbgPpASNBD5VcYYax6A0wVdySCXIJJyDs1Pu8BcsANGkesnGD-yq5feDkyu2dU-NFjSDBo8pgGmj4FPLvmu_cPnEJ-deBPcyJ7YGaJjyoS2elGACSqa_nztToaR6hdrPMk68IWrSZ1AIV7w12HR0XaV7D1Vg0z2sVGaiBzFsyK2fbbidu5Pj3eBAxob9jP3MdOjOfRAn2m9AjD1DSaA3hbGhvmnDdj-DGrYlpSZx0QFjWX_gVsETMlsXNvARZ9C5Z4dxjzZ6wBJ2gj1SBQL0L7qx4R19pu9PUdQX9KW1DGTr6DGXWc4P4ESSv93yw_ljN6fw32flli3fukivz-zYYeN2kvROO776R-qAzgdS2OnJ7s3V630BO8ntDEyVhWtb_5ff1VQyD7ovL3fAhvkvvnP2fc82KP6H9yflM1ds9s/4hv/TRMpx4RSR0eB-ECwXqguVw/h1/h001.GYdVk735krwZCGgaF31n-hf9VGlpZ0DOR5j1CoNi4ag)**
* * *
Trump doesn’t seem to comprehend what his so-called “big, beautiful bill” actually does.
He hosted a meeting with Republicans to tout the legislation, but told his fellow party members they shouldn’t touch Medicaid, Medicare and Social Security if they want to win elections.
To which someone said, “Sir, but we’re touching Medicaid in this bill.”
**Folks, Trump may not understand the bill, but Republicans in Congress _definitely do_ as they shamelessly slash Medicaid, attack clean energy, and massively expand ICE.**
Trump thanked some Republicans in Congress with _signed Trump merch_ , while we pay the price.
We’re running ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboards in cities across the nation, and building up our war chest to defeat vulnerable Republicans next November.

clean_body: | | | As the House sends the Big Ugly Bill to the President's desk... Trump doesn’t seem to comprehend what his so-called “big, beautiful bill” actually does. He hosted a meeting with Republicans to tout the legislation, but told his fellow party members they shouldn’t touch Medicaid, Medicare and Social Security if they want to win elections. To which someone said, “Sir, but we’re touching Medicaid in this bill.” Folks, Trump may not understand the bill, but Republicans in Congress definitely do as they shamelessly slash Medicaid, attack clean energy, and massively expand ICE. Trump thanked some Republicans in Congress with signed Trump merch , while we pay the price. We’re running ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboards in cities across the nation, and building up our war chest to defeat vulnerable Republicans next November. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Team Powered by People
subject: Holding John Cornyn accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Senator John Cornyn cast the deciding vote in the Senate to:
* Stop millions of Texans from being able to see a doctor
* Take food away from kids who rely on SNAP
* Shut down rural hospitals across our state
* Crush solar and wind jobs that support Texas families
* And give our tax dollars to the wealthiest people in America

And to top it off, he made sure billions of those dollars will fund Governor Abbott’s _Operation Lone Star_ —a political stunt that’s done nothing to fix our broken immigration system, and everything to divide and distract us.
**Texas deserves better.**
At Powered by People, we’re organizing to hold Cornyn accountable—and replace him with someone who puts _people over politics_. We’re working every day to host town halls, register voters, train local leaders, and talk to Texans in every community.
But we can’t do it without your help.

name: Andy Kim
subject: I won’t sugarcoat it, this is heartbreaking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
What House Republicans just passed is a direct attack on people’s lives.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110809659/555395561/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzc3YWNiMy0zYzU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IveUUg3wcqZO7eWMRYwCBtb7cl3eHQ5bwYUidFNSNms=&emci=0c336cb3-2258-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7377acb3-3c58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | What House Republicans just passed is a direct attack on people's lives. Trump's budget will take health care away from millions of people by gutting Medicaid. It will rip food assistance away from struggling families. It would raise energy costs for working Americans by slashing funding for clean energy – just so billionaires can get yet another tax break. **It's reckless and cruel.** I won't sugarcoat it, this is heartbreaking. I know it's easy to feel powerless when we see our supposed leaders doing harm to their own constituents, but we cannot let despair silence us. That's exactly what they're counting on. **We have to speak up. We have to hold them accountable**. And we have to keep organizing – not just for today, but through 2026, when we can flip the House, including key districts right here in New Jersey. clean_body: What House Republicans just passed is a direct attack on people’s lives. | | | | What House Republicans just passed is a direct attack on people's lives. Trump's budget will take health care away from millions of people by gutting Medicaid. It will rip food assistance away from struggling families. It would raise energy costs for working Americans by slashing funding for clean energy – just so billionaires can get yet another tax break. It's reckless and cruel. I won't sugarcoat it, this is heartbreaking. I know it's easy to feel powerless when we see our supposed leaders doing harm to their own constituents, but we cannot let despair silence us. That's exactly what they're counting on. We have to speak up. We have to hold them accountable. And we have to keep organizing – not just for today, but through 2026, when we can flip the House, including key districts right here in New Jersey. This is a long fight – for our neighbors, for our families, for our future. I'll be standing up every step of the way, and I hope you'll be there with me. | Hi Peter – Ryan Mackenzie just voted for the GOP Tax Scam. Once again, he took the coward's way out and put loyalty to billionaires and Donald Trump over the needs of families in PA-07.

People here are struggling to afford healthcare and put food on the table, but Ryan Mackenzie just voted to gut Medicaid and food assistance, which could take healthcare away from 17,519 people and food off the table for 6,096 more in our district.

I’ve run a food pantry and have seen the devastating impact that hunger has on children. It is cruel to cut such essential programs and put the lives of families and seniors at risk.

**Ryan Mackenzie had the power to fight back, but he sided with Trump and MAGA Republicans to help billionaires get richer while Pennsylvanians pay the price.** He knows the impact that this would have on families in PA-07 – and he voted for the bill anyway.

_**PA-07 deserves better.**_

[_**I’m running for Congress because families in this district deserve someone who fights for them and actually works to lower costs – not someone like Mackenzie who sells out our district at every turn. With your help, we can kick him out of office. Will you contribute anything you can to help us win?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110809884/555396187/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-07-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJkM2ZhMDEtM2Q1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NBsZczDKJ-wIxfNRHXtAwh4n_KUEBojhOy8T6vu-iEE=)

clean_body: Ryan Mackenzie just voted for the GOP Tax Scam. Once again, he took the coward's way out and put loyalty to billionaires and Donald Trump over the needs of families in PA-07. | = | Hi Peter – Ryan Mackenzie just voted for the GOP Tax Scam. Once again, he took the coward's way out and put loyalty to billionaires and Donald Trump over the needs of families in PA-07. People here are struggling to afford healthcare and put food on the table, but Ryan Mackenzie just voted to gut Medicaid and food assistance, which could take healthcare away from 17,519 people and food off the table for 6,096 more in our district. I’ve run a food pantry and have seen the devastating impact that hunger has on children. It is cruel to cut such essential programs and put the lives of families and seniors at risk. Ryan Mackenzie had the power to fight back, but he sided with Trump and MAGA Republicans to help billionaires get richer while Pennsylvanians pay the price. He knows the impact that this would have on families in PA-07 – and he voted for the bill anyway. PA-07 deserves better. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Carol Obando-Derstine * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Trump's broken promise
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump is skyrocketing the prices of essentials for working families.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1699%2E791427%2ETdzgud)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250703-1-180&t=2&akid=1699%2E791427%2ETdzgud)
Friend — On the campaign trail last year, Trump focused on one big thing: Inflation.
He promised that he would drive down prices for Americans and turn around our sluggish economy.
But when we look at the big ugly bill that just passed the House, it’s clear that Trump is breaking that promise by skyrocketing the cost of essentials for working families.
Healthcare? More expensive.
Food? More expensive.
Energy bills? More expensive.
College tuition? More expensive.
And that’s not to mention the millions who will have to go without those essentials **_at all**_ , because they simply can’t afford to pay more than they already are.
Friend — The Republican Party under Trump is running the same playbook it always has: Slash taxes for their mega-rich buddies, give huge handouts to the corporations who fund their campaigns, and leave working families worse off than ever before.
If Democrats are serious about taking power back from these far-right extremists, we have to prove to working class Americans that our sights are set on bringing down the insane cost of living that so many are struggling with.
Just look at the winning campaign of Zohran Mamdani in New York, who found huge success by focusing relentlessly on affordability and offering simple, impactful ideas like making buses free and building more affordable housing.
Our job now is to make sure the American people understand the devastating effects of this ugly bill, and to pursue a bold economic agenda that working people can get behind.
Anything less and we will almost certainly fail to overcome the promises of Trump and the far-right, no matter how often they break them.
**[If you agree with my vision for a more affordable future and how we will get there, I’m asking for you to support my campaign today with a contribution. $5, $10, anything you can afford. Help us expose this Republican scam of a bill and build a movement that can actually deliver for working Americans.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250703-1-180&t=3&akid=1699%2E791427%2ETdzgud)

Team, moments ago, Congress passed the so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" and let us sum it up for you: it's a complete fiasco. Republicans jammed the bill through, and the end result leaves working families behind while putting more money in the pockets of billionaires. This bill does absolutely nothing to improve the lives of New Jersey families. It cuts Medicaid, leaving millions with their life-saving healthcare in jeopardy, and critical food programs for students in our schools. Nellie voted no on this bill and has been clear from the very beginning: she won't support a bill that is a step backward for New Jerseyans. | Peter, Speaker Mike Johnson and white supremacist Stephen Miller are attacking me again: [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/HBlHC3f0DG3NfW6zRXKaow~~/AAPPABA~/XP_KDVoa3mkVGUo8JACoRpOWIC47H6jKXEMW7fGR2mFsjHQ6z5lW51eUUUYZciTE3kkxMsEepSPgP_naWadMFt2IkRebt1EfxJxK6a5dPrffFPhSxevkOgzfC2ylI09fnkJgL3CTwjapWm64oYIA2j2yPaMKASv9d92Tpck-yqQTSenO0jo8ht40KgcyiXMJ_VTNpCExpFy8-XEwuEokr1HgEBiPwfVlAYrXSz8XSEhXTC536qh1etlJTg7alzU6GXqClvT1YDFrV4bLVsmTel9tjL4xSwE6DUmo2AV6AsskJAbqQPZX8fawTV6YtCD1YvFr9cVteEMVhHKiyR7XKkV6Hhw3n3OpU4V4tJYtQYE~) These fascists lash out at anyone who speaks the truth about this administration’s cruelty toward undocumented immigrants. But no matter how many tweets they post or lies they tell about me – I will never stop calling these fascists out. Why? As the child of a Cuban immigrant, I know firsthand how much immigrants contribute to this country – and how much we lose by closing our doors to the world. And I also know that Speaker Johnson and Stephen Miller won’t stop at tweets. Their dark money interests are ready to spend _millions of dollars_ in attacks to make an example out of me. But while they have billionaires on their side, I’m funded by everyday grassroots donors like you who believe that immigrants belong in America. clean_body: | ~ | Peter, Speaker Mike Johnson and white supremacist Stephen Miller are attacking me again: ~ These fascists lash out at anyone who speaks the truth about this administration’s cruelty toward undocumented immigrants. But no matter how many tweets they post or lies they tell about me – I will never stop calling these fascists out. Why? As the child of a Cuban immigrant, I know firsthand how much immigrants contribute to this country – and how much we lose by closing our doors to the world. And I also know that Speaker Johnson and Stephen Miller won’t stop at tweets. Their dark money interests are ready to spend millions of dollars in attacks to make an example out of me. But while they have billionaires on their side, I’m funded by everyday grassroots donors like you who believe that immigrants belong in America. subject: Republicans just passed Trump’s trash budget proposal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110810288/555397408/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwMDI0NjctM2Q1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=acvgGiXua9LdN-1J9uvdEDWkbX1oLte19TwbN-iiCts=) Yesterday, I joined KTVZ News to spell out exactly what I think of Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill.” It’s trash. T-R-A-S-H. Trash. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110810289/555397409/-629675555?refcode=email_070325_house-vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwMDI0NjctM2Q1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=acvgGiXua9LdN-1J9uvdEDWkbX1oLte19TwbN-iiCts=) Now, House Republicans just passed this trash bill — extending tax cuts for the richest people who’ve ever lived, while hanging hard working Americans out to dry. Let’s be clear: This bill will cause irreparable harm to people across the country. We’re talking about a loss of healthcare for millions of Americans and a loss of nutritional assistance for our kids, veterans, and seniors. Rural hospitals will shutter, Planned Parenthood clinics will close, and people will go hungry. All things of consequence. It’s an abomination, and I voted NO to stand up for each and every Oregonian. **While this bill may have passed the House, our fight for a better future for the next generation is far from over.** I’m more determined than ever to keep up the work that Oregonians sent me to Congress to achieve: To lower the cost of living, improve our quality of life, protect healthcare, and make life easier for working families. But with so much on the line, I’m going to need you standing with me to push back on this disgraceful legislation and continue the fight for hard working Americans. **[So please, will you rush a donation now to help us push back on Trump and the GOP and continue our fight to build a better future? The only way we can stop them for good is if we take back the House next year, and that starts by defending my seat in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110810290/555397419/-629675555?refcode=email_070325_house-vote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwMDI0NjctM2Q1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=acvgGiXua9LdN-1J9uvdEDWkbX1oLte19TwbN-iiCts=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110810291/555397420/-629675555?refcode=email_070325_house-vote&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwMDI0NjctM2Q1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=acvgGiXua9LdN-1J9uvdEDWkbX1oLte19TwbN-iiCts=)

clean_body: = Yesterday, I joined KTVZ News to spell out exactly what I think of Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill.” It’s trash. T-R-A-S-H. Trash. = Now, House Republicans just passed this trash bill — extending tax cuts for the richest people who’ve ever lived, while hanging hard working Americans out to dry. Let’s be clear: This bill will cause irreparable harm to people across the country. We’re talking about a loss of healthcare for millions of Americans and a loss of nutritional assistance for our kids, veterans, and seniors. Rural hospitals will shutter, Planned Parenthood clinics will close, and people will go hungry. All things of consequence. It’s an abomination, and I voted NO to stand up for each and every Oregonian. While this bill may have passed the House, our fight for a better future for the next generation is far from over. I’m more determined than ever to keep up the work that Oregonians sent me to Congress to achieve: To lower the cost of living, improve our quality of life, protect healthcare, and make life easier for working families. But with so much on the line, I’m going to need you standing with me to push back on this disgraceful legislation and continue the fight for hard working Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: GOP Accountability Alert via Care in Action
subject: Hold Republicans Accountable
body:
We need your support to hold Republicans accountable for cutting Medicaid.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110810552/555398202/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-passed-accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmY1NDViYy0zZDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfXL3gcEKt3sLMoFDC7-rMtgS8pZ1qVWPP0ensj5w4s=&emci=0180ffa9-e656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5ff545bc-3d58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
Congress just passed a cruel and devastating bill that includes the biggest cuts to Medicaid in history in order to pay for inhumane deportations and raids and give tax breaks to billionaires.
_Millions_ will now lose essential healthcare coverage, and countless domestic workers will lose both their healthcare _and_ their livelihoods.
**Care in Action is launching a massive campaign today to make sure every voter in vulnerable Republican districts knows that their representative was responsible for cutting Medicaid** , including rallies in their districts, powerful personal stories blanketing local radio and TV, mobilizations that are already knocking voters’ doors, and more.
[**Our first events are in DAYS, and we need your support to hold Republicans accountable so the disastrous votes to cut Medicaid have enormous consequences on Election Day. Donate now and help us make Republicans pay for cutting Medicaid!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110810553/555398203/-499192177?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-passed-accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmY1NDViYy0zZDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfXL3gcEKt3sLMoFDC7-rMtgS8pZ1qVWPP0ensj5w4s=)
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110810554/555398204/-499192177?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-passed-accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmY1NDViYy0zZDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfXL3gcEKt3sLMoFDC7-rMtgS8pZ1qVWPP0ensj5w4s=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110810555/555398205/-499192177?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-passed-accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmY1NDViYy0zZDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfXL3gcEKt3sLMoFDC7-rMtgS8pZ1qVWPP0ensj5w4s=)
Make no mistake: these cruel cuts will kill. One recent study found that more than 51,000 people will die every single year as a direct result of this bill. For millions of domestic workers, Medicaid is a lifeline – it’s used to pay for 70% of home care and is often care workers’ only pathway to affordable, quality care for themselves.
**Countless care workers will lose their jobs _and_ their healthcare, facing impossible choices between medicine, food, and rent.**
Which is why Care in Action is gearing up to make sure representatives who voted for these cruel cuts pay the price – including **holding accountability rallies in key districts, sharing stories of the impacts of the cuts in local and social media, unleashing powerful door-to-door voter mobilizations, and more!**
Our team is turning on a dime to get the first in-district events together in days, but the fact is that this campaign depends on supporters like you.
[**It’s up to _all_ of us to ensure Republicans are held to account for choosing to cut Medicaid for millions. Will you urgently chip in to hold Republicans accountable for what they’ve done?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110810556/555398206/-499192177?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=republican-reconciliation-passed-accountability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmY1NDViYy0zZDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfXL3gcEKt3sLMoFDC7-rMtgS8pZ1qVWPP0ensj5w4s=)
As always, thanks for all you do,

clean_body: We need your support to hold Republicans accountable for cutting Medicaid. Congress just passed a cruel and devastating bill that includes the biggest cuts to Medicaid in history in order to pay for inhumane deportations and raids and give tax breaks to billionaires. Millions will now lose essential healthcare coverage, and countless domestic workers will lose both their healthcare and their livelihoods. Care in Action is launching a massive campaign today to make sure every voter in vulnerable Republican districts knows that their representative was responsible for cutting Medicaid , including rallies in their districts, powerful personal stories blanketing local radio and TV, mobilizations that are already knocking voters’ doors, and more. = = = Make no mistake: these cruel cuts will kill. One recent study found that more than 51,000 people will die every single year as a direct result of this bill. For millions of domestic workers, Medicaid is a lifeline – it’s used to pay for 70% of home care and is often care workers’ only pathway to affordable, quality care for themselves. Countless care workers will lose their jobs and their healthcare, facing impossible choices between medicine, food, and rent. Which is why Care in Action is gearing up to make sure representatives who voted for these cruel cuts pay the price – including holding accountability rallies in key districts, sharing stories of the impacts of the cuts in local and social media, unleashing powerful door-to-door voter mobilizations, and more! Our team is turning on a dime to get the first in-district events together in days, but the fact is that this campaign depends on supporters like you. = As always, thanks for all you do, The Care in Action Team

name: Mark Kelly
subject: RE: There will be consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The choice in yesterday’s vote in the Senate was clear: support working families or give handouts to billionaires. Trump and Congressional Republicans chose the billionaires.
#

Well, they did it.
Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans voted to give billionaires and millionaires a tax cut they won’t even notice. Millions of Americans will lose their health care, their food assistance, and their jobs because of it.
This is what Trump wanted. This is what my Republican colleagues voted for. And now, they all must own the consequences.
[**And I will do everything in my power to ensure that happens by retaking the House and Senate next year. If you’re ready to fight back, chip in now.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25/.CXgdOY&refcode=em250703-1-600&t=1&akid=6113%2E6688874%2EpAikAx)
**[FIGHT BACK](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25/.CXgdOY&refcode=em250703-1-600&t=2&akid=6113%2E6688874%2EpAikAx)**
Thank you,
Mark

* * *

Team,
The choice in yesterday’s vote in the Senate was clear: support working families or give handouts to billionaires. Trump and Congressional Republicans chose the billionaires.
While families across Arizona are trying to afford groceries or take their kids to the doctor, this bill gives another tax break to the ultra-wealthy so they can buy another private jet.
We offered amendment after amendment to make this bill better: making rich people pay their fair share while giving tax cuts to the middle class, keeping health care coverage and food assistance for working people, and protecting clean energy jobs. Republicans rejected every single one of them.
I hoped more of my Republican colleagues would have the guts to stand up to Donald Trump, and now, they’ll have to explain it to the people they represent.
What I can tell you is that this is not going away. They voted to take health care from 17 million people, and I’m going to make sure they face the consequences.
[**I will be fighting tooth and nail to help retake the House and Senate next year so we can roll back the damage Trump and his loyalists have done. Please, chip in a grassroots donation to help.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25/.CXgdOY&refcode=em250703-1-600&t=3&akid=6113%2E6688874%2EpAikAx)

name: Derek Tran
subject: House Republicans should be ashamed.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110811152/555400416/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY4YjUzMGMtM2Y1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w20-qyYzWIsNNEL73QZUIPf2ZOn5QLI9bpcyoiA3dos=)
**House Republicans just betrayed the American people by passing Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – or as it should really be known, the Big Ugly Bill.**

17 million Americans – including 2 million Californians – stand to lose access to health care. 4 million children will lose access to the food assistance program, SNAP. And $4 trillion will be added to the national debt, all to hand tax breaks to billionaires and corporations.

I was proud to vote NO. Even after I was stranded at the Pittsburgh airport and had to drive down to Washington with a Democratic colleague, I knew I had to perform my duty to CA-45 and stand against this disastrous bill.

House Republicans demonstrated that they don’t value their constituents. Instead, they put the MAGA agenda ahead of the needs of working families in their districts.

It’s disgraceful, and we have the opportunity next year to take the House majority and hold this administration accountable.

**[If you’re fired up to make a difference, it starts right here in critical races like mine. Three seats separate the majority, and every vote counts. clean_body: | = House Republicans just betrayed the American people by passing Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – or as it should really be known, the Big Ugly Bill. 17 million Americans – including 2 million Californians – stand to lose access to health care. 4 million children will lose access to the food assistance program, SNAP. And $4 trillion will be added to the national debt, all to hand tax breaks to billionaires and corporations. I was proud to vote NO. Even after I was stranded at the Pittsburgh airport and had to drive down to Washington with a Democratic colleague, I knew I had to perform my duty to CA-45 and stand against this disastrous bill. House Republicans demonstrated that they don’t value their constituents. Instead, they put the MAGA agenda ahead of the needs of working families in their districts. It’s disgraceful, and we have the opportunity next year to take the House majority and hold this administration accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m going to continue to fight with all I have against the Trump agenda, and I need you with me. name: Deb Haaland
subject: I can assure you there is nothing “beautiful” about Trump’s bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Trump’s heartless spending bill just passed.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2998%2E400544%2EgaXeir)
Team,
Just moments ago, the Republican-led House voted to pass the so-called “big, beautiful bill,” sending it to Donald Trump’s desk for his signature into law.
**It’s important to me that you know that, if I were still serving in Congress, I’d have voted NO on this disaster of a bill.**
This heartless bill cuts vital services like food assistance and Medicaid from low-income families, the elderly, and people with disabilities in order to hand the biggest tax breaks to a handful of unfathomably wealthy individuals. This bill represents everything that’s wrong in Washington. I can assure you there is nothing remotely “beautiful” about it.
This moment is a harsh reminder that out-of-touch politicians in Washington won’t protect New Mexico’s working families – _so we must do everything in our power to protect ourselves._ That means organizing to protect our friends and neighbors and electing leaders who actually understand our struggles.
**Governors will be the first line of defense against the dangerous policies that Trump and his cruel enablers are enacting right now. That’s not a responsibility I take lightly.**
It is my solemn promise to you that as governor, I will wake up each day ready to fight fiercely for our communities. My New Mexico roots run 35 generations deep, but this campaign is about more than our past. Together, we can change the game for our state and build a future that uplifts us all.
**By passing smart, compassionate state policies here in New Mexico, we can mitigate the harm caused by Trump’s new budget bill – but that can only happen if we win this race first.[Will you donate your first $5 to grow our grassroots campaign? Any amount will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250703_1_trumpbill?amount=5&refcode=em20250703-2998&refcode2=2998_400544_gaXeir&akid=2998%2E400544%2EgaXeir)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250703_1_trumpbill?amount=5&refcode=em20250703-2998&refcode2=2998_400544_gaXeir&akid=2998%2E400544%2EgaXeir)**
I’m so grateful to have you on this team. Thank you for fighting with me.
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250703-1&t=2&refcode2=2998_400544_gaXeir&akid=2998%2E400544%2EgaXeir)**

name: Shontel Brown
subject: The American people deserve better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Come after our families, we’re coming after your seats.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110811389/555401154/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250702breaking_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFmNWUzMy0zZjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PGqV7pzbQ0WZRnYcat2ainkR_AteaBc133aPDP_qkfg=) Peter,

As Republicans rushed through Trump’s Big Ugly Bill, I was on the House floor to ask my Republican colleagues a very important question: How exactly does taking food away from struggling families, seniors, and veterans make this country safer? Stronger? More secure? Healthier? Or dare I say it – _great?_

**It doesn’t. But Republicans in the House just approved it anyway.** This policy is meant to punish those who can least afford it in order to give massive tax handouts to the rich. It will stick states in a corner, forcing them to cut benefits and eligibility, or to cut public safety, education, housing, mental health programs, and more. _**It’s cruel, reckless, and just plain wrong.**_

**Come Election Day, we must remember this very critical fact: Republicans in Congress voted to make the largest cut to Medicaid in history and the largest cut to SNAP in history, all so the wealthiest Americans can get more tax breaks they don’t need. We cannot let them get away with it.**

[**The American people deserve better. Help us make sure Republicans regret this vote by reclaiming the House. Will you join her and be the change we need? ****=** ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

name: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna
subject: DEADLINE EXTENDED: We can’t play catch-up anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dear Friend, I’m sharing some bad news with you today.
Unfortunately, House Republicans fell short on our End-of-Quarter goal. This wasn’t easy to swallow, and I’m sure you’re just as disappointed to hear this as I was.
But I'm not one to give up easily. As a proud Air Force veteran and Congresswoman, I’ve seen my fair share of tough fights, and I know that with the right mindset and determination, we can still come out on top. That's why I worked to get the deadline extended by ONE MORE DAY.
[Fellow patriot, you have ONE LAST CHANCE to ensure House Republicans and our America First agenda can keep up the fight for our Nation.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aKJ3/?__vbtrk=MzAwNDk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNDk5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[RUSH $25

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: The fate of the bill is up to SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Republican budget will be challenged in court. That means the MAGA justices will get the final say. | |
---
Peter, **The House just passed Trump’s budget, and Trump is expected to sign it into law tomorrow.** **This budget is one of the most unpopular bills in history.** Why? It cuts Medicaid and SNAP benefits while raising energy costs and student loan bills to fund tax breaks for billionaires. It defunds Planned Parenthood, guts unions, and gives ICE more power to attack immigrants. And the whole thing adds $3 trillion to the deficit _even after a trillion dollars in Medicaid cuts_. The bill’s unpopularity means it will be challenged in court—as it rightly should. The Trump administration won’t let this bill die in a lower court. Their billionaire buddies have spent too much money to allow that. **That means the MAGA justices on the Supreme Court will ultimately get the final say on the awful provisions in this budget.** Bills like this are _exactly_ why right-wing extremists spent billions of dollars and decades corrupting our judiciary system. When they try to fundamentally remake American society and economics, they want justices who will give them a rubber stamp. [**The budget isn’t just a legislative fight. The Supreme Court will get the final say on whether the bill’s awful provisions live on. Our fight to hold the MAGA justices accountable is more important than ever. Rush a donation today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvQXUlumIXBDWsXs9os91zqjJbGLiJfH_lLfBRwS08IhFT4OzKX6kWanyrNMDl_bJVy3KB3AHCUj4VubUM_iikeyVq3dAJ4mh_0nNPZUeQcqrBgBdc2Erj5-UZXRZwp42Eq17tlF4FOfo9ur96GSnZ_aK2NqjUuwgwUx99Umot-m9OuxVyxup8za2jWQ11tQfYucfngn8c2YGpjNXrAakMESslrC-S2dJSpHDIZw3L_qkGISznat78-2dBfJCHxvvMBmdefNaxRm_aJTL7ay1uFl6ekglouwhhonxkHHN7TpZZnKLGnlY3GjN2M-VN1ONAPpdVkkqucB4oVrQ3mXMOQ/4hv/A6UipulYS0m1POtQ7h8Bfg/h0/h001.Rx1QOO67IR42lf-VqUOzakkhj_L5IRv573NoDnhue4o) [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvQXUlumIXBDWsXs9os91zqjJbGLiJfH_lLfBRwS08IhG_EO3e_iDfG_LO9yTlqOaWiP4lV2Aoya9Nt9Pnt3AvDpPvvzCs9zPYjYMKJiFVbJSsA4IBvCAiNYlMfaDfoI4A9Lv7r-eCoXntaRXUpbNBQGV4UUaX2R7Y17w49wTbfN9Y3FOeEudWqVzB9mh57PMghEQTAli9xJnYA-NREx5IESPK5FeCR3UIVhtuZaUQExkEAAux_-Z_81tVQAzQbO1RE8j8IOUasphl2T-sXd7iKFpepWeiqjwwk1Yo_IMFsI9OR_UF0f2G_KhgEEAIC48yZWRxWiZNh7AjGcCzG1VsY/4hv/A6UipulYS0m1POtQ7h8Bfg/h1/h001.7bIj1SWABv1DbS3iqK9tMzGr1Twe2vZpL1ild0djH9o) The Republican budget was drafted extremely quickly and shoddily. The Republican senators and representatives who voted yes barely had time to read the full bill—and many of them voted yes in spite of their myriad concerns. Even as they raced toward passage, they were discovering sections of the bill that seem to incentivize fraud in SNAP benefits. The hasty drafting process leaves a mess that the Courts will clean up. **The judicial branch will have to step in to settle the disputes that arise from the budget.** In a democracy, the Supreme Court would overturn the undemocratic cuts to vital services and stop Trump from weaponizing ICE. **But a judiciary packed with MAGA loyalists could actually have the opposite effect—with rulings allowing Trump to take his dangerous agenda even further.** Just look at the Republican response to the Affordable Care Act. Their lawfare made the bill worse, not better, for the American people. [**We can’t depend on the Supreme Court to stop the worst provisions of this budget. In fact, it’s up to We the People to take back our democracy and our judiciary before they can make it worse. name: George Whitesides
subject: House Republicans just betrayed the nation.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header]
This is morally reprehensible, Peter.

After an all-nighter in Congress, House Republicans have rallied to pass Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – or, more accurately, his Big Ugly Bill.

In California alone, the impact of this bill is staggering:

❌ Up to 5 million adults could lose Medi-Cal.
❌ 286,000 adults with school-age children who rely on CalFresh to feed their families will have that assistance cut.
❌ Local hospitals that rely on federal support will be forced to reduce services or close altogether.
❌ Energy bills will increase by hundreds of dollars.

And what is it all for? To give handouts to billionaires and corporations, while raising our national debt by over $4 TRILLION.

This is an incredibly bad bill. Full stop.

I’m proud to stand with House Democrats, particularly Leader Jeffries who spent 8+ hours on the House floor sharing heartbreaking personal stories from Americans who will have their lives changed forever by this legislation.

I know the outlook seems bleak, Peter, but we must hold this reckless administration accountable. It starts with working to flip the House blue – and this seat is key. Will you chip in $3 to stand with me in this fight?

Thank you,

George

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-7.3.25-all
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? clean_body: [] This is morally reprehensible, Peter. After an all-nighter in Congress, House Republicans have rallied to pass Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – or, more accurately, his Big Ugly Bill. In California alone, the impact of this bill is staggering: ❌ Up to 5 million adults could lose Medi-Cal. ❌ 286,000 adults with school-age children who rely on CalFresh to feed their families will have that assistance cut. ❌ Local hospitals that rely on federal support will be forced to reduce services or close altogether. ❌ Energy bills will increase by hundreds of dollars. And what is it all for? To give handouts to billionaires and corporations, while raising our national debt by over $4 TRILLION. This is an incredibly bad bill. Full stop. I’m proud to stand with House Democrats, particularly Leader Jeffries who spent 8+ hours on the House floor sharing heartbreaking personal stories from Americans who will have their lives changed forever by this legislation. I know the outlook seems bleak, Peter, but we must hold this reckless administration accountable. It starts with working to flip the House blue – and this seat is key. name: Team NPP
subject: The GOP way: Slashing healthcare and food assistance to give handouts to the rich.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
| | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz5lM5B4-2FXq1Zv5A9UwINUXwz5yDfbea-2BhqkX-2Fa9Xu20TDXub4bx9V7Bn49iC9UvWHuusrFkli79WD0oB1vhLDHlz9VS1HL55sIOBvVVzY-2FiauY6Hk2RF4vlHdapMfoZmvk-3DGWWB_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYqenn-2FgJCjHz238zX2OudJD3ZIfH9R3IyH8N66w0ddwYeBepv2xR-2Bm9LhMvoE4RZescb0SGrS7-2BshFlTrPhma1oN0hX0LrRcTDCVdBTo5Gkb4eSDZ6d8Ipgy9qc67AtqgE6aG3ZjibqSUXLwVCBczrCSYB7-2BCJ9V4pNXOjXNiwx9u0xpvtqxsbF4hqBvsL0T1)
---
Fellow activist,

Recently, Republicans in Congress voted to pass the budget reconciliation bill, also known as the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” This bill shows us clearly where the priorities of the Trump regime and the GOP lie.

This bill includes the most significant cuts in U.S. history to Medicaid and SNAP, as well as other critical programs and services that millions of people in Pennsylvania rely on. In fact, they voted to strip away health care and food assistance from **tens of millions of people in our country** and **hundreds of thousands in our state.** This budget puts working families directly in the crosshairs while billionaires and trillionaires walk away with fatter pockets.

**To put the impact of this bill in perspective for Pennsylvania:**
---
* Two million adults and 1.4 million children rely on Medicaid.
* 400,000 seniors use it for long-term care.
* Two million Pennsylvanians depend on SNAP to afford groceries.
* Medicaid cuts could cost the state 49,000 jobs and wipe out $5.3 billion in economic activity.[**
**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKRyDewRX47ey8TnekMnotMo9ERWo9cis37AWJtg-2BEqC2kO0-2BV9t2TcP3mTTUnQrNbVSe88v5HyG-2Bfz9jylmg7WDA-3DQ7HA_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYqenn-2FgJCjHz238zX2OudJD3ZIfH9R3IyH8N66w0ddwZtCjKZiUO0wDRmK4OGtBahFN-2F4nuQkdEwwurYfO6pki9kwbQ4SIjsTA-2BUfotpsd6dfj2-2FS-2FnT-2FI8qs7CqDYUTabKCUGGeqMAmER7Rr6rcsXAZAJTGgvrIv6WSoBsZcrSwCwwtz9AsEbrMnN1-2FPS3sK)

---
If this bill is signed into law, all of these programs will be slashed, making it more difficult for families to make ends meet. The kicker? Republicans voted to add trillions of dollars to our national debt.

All of this is happening so they can give massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy who don’t need it. _**This will be arguably the worst bill to ever be passed in America’s history. **_

We always like to say that a budget is a moral document – and anyone who voted for this bill should be ashamed of themselves. Trump’s Big Un-beautiful Bill will have real-life consequences for the people of Pennsylvania, and we need to continue to organize to fight back. [**
This is just another example of why it’s so critical that we engage our centered communities on the ground and make sure voters understand the role that elected officials play in their everyday lives. Help us engage our centered communities by rushing $25 or more today →**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz5lM5B4-2FXq1Zv5A9UwINUXwz5yDfbea-2BhqkX-2Fa9Xu20TDXub4bx9V7Bn49iC9UvWHuusrFkli79WD0oB1vhLDHlq54ArNc7DK7rDy7cftq4Y4xZAqycW9-2Fsw4uzSRUhDNY1b5stk7tCMhowmpVb2tgAOfHB_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYqenn-2FgJCjHz238zX2OudJD3ZIfH9R3IyH8N66w0ddwaAQd8RJySUJDVbCSI45Zt3xVJkyn8-2BJlxktV399q8k5UR-2BWkjEX8fsO-2Bk2IGKQQGABYzccXUFp34VKb-2BYkpghuRMFnF1jqCecNTmp-2FCw4qAVsYKoB136rh0SC1dgtr4J5RhoxA-2Bm0bP3XE1clz9VRV)
---
In this together,

Team NPP
---
_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Recently, Republicans in Congress voted to pass the budget reconciliation bill, also known as the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” This bill shows us clearly where the priorities of the Trump regime and the GOP lie. This bill includes the most significant cuts in U.S. history to Medicaid and SNAP, as well as other critical programs and services that millions of people in Pennsylvania rely on. In fact, they voted to strip away health care and food assistance from tens of millions of people in our country and hundreds of thousands in our state. This budget puts working families directly in the crosshairs while billionaires and trillionaires walk away with fatter pockets. To put the impact of this bill in perspective for Pennsylvania: Two million adults and 1.4 million children rely on Medicaid. 400,000 seniors use it for long-term care. Two million Pennsylvanians depend on SNAP to afford groceries. Medicaid cuts could cost the state 49,000 jobs and wipe out $5.3 billion in economic activity. If this bill is signed into law, all of these programs will be slashed, making it more difficult for families to make ends meet. The kicker? Republicans voted to add trillions of dollars to our national debt. All of this is happening so they can give massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy who don’t need it. This will be arguably the worst bill to ever be passed in America’s history. We always like to say that a budget is a moral document – and anyone who voted for this bill should be ashamed of themselves. Trump’s Big Un-beautiful Bill will have real-life consequences for the people of Pennsylvania, and we need to continue to organize to fight back. In this together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Because of Van Orden, people will die
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110812771/555406057/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhlOTdjYS00MDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-6RHcXSrGspqnB2DIRJoS6NB6txesEumqC0XoxwY7o=&emci=76c32d98-4058-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d38e97ca-4058-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223)
**Derrick Van Orden just voted to screw over our district, Peter.** Because of his vote to give billionaires another tax break, WI-03 is about to have: ❌ 32,669 folks lose healthcare ❌ 34,393 families losing food assistance ❌ 1,808 energy jobs wiped out ❌ And at least one rural hospital at risk of closure **It’s sick.** Derrick Van Orden spent months claiming he would protect rural health access, and he lied right to our faces. Call me crazy, but I believe _every_ Wisconsin life is valuable regardless of your income, and that we need our country to work for the people who actually keep it running. **WI-03 was one of the closest races in 2024. Now, voters can clearly see how Van Orden stands – with party bosses and elites, NOT with us. And together, we can finish the job and bring our district back to the working folks.** [**If you’re as mad as I am, rush a $3 donation to flip WI-03 and get DVO out so Congress can actually work for working people again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110812773/555406060/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.3.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhlOTdjYS00MDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-6RHcXSrGspqnB2DIRJoS6NB6txesEumqC0XoxwY7o=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | ****[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110812775/555406062/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.3.25-all-c&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhlOTdjYS00MDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-6RHcXSrGspqnB2DIRJoS6NB6txesEumqC0XoxwY7o=)****

name: Noah Widmann
subject: I’m running for Congress -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbacecf79-cc03-4cd4-8af1-18e7247e63f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf45f4900-bda5-41c5-889e-4c17a3127a51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, most people in Congress didn’t grow up like me. My name is Noah Widmann. I’m not a politician, but I’m proud to be running as a Democrat for Florida’s 7th Congressional District. Look here: For as long as I’ve been alive (29 years!), being wealthy and well connected has been the only path to winning a Congressional seat and representing the people. I’ve spent my entire life watching Congress get older, richer, and further from the people they are actually elected to fight for. I rarely see folks like me – a teen parent who worked as a fry cook for $8 an hour — in office. But I’ve been defying the odds my whole life – and with your help, we can do it again. [That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Unlike most candidates for Congress, I don’t have millions of dollars to fund my campaign. There aren’t a lot of former fry cooks in Congress. I hate that to run a winning campaign, it takes millions of dollars. Truly, this system is messed up! But Peter — I refuse to accept that only the ultra-wealthy should run for office. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split a $15 donation between myself and Blue Amp Action? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5849fa1d-8c8d-40ad-bb6e-68c09be0ac0e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m a heck of a lot different than most members of Congress. I was raised by a single, disabled mother in central Florida. We lived in Section 8 housing and relied on food stamps to get by. The system was meant to work against people like me. When I secured a path to college through a wrestling scholarship, I thought I had broken the cycle of poverty. But on what was meant to be my first day of class, I found out I was going to be a father. So I made a new plan: Do whatever it takes to ensure my daughter can succeed in life. My daughter Elizabeth is 10 years old now. And her father — who worked day and night to provide for her — is running for Congress. [When I decided to run for Congress to fight for working-class families like mine, I knew I wouldn’t have the same connections as the D.C. insiders. But, Peter: I can’t take on this fight alone. I’ll need the support of folks like you to prove I have what it takes to win this race, defeat MAGA extremist Cory Mills, and flip the House for Democrats. Can I count on you to support my campaign by splitting $15 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action before midnight? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3f3c15b-b5eb-41d4-8a90-a8fad3e14c26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, when I was 18, I worked as a fry cook, bagged groceries at Publix, and did anything I could to pay the bills. I worked night shifts as an EMT to put myself through community college, becoming the first in my family to attend university — then law school. Now I fight to make sure people get the benefits they’ve earned and rely on, like Social Security. So when I see our Congressman attack working families like mine, it’s not just about politics. It’s deeply personal. [Peter, I’m not running for Congress because I have deep pockets or connections that can get me elected — I’m running in spite of that. I’m running to break the cycle and ensure everyone has a seat at the table. I’ve seen how hard it is to change a system that wasn’t built for folks like me to win. But I’ve also seen what’s possible when people join together, organize, and build change. So please: Can I count on you to split a $15 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action, become a Founding Donor, and help me pull off a historic victory? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5327629c-1709-4fa4-8c55-6598b1573393/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92d497a6-7abd-43a0-a5d8-f468ec11843b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Retaliation is the MAGA Machine’s M.O.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| The MAGA Machine doesn’t know how to govern — **they just know how to retaliate.** When Californians held demonstrations against Trump’s mass deportation operation last week, he spent hundreds of millions of dollars. Kristi Noem arrested Rep. LaMonica McIver and detained Sen. Alex Padilla because they dared speak out against her and the DHS. **In true authoritarian fashion, this administration continues to raise the stakes of speaking out against them. But I’ve been the target of their retribution before, and I’m not afraid to continue holding their feet to the fire to demand accountability now.** [**Friend, our path to taking down Trump goes _directly_ through the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees. And as one of the senior-most Democrats on both, I’m ready to go toe-to-toe with MAGA. If you’re ready to help us take down Trump once and for all, split a donation between me and Seth Moulton so we can be ready for any and all attacks they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110812971/555406664/265156787?refcode=250703_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk4NWQ1Mi00MDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2Cz0PvXfY7bfSYPaXXhecSRav9MF5Rns3a0kwwADeU=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110812973/555406666/-288956247?refcode=250703_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk4NWQ1Mi00MDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2Cz0PvXfY7bfSYPaXXhecSRav9MF5Rns3a0kwwADeU=) I’ve been kicked off the House Intelligence Committee for my investigations into Trump’s role in instigating January 6. **I’ve been placed on FBI Director Kash Patel’s “hit list” for my work holding corrupt Republicans accountable. Friend, Trump and all his allies know I’ll never be scared into submission, and that’s why they’ve spent the last 3+ years fighting to silence me.** **But I didn’t back down then — and I never will.[So, if you’re able, please split a donation between me and Seth Moulton so we can continue speaking truth to power.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110812975/555406668/265156787?refcode=250703_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk4NWQ1Mi00MDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2Cz0PvXfY7bfSYPaXXhecSRav9MF5Rns3a0kwwADeU=)** — Eric

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: RE: One Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Extreme House Republicans just approved the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history to fund tax breaks for their billionaire donors.

| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813101/555407144/-1253252251?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250703_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2EwZDc0Yi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-QVBTC6bn-LAgSw2aA2fqe7_ys2bcfeYXy3CT0VNgNE=)** Extreme House Republicans just approved the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history to fund tax breaks for their billionaire donors.

**The latest GOP stunt will rip healthcare away from 17 MILLION Americans, jack up our utility bills and take food out of the mouths of children, seniors and veterans. It’s disgusting.**

I won’t be silent. You shouldn’t be either. **[If enough Democrats band together, we can ensure Republicans will always regret this vote. I’m calling for an emergency fundraising surge today – 5,000 Democratic Membership before midnight – to show everyone watching that when Republicans go after our families, we’re coming for their seats. Can I count on you to confirm your membership by splitting a donation between me and Defend Democracy Now so we can rush resources to battleground districts, reclaim the House majority and hand the right-wing extremists a stunning rebuke? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813102/555407145/-1253252251?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250703_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2EwZDc0Yi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-QVBTC6bn-LAgSw2aA2fqe7_ys2bcfeYXy3CT0VNgNE=)** | **2025 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER**

ID: **155323524**

MEMBERSHIP: **UNCONFIRMED**

As Democrats, we face a clear choice in this consequential moment:
