name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: Teichert in the Trenches - July 2025
body:
I ended up doing 39 live TV interviews during the last two weeks...
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - July 2025
Welcome to this month’s installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/JzDvtK_dLhkC)
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/z4_SQ-PMfB3v)
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/nh7EQXgxkmbU)
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/m_Vgqfs5qt9t)
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/D9SyeOM5reB7)
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/zKH-1XZmTj4T)
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/L7mshxAkKYUo)
---
| | | I admit that I’m a bit lost about what to put here this month. The media pace during the Iran/Israel conflict was relentless (I included a few clips of the progression of activity). I ended up doing 39 live TV interviews during those two weeks (18 for NewsNation, 13 for Fox News, and 8 others). I responded to real time news on the first day of the conflict, the B-2 strike, the President’s White House announcement, the attacks on Al Udeid, and the announcement of the ceasefire. I sat on set for two hours straight as a panel member and stood in front of big screens to speak about battle damage and regional maps. It was an exhausting, nerve racking, and exhilarating whirlwind – and I loved it.
---
|
---
This picture is maybe my favorite way to capture the media blitz. Shortly after the B-2 strike, Leland Vittert invited me to join him on set as his “anchor buddy”. Basically, I sat there with him for 3 1⁄2 hours of live coverage and provided running commentary as he saw fit. It was a tiring blast!
| [ Interview with Chuck Todd](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/JRDOu2iWqI7W)
---
|
---
🎙️ I was massively honored to do a long-form interview with Chuck Todd about the conflict in Iran for his new show “Sunday Night with Chuck Todd.” It aired this past Sunday, and I thoroughly enjoyed the opportunity to expand upon the thoughts that I’ve been sharing in shorter news interviews for the past two weeks with this news media icon.

🎬 You can view it on a new, quality App called Noosphere (where you can get a free 30-day trial). If you are looking for high quality news, Noosphere is well worth a look. ** _Thoughts By Teichert_**
| | | |
---
| | | | [ Click here to Order!](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5PXfhtiO5INJ3KFnk/kxxTqt9qa7G7 "US absence in the world is as dangerous as US weakness")
---
| | | "The Dragon Who Earned His Wings" was released to the public on July 1st. Please pick up a copy and tell your friends about this fun story of resilience, leadership, and innovation!
---
| | | | [ "US Warfighter are
losing a massive..."](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwrgUf4sXZOCbnIYO0/OykCsjCDtned "Prayers for a Nation")
---
| | | Thanks to Fox News for published these thoughts on the criticality of properly utilizing commercial space capabilities. “In his second term, President Trump has a historic opportunity to usher in another era of American space dominance—while giving the warfighter the tools and information they need. But this future hinges on a thriving commercial space sector supported by smart, forward-thinking policy.” ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
---
| | | |
---
| | | Sharing Cross-cutting Conservative Principles With Key Leaders 🦀

📣 I was honored this week to speak to a great group of Latino and Hispanic Republicans in the great state of Maryland. Conservative principles of minimizing government intrusion resonate with everyone! Thanks to Alfonso Talavera for inviting me and for your stellar leadership!

💥 And, it was a great break to speak about something other than the conflict between Iran and Israel which has otherwise been dominating my time.
---
|
---
| | | 💥 30 Years Later – Connections that last are priceless 💥

📣 Craig Wills and I met in the summer of 1995, and spent the next year together in pilot training. We have stayed in touch as friends and Airmen over the years and the miles, and it was such a joy to listen to him KILL IT as the guest speaker at the AFROTC Commissioning ceremony at Baylor University this year!

🔥 Carefully and deliberately cultivate relationships and friendships. They are invaluable!
---
| | | |
---
⛪ Five Remarkable Graduates – Providing Hope for Society⛪

🎇 Our church (GraceWay Baptist in DC) held a great backyard party earlier this month for our high school graduates – Thanks to Team Wells for Hosting! Joe Kirby had the great idea of having a graduate panel as a part of our celebration, and Bobby Lundberg and I were fortunate enough to moderate.

📣 The questions were about family, faith, church, school, and life. They were thought-provoking, they were fun, and they were funny. The responses and the demeanor of the graduates were thoughtful, poised, community-minded, faith-driven, and articulate. It was a great example of the ability of the younger generation to be ready to make a positive difference on our society – one we desperately need!

🔥 With young people like these, the future is bright! 🔥
PIC CREDITS: Johanna Wells ** _Behind the Scenes_**
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | | A couple of sharp pictures from Noah’s waning days with us before launching to Vanderbilt on a Navy ROTC scholarship – representing Vandy, with his Prom Date, and talking a pic at Graduation.
---
| | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDhYHcZvsAP4JMNKzgWGO/t9xl5SJ42fH8)
---
🚀 “It will take you to places you never dreamed of!”

💥 Thanks to my friend and USAF Test Pilot School classmate Nick Hague for this out-of-this-world greeting to the officers commissioning into the USAF and USSF from Baylor ROTC.

🔥 We are very fortunate to have such a motivated group of Airmen and Guardians joining our force to Support and Defend the Constitution of the United States!
| [ k2andcompany.com](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE9szp0KEGKEZQCiofFyS/ku26PgQz-2Dt)
---
I would be massively remiss if I didn’t give a huge shout out to Preya Samsundar, Kirsten Kukowski, and the entire team at K2 & Co. They were the campaign communications team for my run for U.S. Senate (they literally grilled me 4 hours a week with the toughest of interview questions so that I would be ready for anything and everything that someone could throw my way), and they continue to be my media gurus. The onslaught of requests for interviews during the Iran/Israel conflict was overwhelming, and they managed all of it brilliantly. Thanks a ton to this world-class team! ** _My Bookshelf_**
|
---
Typically on vacation I let my daughter Tiffany (a prolific fiction reader) pick out a book for me to read during the trip. This year, this was her selection. It was clearly nothing I would have ever selected based on my own nonfiction reading list (aka “boring” in the mind of Tiffany), but it was thought-provoking, powerful, and enjoyable. To give you a sense of the subject matter, the following is a note from author: “This novel isn’t about happy endings. It is about the beautiful and terrible moments that make up a life and the possibilities that live in even the darkest of places that sometimes we are just too blind to see.”
| | | |
---
“Hope is an audacious thing – it dares to blossom in adversity’s shadow, urging fractured souls toward the promise of a new day. And as I lay there, a mosaic of vulnerability and resilience, I began to understand that hope was not just a fleeting sentiment. It was the essence of our shared humanity, the heartbeat of a world that refused to succumb to despair ... I looked up at the stars beginning to pepper the darkening canvas above, each one a distant beacon of possibility. Their steadfast light reminded me that even in the darkest times, there are pinpricks of hope waiting to be seen. And as long as we keep our gaze upward and our strides forward, the path ahead is bound to be illuminated by the unexpected joys of a life reclaimed.”
|
---
“Create a culture of hospitality. Which means addressing questions I’ve spent my career asking: How do you make the people who work for you and the people you serve feel seen and valued? How do you give them a sense of belonging? How do you make them feel part of something bigger than themselves? How do you make them feel welcome? ... When you create a hospitality-first culture, everything about your business improves – whether that means finding the retaining great talent, turning customers into raving fans, or increasing your profitability. It’s my hope this book will be part of the movement ushering in this new era. But my motivation isn’t your bottom line – or not my only one, anyway. Because what I’d really like to do is let you in on a little secret, one that the truly great professionals in my business know: hospitality is a selfish pleasure. If feels great to make other people feel good.”
|
---
“They stood in the mouth of the cave and watched them. The bombers were high now in fast, ugly arrow-heads beating the sky apart with the noise of their motors. They are shaped like sharks, Robert Jordan thought, the wide-finned, sharp-nosed sharks of the Gulf Stream. But these, wide-finned in silver, roaring, the light mist of their propellers in the sun, these do not move like sharks. They move like no thing there has never been. They move like mechanized doom.” “Today is only one day in all the days that will ever be. But what will happen in all the other days that ever come can depend on what you do today.”
|
---
| | | “The classical world was far closer to the makers of the American Revolution and the founders of the United States than it is to us today. Nowadays the Greeks and Romans are remote to us, their works studied by a few in college and then largely forgotten even by most of those readers. But Greco-Roman antiquity was not distant to the leaders of the American Revolution. It was present in their lives, as part of their political vocabulary and as the foundation of their personal values. In short, it shaped their view of the world in a way that most Americans now are not taught and so don’t see.” ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**
---
|
---
| [ Unexpected Source of Deliverance (June 7th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsEcDi1QiaMFOpU26ddzgW/hSV6gDZNwOHb "Pronouns Matter")
---
| [ Multi-Generational Responsibilities (June 14th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsF4YQDr6wSAZ5XrUScjOa/kOMYrI3PjnRm "Finding the Stars")
---
| [ Carefully Designed and Calibrated... (Nov 16th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsFWt8QHVIY5jLbgsHbT6e/hbroE2b3GvM4 "We Must Listen")
---
| [ Miraculous Outcomes
(June 28th)](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsFzDqchtee0tbfWG6aCoi/u0wDBuR6DrB4 "Transforming Common Days into Thanksgiving")
---
| | | **_Blasts from the Past_**
---
| [ "US and China Deterrence in the Danger Zone"](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsGRYYp8I0jw3rjLdvYwWm/R72KcHTFf8y1)
---
| | | Keys to Deterrence and Defending Taiwan from a Chinese Invasion(from January 2023)

💥 "It is critical to communicate in a way that increases uncertainty, fear, and doubt." Please see my publication from two years ago that stresses this important element of deterrence. ** _Rejoin Opportunities_** I’ll be speaking at a men’s leadership meeting (Saturday, July 5th) and preaching in church (Sunday, July 6th) at Lakeside Baptist Church in Beach Island, South Carolina. I’ll be signing copies of my books at EAA Oshkosh (Author’s Corner) on Friday, July 25th and Saturday, July 26th. I’ll be speaking at the EAA Chapel (Fellowship of the Wing) on Friday, July 25th at 7am. I’ll be speaking at Meeting in the Air (Wings as Eagles) on Sunday, July 27th at Wyldewood Baptist Church at 11am in Oshkosh, Wisconsin. ** _Dad Joke of the Month_** Why do people from England call themselves Bri-ish instead of British? Because we threw their T in the harbor!
---
| | | |
---
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---

Rejoin Opportunities I’ll be speaking at a men’s leadership meeting (Saturday, July 5th) and preaching in church (Sunday, July 6th) at Lakeside Baptist Church in Beach Island, South Carolina. I’ll be signing copies of my books at EAA Oshkosh (Author’s Corner) on Friday, July 25th and Saturday, July 26th. I’ll be speaking at the EAA Chapel (Fellowship of the Wing) on Friday, July 25th at 7am. I’ll be speaking at Meeting in the Air (Wings as Eagles) on Sunday, July 27th at Wyldewood Baptist Church at 11am in Oshkosh, Wisconsin. Dad Joke of the Month Why do people from England call themselves Bri-ish instead of British? Because we threw their T in the harbor! | | | | | | | | Teichert in the Trenches | Washington, DC | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter. | |

name: Team DNC
subject: BREAKING: House Republicans vote to kick 17 million people off health care
body:
---
Derek, **House Republicans just passed the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history.** [**If that’s all you need to hear and you’re in a position to make a $3 contribution to help Democrats flip the House and Senate, please use this link to support the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250703_3872_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3872_22930333_YMEu3q&akid=3872%2E22930333%2EYMEu3q) Here’s why this fight is so important: Thanks to Trump’s billionaire-first budget bill, 17 million people will lose health care coverage, and 5 million are at risk of losing food assistance. The consequences of this bill will be devastating for millions of people. One in four nursing homes will be forced to close their doors. Over 300 rural hospitals are at risk of shutting down or reducing services. Energy prices will go up by hundreds of dollars for families all over the country. Congressional Republicans know this bill is overwhelmingly unpopular. For months now, they’ve seen the polling and heard stories from their constituents about the harm the bill would do — but instead of fighting for the people they represent, they’re choosing Trump and his billionaire backers... _again_. Now, it’s up to us to vote them out. [**If you’re with us, please pitch in to support the DNC today. We will put your contribution to work organizing nationwide to hold accountable the Republicans who voted for this bill, and laying the groundwork to defeat them as we take back Congress:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250703_3872_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3872_22930333_YMEu3q&akid=3872%2E22930333%2EYMEu3q) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250703_3872_fr&refcode2=3872_22930333_YMEu3q&akid=3872%2E22930333%2EYMEu3q)**

name: Colin Allred
subject: I have an exciting announcement to make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Friend, Colin Allred here, and I have some exciting news to share: I officially launched my campaign this week to be Texas’ next U.S. Senator. [**Will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and Ohio House Dems right now to help me raise $1 million in the first few days of my campaign for Senate? I need your support so we can flip Texas blue and take on the corrupt politicians like John Cornyn and Ken Paxton who are rigging the economy against hard working Texans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813497/555408538/-347916430?refcode=250703_Allred_ToMake&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGVjYWI4ZC00MjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIx2D931-JfUlwslcLJ-ODXfP3MPYPkAMG2wiQd3ORs=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813498/555408553/-347916430?refcode=250703_Allred_ToMake&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGVjYWI4ZC00MjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIx2D931-JfUlwslcLJ-ODXfP3MPYPkAMG2wiQd3ORs=)** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813499/555408554/-1418661292?refcode=250703_Allred_ToMake&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGVjYWI4ZC00MjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIx2D931-JfUlwslcLJ-ODXfP3MPYPkAMG2wiQd3ORs= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**

Here's why you giving $5 today matters more than ever:
\- Republicans are already in a messy primary, with front-runner Texas AG Ken Paxton trying to throw doctors in jail for providing abortion care.
**\- Now, not just one but TWO brand-new polls show me _leading_ in this race.**

body:
Every state Republican who backed the MAGA agenda is complicit. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**_BREAKING:_ Trump’s disastrous billionaire-first budget bill just passed Congress ** The MAGA movement has once again failed the American people. This new law will leave nearly 17 million Americans without health care, slash funding for food support, and cut basic services. This bill is a wrecking ball to state budgets, and the consequences will be felt in our communities for decades. **Republicans passed the largest transfer of wealth in American history from working families to the wealthiest, and every state Republican who backed the MAGA agenda is complicit.** The balance of power in our statehouses directly impacts access to health care, especially under this new bill. We must hold state Republicans accountable for leaving working families behind and elect Democrats who will work to strengthen communities, not tear them down. [Donations to the DLCC fuel our work to protect and expand Democratic majorities in statehouses nationwide. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Big, ugly, dangerous, deadly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2588%2E4032634%2EV96M_1)
---
The Republicans in Congress who voted for this historically bad, deeply dangerous bill should be ashamed of themselves — but we know they won’t be. The hundreds of millions of Americans who will be worse off because of this awful bill should hold those Republicans accountable — but they only will if you make sure they know who did these things: Republicans in Congress are taking health care away completely from millions of people, and making it more expensive for tens of millions more. Republicans in Congress are transferring wealth from the working class and middle class to billionaires and big corporations. Republicans in Congress are spending tens of billions of dollars to expand the unconstitutional kidnapping, trafficking, and confinement of people who’ve committed no crime. Republicans in Congress are making sure that more people who are barely hanging on financially finally go broke, that more hungry children have even less to eat, and that sick people pay more to get care — or if they can’t, they just get sicker and die. America doesn’t have to be this way — and it’s important to remember on days like today that most Americans don’t even want America to be this way:
* Less than 200 days into his second term, a clear majority of Americans disapprove of what Trump is doing — the only president who has ever been less popular is Donald Trump in his first term.
* The 50 senators who voted against this bill represent tens of millions more Americans than the 50 who voted for it.
* The razor-thin majority that lets Republicans control the House was decided by a little more than 7,000 votes scattered across three districts in Iowa, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. That’s certainly no mandate — and when asked today a clear majority of Americans disapprove of them, too.

The majority of Americans don’t want this. And in less than 500 days a majority of Americans will be able to speak up and loudly reject Republicans in Congress in the midterm elections. I promise you: I am going to work every day to make sure the American people know who did this and hold them accountable. Today is a bad day for America, but a good day to renew that promise to yourself: stay in this fight. In solidarity,
Elizabeth Warren

---

---

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Make Republicans pay for this
body:
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=674%2E2563979%2ER6J-Am)

$5.
That is the donation Kamala Harris is asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee today. Especially today.
If you know we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will reverse the damage done by Donald Trump and the Republican Party use this link to give today:
**[https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/elect-democrats](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2991?t=2&akid=674%2E2563979%2ER6J-Am)**
A short while ago, Republicans passed a bill that will take away health care from 17 million Americans and cut food assistance programs in order to give tax cuts to some of the wealthiest people in the country.
And one of the saddest facts is that millions of people have no idea they are about to lose their health care.
Medicaid has been in the news, but in most states it's not even called that. In Louisiana it's called "Healthy Louisiana," in Connecticut it's called "Husky Health," in California it's called "Medi-Cal."
Those are people -- and many others -- who are going to need help. And it won’t be Republicans who give it to them. It’s gotta be us. Democrats.
It wasn't that long ago we had a Democratic president, House and Senate. And if we are going to undo the damage done by the Trump administration, we're going to need to do it again. And fast.
So we're asking:

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We will make them regret this vote
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We only needed a few votes to kill this in the House, and we literally needed ONE MORE VOTE in the Senate. If Lisa Murkowski or any other Republican had the courage to stand up to Trump, 17 million people would keep their health care
#

Peter, what we witnessed over the last month is disgusting.
The House passed a budget that does immense harm to the people who need help most — hungry kids, working parents, the elderly, veterans — in exchange for massive tax cuts to the most filthy rich people in the country.
The House kicked it to the Senate and they made it even worse. Bigger cuts. More damage. More cruelty.
They sent it back to the House yesterday, and the budget passed this afternoon. It’s going to Trump now, and he’ll sign it. They’ll take a victory lap and all the pundits and MAGA and the White House are going to talk about how massive and historic a win this is.
It’s sick. It’s absolutely sick.
Today, I’m devastated for the kids growing up like I did. My family didn’t have much, and what little help we got came from the government. It made a huge difference for us. That’s why I joined the Marines and why I ran for Congress. I wanted to give back to the country that gave me so much.
But I am absolutely furious about why this passed as well. We only needed a few votes to kill this in the House, and we literally needed ONE MORE VOTE in the Senate. If Lisa Murkowski had the courage to stand up to Trump, 17 million people would keep their health care and millions of families could put food on the table for their kids.
The worst part is, she publicly admits it. But instead of doing the right thing, Murkowski got side deals. Special tax breaks, extra cash, the worst kind of insider dealing. The Kodiak Kickback. An absolute betrayal, and everybody knows it.
But this isn’t over. Our job now is to hold every single Republican without a backbone accountable. We need to show America the scale of this corruption. I held an emergency town hall with Alaska Democrats last night to rally against Murkowski’s Fairbanks Flip Flop, and that’s just the start.
But keeping this up is going to take a huge, sustained grassroots mobilization, and that kind of campaign takes a ton of resources.
[**I am ready to make that happen. If you’re with me, can I count on you to make a donation and take the fight to the GOP and Trump? It will add up fast if a ton of people are chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250703-2-160&t=1&akid=3912%2E734936%2Eoh3UsG)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250703-2-160&t=2&akid=3912%2E734936%2Eoh3UsG)
I really appreciate the help.
Now, let’s make them regret this vote.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

|

You may have seen that Senator Susan Collins voted against Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill,” but make no mistake: **Susan Collins is responsible for this disastrous bill.** Instead of standing up for Maine families, she voted to allow the legislation to come to the Senate Floor, where it was guaranteed to pass**. We can’t let Susan Collins escape accountability.** **_Roll Call_ and the _Cook Political Report_ have ranked Susan Collins as one of the most vulnerable Senators up for re-election. If we're going to Flip the Senate blue, that starts with defeating Susan Collins in Maine — but we need to start gathering the resources today.** **[Chip in to help us defeat Republicans, hold them accountable, and Flip the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813717/555409246/-746039140?amount=&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQ0ZWUxOS00MzU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLHiixSTjtN_ybQi6xmmhBeQN4uzuTp8hz9XQDhqXEk=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813718/555409247/-788614911?refcode2=endb&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQ0ZWUxOS00MzU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLHiixSTjtN_ybQi6xmmhBeQN4uzuTp8hz9XQDhqXEk=)
---
This isn’t the first time Susan Collins has betrayed us. For years, Susan Collins has tried to sell herself as a moderate voice for Maine. But when it really mattered, she stood with Donald Trump — _at our expense._
* **Susan Collins voted for Trump’s massive tax cuts for their wealthy, right-wing friends.** The same bill that ballooned the deficit and set the stage for Republican attacks on Social Security and Medicare.
* **Susan Collins voted at least a dozen times to gut protections for pre-existing conditions.** Collins stood with the GOP in their efforts to dismantle the Affordable Care Act — putting healthcare for thousands of Mainers at risk.
* **Susan Collins cast the deciding vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh.** He went on to become the tie-breaking vote on the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade — ripping away reproductive rights for millions of women across the country.

Mainers deserve a senator who fights for working families — not one who cowers to Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda when it matters most.
**Flipping Susan Collins’ seat in 2026 is the first step to taking back the Senate. But that’s just the beginning — we need to win big across the country if we want to flip the Senate.**

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party July Newsletter
body:
A political home and a community.

|
## We Support Each Other (More than politics?)
* **In attempting to build a political home, we've also built a community.** We've met many people from across the state who volunteer to build this party in their available hours around their busy lives between major life events like Weddings, Moves, Career changes, School, Illnesses, and Family commitments. Presently, our leadership team is experiencing a number of these scenarios which present challenges as we enter what will be a very busy 4 months leading up to the 2025 elections. We remain in contact with and wish the best to each member that has recently needed to pause their activity. We look forward to having you back in action.

Election season is a challenging time to be short handed. We have a lot of work to do and ways folks like you can help. If you are someone that has been involved in the past or just paying attention from afar, now would be a great time to help us do all the things we have been working toward as we approach election season. **If you want to spend the next four months supporting great local candidates and building a new party that adds competition and decreases polarization, please email[pennsylvania@forwardparty.com](mailto:pennsylvania@forwardparty.com) (or just reply to this email) to learn more.**
* * *
## Serve Your Community
We will soon be announcing the candidates we're endorsing for the 2025 election season. We can't wait for you to meet these people who are volunteering to serve their communities and are demonstrating Forward Values in the process. There's still time to add your name to the list. There are Judge of Elections, Township Auditor, Treasurer, and many other offices in every area across this state that have no candidates at all. With a little research, you can find a way to help your community and the PA Forward Party at the same time. [
](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OO1xB82Dwc0SwW5xslNAt5demYUjnvMsNObg_2SsnH4C04dQQgB9BZ02TA7y9H7t-4vbxkv79HHUmZ6qj3hodUR-7alEp57O08vr8cfcTeFUloFbffPqlZP8qsSt5ozRpo-ljG0b_nmp5HGri8eilg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_july_newsletter&n=1) Join us July 21st at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. clean_body: A political home and a community. | We Support Each Other (More than politics?) In attempting to build a political home, we've also built a community. We've met many people from across the state who volunteer to build this party in their available hours around their busy lives between major life events like Weddings, Moves, Career changes, School, Illnesses, and Family commitments. Presently, our leadership team is experiencing a number of these scenarios which present challenges as we enter what will be a very busy 4 months leading up to the 2025 elections. We remain in contact with and wish the best to each member that has recently needed to pause their activity. We look forward to having you back in action. Election season is a challenging time to be short handed. We have a lot of work to do and ways folks like you can help. If you are someone that has been involved in the past or just paying attention from afar, now would be a great time to help us do all the things we have been working toward as we approach election season. If you want to spend the next four months supporting great local candidates and building a new party that adds competition and decreases polarization, please emailmailto:pennsylvania@forwardparty.com (or just reply to this email) to learn more. Serve Your Community We will soon be announcing the candidates we're endorsing for the 2025 election season. We can't wait for you to meet these people who are volunteering to serve their communities and are demonstrating Forward Values in the process. There's still time to add your name to the list. There are Judge of Elections, Township Auditor, Treasurer, and many other offices in every area across this state that have no candidates at all. With a little research, you can find a way to help your community and the PA Forward Party at the same time. Join us July 21st at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We willtoo! Click below to see more** Help support these events from our partner organizations. And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party -=-=- Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States

| | I’m disgusted. [House Republicans just passed Trump's Big Ugly Bill – and he’s about to sign it into law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813566/555408747/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) Let’s be clear: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813567/555408748/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) This is the biggest cut to health care in American History.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813568/555408749/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) Up to 20 MILLION Americans will lose their health care and food assistance.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813569/555408750/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) In every state, hospitals and nursing homes will CLOSE.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813570/555408751/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) All so that Republicans can give tax breaks to big corporations and their billionaire MAGA donors – while adding TRILLIONS to the national debt. [It’s obscene. It’s sinful. It’s deadly. And, we’re going to make them REGRET it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813571/555408752/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) [Republicans will LOSE their House Majority in 2026 for coming after our health care and obliterating our Safety Net.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813572/555408753/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) [_Together, we can show House Republicans that voters will NOT get over their support of Trump’s deadly budget and make this the day that Democrats WON the midterms – but only if every Democracy-loving American reading this email chips in before it’s too late. So I’m asking you personally: Will you join 5,000 Democrats and chip in $15 – or whatever you can spare – to send Trump and Republicans a message that they’ll NEVER forget? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110813573/555408754/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250703_em_fr_rr2_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGQ1MmIyYi00MTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjAG8zGas6tqp0U9Erfm8f0uMNV3WQ5hwAN8bBfI7MI=) name: Rep. Zoe Lofgren
subject: Congress just passed Trump’s terrible spending bill, and both times the House voted, I voted NO.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Congress just passed Trump’s big, ugly spending bill, and both times the House voted, I voted NO .

This Republican-backed bill has $1.1 trillion in health cuts and could result in 11.8 million Americans losing care – it’s heartbreaking, Peter .

Trump and his Republican allies care more about making their ultra-wealthy friends richer while stripping benefits for everyday Americans.

A majority of Americans disapprove of this bill – so I’m standing with Democrats and not backing down in the fight against Trump and his far-right agenda.

Peter, here’s the good news: we have a chance to take back the House next year and finally put an end to this Republican chaos.

And as Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, last year I helped flip three seats from red to blue in California (and some of these races were won by less than 10,000 votes, Peter)!

So can I count on your support today to help secure my seat in Congress and help elect Democrats in California who will help flip the House blue? Chip in at least $25 now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-06-30_EOQ_ZOL_ES-26461&amount=25]

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE: $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-06-30_EOQ_ZOL_ES-26461&amount=5]

I will not stop fighting, Peter.

Rep. Zoe Lofgren

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

| | | I’m not afraid of a little heat.
All through the summer, I’m knocking doors across Virginia’s 22nd House of Delegates District to flip this seat blue! Thanks for your support,
Elizabeth

I’m running for Delegate this November to protect our communities, and fight the extreme MAGA agenda. We can’t do it without you. No matter the weather, I’m inspired to keep knocking by supporters like you. Thank you for backing us up! Thanks for your support, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. **Far-right Rep. David Schweikert just voted for the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in U.S. history.** Trump’s _One Big Beautiful Bill_ is a declaration of one thing: Trump, Schweikert, and House Republicans will always put billionaires and corporations over working families. This disastrous bill will:
* Strip health care from over 365,000 Arizonans and more than 31,000 of Schweikert’s constituents by gutting Medicaid and _Affordable Care Act_ protections
* Cut hundreds of billions of dollars from SNAP — taking food out of the mouths of hungry children and the elderly
* Hand over a tax cut to line the pockets of Schweikert’s billionaire friends and corporations, all at the expense of middle-class families
* Spike federal debt to nearly $4 trillion — in a breathtaking act of hypocrisy from so-called “fiscal hawk” Schweikert

**Democrats MUST take back the House in 2026 to undo the consequences of Trump’s cruel agenda. name: John Fetterman
subject: the House just passed one Big, Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey, Derek, it's John.
The House just passed Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill. And that means it’s on its way to Trump’s desk.
❌ Millions thrown off health care.
❌ Hungry kids denied food.
❌ Huge tax cuts for billionaires.
❌ National debt headed for $40 trillion.
This bill is a disaster, which is why I voted HELL NO. The GOP will own the consequences.
**I’m ready to do whatever it takes to make sure two things happen:**
1. Democrats who did the right thing and voted NO on this disaster keep their jobs.
2. Republicans who were too selfish, too cowardly, actually evil, or thought ... _hmm hopefully someone else fixes this problem_ ... never see the inside of the U.S. Capitol EVER. AGAIN.
You have NO BUSINESS calling yourself a U.S. Senator if you can’t think about the working folks across your state before your ultrawealthy megadonors. Plain and simple.
**Right now, my team and I are SO CLOSE to hitting our emergency rapid-response goal. Just $3,019 more would put us over the top – and we’d have the momentum on our side to make Republicans PAY for this at the ballot box.**
**[We’re trying to hit this goal before Trump signs this Big, Ugly Bill. Please, Derek, will you pitch in what you can – $10, $25, whatever – to help us close the gap and tell the GOP we’re FED UP with them selling us out?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk166-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10185%2E434096%2EBb660a)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk166-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10185%2E434096%2EBb660a)
---
Thanks for being in this fight with me, Derek.
John ❤️

name: Scott Brown
subject: I have something personal to share with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
Patriot,

My name is Scott Brown, and I want to take a few minutes to share my story
with you and how the experiences and lessons I’ve learned have led me to make a
big decision this week.
I had a challenging upbringing. My mom was married and divorced four times,
and my dad was married and divorced three times. I was raised by my single mom,
who worked multiple jobs to put food on the table. We didn’t have much, but
with the love and support of my grandparents, we had a fighting chance. We
moved often—I lived in 17 different places before I turned 18.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/bio-brown-hf-launch-acs/?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aaem_acs&utm_campaign=20250628_bio-launch_sb>
I know what it’s like to worry about where your next meal is coming from or
whether the bills all get paid.And those early years taught me the value of
grit, of resilience, and hard work.

Nothing in my life has ever been handed to me — I’ve had to fight for every
step forward.

I worked my way through college and law school, taking any odd job and doing
whatever it took to stay afloat.

At 19, I joined the Army National Guard. I served for more than 30 years and
retired as a Colonel. I’ve worn our nation’s uniform with pride and know
firsthand what it means to serve a cause bigger than yourself.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/bio-brown-hf-launch-acs/?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aaem_acs&utm_campaign=20250628_bio-launch_sb>
Back in 2010, I took a leap that many thought was crazy. I ran for the U.S.
Senate in Massachusetts as a Republican,driven by a belief that people like you
deserved a real voice in Washington, not just another career politician. I
drove across the state, putting countless miles on my beloved truck, a 2005 GMC
Canyon. With the incredible support of grassroots supporters like you from all
corners of the country,we pulled off a stunning upset and won, shaking the
political establishment to its core.

But that victory was just the start.

I went to Washington as a disruptor, refusing to play the insider games of
career politicians. That made me a target. The national Democrats zeroed in,
recruiting Elizabeth Warren and pouring tens of millions into a campaign to
defeat me. Despite our best efforts, we came up short in that race.

But I wasn’t discouraged. I believed then, and I believe now, that there’s a
bigger plan for all of us.

My wife, Gail, and I became four-time grandparents, and we’ve poured our
hearts into our family and our New Hampshire community. In 2017, when President
Trump asked me to serve as U.S. Ambassador to New Zealand and Samoa,I was
honored to represent our nation, strengthen global partnerships, and protect
American interests abroad.
<https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/doge-hit-ground-running-tc-rs-hf/?recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&address=&zip=&city=&state=&employer_name=&occupation=&amtposition=4>

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/bio-brown-hf-launch-acs/?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aaem_acs&utm_campaign=20250628_bio-launch_sb>
Today, I’m writing to you with big news: I’m not done fighting. Our country’s
future is at a crossroads, and I’m stepping up again to run for the U.S. Senate
in New Hampshire.I’m doing this for you, for our shared values, and for the
America we believe in. Chip in to Join Scott Brown »
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/bio-brown-hf-launch-acs/?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aaem_acs&utm_campaign=20250628_bio-launch_sb>
You’ve seen what happens when Democrats hold unchecked power...

Runaway inflation...

Chaos at our southern border...

Soft-on-crime policies...

Men in women’s sports and locker rooms...

Foreign policy missteps that weaken our allies and embolden our enemies.

Hardworking Americans like you are being left behind, and we can’t let this
radical agenda take over the Senate in 2026.The stakes are just too high.

Here’s the truth: I can’t do this without you.

The Democrats and their elite allies will flood this race with MILLIONS. It’s
an open seat in a swing state. They don’t want someone like me—someone who
speaks plainly, serves with honor, and refuses to sell out—anywhere near
Washington.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, asking you to stand with me from
Day One.

A contribution of $5, $10, or whatever you can give will help us build a
campaign powered by people like you, not political insiders.
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/bio-brown-hf-launch-acs/?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aaem_acs&utm_campaign=20250628_bio-launch_sb>
Every dollar counts, and every voice matters. Chip in to Join Scott Brown »
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/bio-brown-hf-launch-acs/?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aaem_acs&utm_campaign=20250628_bio-launch_sb>
If you’ve ever felt like your voice doesn’t matter, I’m here to tell you it
does. It matters to me. And it’s the only reason I’m in this fight.

Let’s do this together.

Scott Brown
Candidate for U.S. Senate
New Hampshire Chip in to Join Scott Brown »
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/bio-brown-hf-launch-acs/?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aaem_acs&utm_campaign=20250628_bio-launch_sb>

subject: Mark your Calendar for August 14th! 🗓️
body:

# Mark your Calendar for August 14th!
---
| _You’re invited to Congresswoman Erin Houchin’s 3rd Annual Barbecue at Huber’s Plantation Hall on Thursday, August 14th._
---

Hope you can make it, we’d love to see you there!
_-Team Houchin_

name: The Ohio Dems
subject: BREAKING: Trump’s Big Ugly Bill passed—Ohioans will pay the price
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
what’s at stake and how we fight back
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110814866/555413339/331040379?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_BUB_250703_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxMTAzMi00NjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFW1eZ5ttOq3u60yVtb474uzN0Q6F4jxzBa8RrUcdVQ=) Breaking news, team: **Trump's so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" has passed both the House and the Senate and is expected to be signed into law tomorrow — and it’s one of the most devastating attacks we’ve seen on Ohio families in decades.**

We’re talking about real consequences. **Families losing food assistance. Seniors losing healthcare. Rural hospitals shutting their doors for good while billionaires and Trump donors get massive tax handouts.**

We wish we were exaggerating. [**_We’re not. Rush a donation to help us fight back NOW!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110814867/555413340/331040379?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_BUB_250703_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxMTAzMi00NjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFW1eZ5ttOq3u60yVtb474uzN0Q6F4jxzBa8RrUcdVQ=)

This bill guts Medicaid. Slashes SNAP. Threatens disability services. Instead of helping working Ohioans, it balloons the deficit by $1.8 trillion — all to bankroll massive tax breaks for billionaires.

Yes, you read that right: Republican Senators Jon Husted, Bernie Moreno, and more of Trump’s allies are celebrating a bill that will rip away lifesaving programs from the most vulnerable Ohioans... just to make their donors richer.

This is what they mean by “fiscal responsibility”?

[**_We’re not backing down. The stakes are too high, and the damage too real. Can you pitch in right now to help us hold Republicans accountable and take back Congress?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110814868/555413341/331040379?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_BUB_250703_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxMTAzMi00NjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFW1eZ5ttOq3u60yVtb474uzN0Q6F4jxzBa8RrUcdVQ=)

Instead of supporting our families, Trump and his Republican allies are putting lives at risk. We _refuse_ to stand by while they celebrate. We _refuse_ to let them get away with this. We WILL make them answer at the ballot box.

We hope you’ll stand with us in this fight.

Thank you,

Ohio Dems **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110814869/555413342/331040379?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_BUB_250703_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxMTAzMi00NjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFW1eZ5ttOq3u60yVtb474uzN0Q6F4jxzBa8RrUcdVQ=)**

name: George Latimer
subject: People will suffer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=7PsVwfuNRoLt2Em1zm3dk8VpInSu1ME6ITAaS3UCrSGN%2FrD49c89eEFW73SD6ErIOX4wwI9sNQapPEWGeAby42O0rlvaXMO8cxtxupRbzHDu7gdD6BTw9p4pg8T3mtiwN8dcI2kESmiMIf58AT%2BYnxF5MNfWPwwxAnZoKhoWHgJPuyTO%2B%2Bxj1MTWADeka%2FEFT8gW0CgjeK0WiX4h%2FTwSrNmRgsnfWTTzsJgZhN5%2FOn97DWuHp%2Fcd6LPSsRsFueNUt025L%2B%2BAs0XZsN1byfLVPmx1ooq6UMdLIv%2BcU6EV7JpQ6%2ByGbDHKZ%2B14cT7RRYDMBWxUQU3WDFV116t2RafeycMnm4oFRjq32olMpX3yt9f4%2BBTAIIu9kfmscS6HxFDpJPQ9SYhVYRSodGyf2uynOg3gCb4d4xo85zP%2B8mM78dGGdu5K%2FeVfx8cH6nJneiq4)

| |
---
Peter, Since Trump took office for the second time in January, his priorities have been clear: denying Americans their basic rights and freedoms and cutting funding for programs we rely on, all for the sake of another tax cut for himself and the ultra wealthy. Republicans in Congress have pushed through Trump’s cruel big ugly bill that would cut funding for food assistance and healthcare for millions of Americans. In New York alone, 1.1 million people will be at risk of losing access to health insurance through Medicaid, cuts to food assistance will hurt at least 317,000 New Yorkers, and we’ll see increases to energy bills by $300/year. **To add insult to injury, the bill also adds $3 TRILLION to the national deficit....while handing out $1 TRILLION in tax cuts and subsidies to the ultra-wealthy. ** This bill is unnecessarily cruel, and people will suffer. It’s unconscionable, and that’s why I voted NO. Peter, this is what happens when Donald Trump and his cronies hold the House. If we want to stop this mess and protect American families, we have to flip the House in 2026. That work has already started, and we need your help to take back the majority. **[Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can today to help my Democratic colleagues and I take back the House and put a stop to Republicans' extreme agenda that betrays the American people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110815071/555414012/1711749452?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_070325_BUDGET_120DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2YzZTEwMDYtNDc1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TgTOgRR3SW_C9Einv_ZD7Lp4MKcQOGeyW0Fg-xXb15A=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, Since Trump took office for the second time in January, his priorities have been clear: denying Americans their basic rights and freedoms and cutting funding for programs we rely on, all for the sake of another tax cut for himself and the ultra wealthy. Republicans in Congress have pushed through Trump’s cruel big ugly bill that would cut funding for food assistance and healthcare for millions of Americans. In New York alone, 1.1 million people will be at risk of losing access to health insurance through Medicaid, cuts to food assistance will hurt at least 317,000 New Yorkers, and we’ll see increases to energy bills by $300/year. To add insult to injury, the bill also adds $3 TRILLION to the national deficit....while handing out $1 TRILLION in tax cuts and subsidies to the ultra-wealthy. This bill is unnecessarily cruel, and people will suffer. It’s unconscionable, and that’s why I voted NO. Peter, this is what happens when Donald Trump and his cronies hold the House. If we want to stop this mess and protect American families, we have to flip the House in 2026. That work has already started, and we need your help to take back the majority. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, George * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

This is terrifying, team: The Republican House majority just PASSED Trump's downright dangerous megabill -- knowing full well how much harm they will cause the American people **\--_and now it's headed straight to Trump's desk!_**

_Devastating_ Medicaid cuts. _Massive_ tax cuts for the rich. _Slashing_ nutrition assistance for families with children and older adults. **It's one of the most _regressive_ bills in American history -- and Republicans couldn't get it through quickly enough!**

To unseat MAGA Republicans, we MUST hear from hardworking Americans like _you_. We need to know that Democrats are ready to take the fight _directly_ to the Republican leaders harming us with these cruel, unwanted policies. **Please, tell us now:**

**Do you support Trump's dangerous megabill?**

Team DSCC

name: KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION
subject: Happy Independence Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION * 6709 West 119th Street * Ste
body:
As we celebrate our nation’s 249th Independence Day, I find myself reflecting on the incredible legacy we’ve inherited

| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Hi Peter,
Happy 4th of July!As we celebrate our nation’s 249th Independence Day, I find myself reflecting on the incredible legacy we’ve inherited—one built on courage, conviction, and an unshakable belief in the promise of freedom.I’m filled with gratitude—not just for the brave men and women who came before us, but for the strong, resilient community we’ve built together right here in Johnson County.Independence Day is more than fireworks and festivities. It’s a powerful reminder of what’s possible when people come together to stand for their values, protect their freedoms, and invest in a better future.That same spirit fuels my campaign every day. I’m running to ensure Johnson County remains a place where families are supported, small businesses can grow, and every resident has the opportunity to succeed.Wishing you a joyful, meaningful, and safe Independence Day—may we continue to honor our past by building an even brighter future.**Look for me at the Lenexa 4th of July parade tomorrow!** 👉 CLICK [HERE](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=e904e09703&e=7320325a61) TO VOLUNTEER
👉 CLICK [HERE](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=a56e95bac8&e=7320325a61) TO DONATE
With pride and purpose,
**Karen Crnkovich
** Candidate for Johnson County Commission Chair

---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: TRUTH: The kids will be okay
body:
I don’t get this excited often, but something BIG is happening on college campuses across the United States.
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205eait0kg2yb51v0dp11h49lt1u9xb465fyst2tjha8i2503ciijvt7ycj1va7zptys9grwzqcusv9mn1s&__stmp=syuac4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=27y9hj45fpj6vzv3s21ohg5jyq6wzmmrwibjrg0444krvv51cvxf7kxmtva6eljs4ueob434tkfyurl0z8hdfl9wftgx4z436jjxea13jdl1p1nm3sawhus7x4ejxzo1hitlv85tg9rj3x23vt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I don’t get this excited often, but something BIG is happening on college campuses across the United States. Believe it or not, the younger generation is finally rejecting woke and radical leftism. You saw this during Trump’s election - a major shift in the 18-29 year old voters. And the media hates it!
* "America’s Youngest Voters Turn Right” – Axios;
* “The Not-So-Woke Generation Z” – The Atlantic;
* “Are Zoomers Shifting Right?” – Newsweek; and
* “Analysis: Young and Non-White Voters Have Shifted Right Since 2020” – Washington Post.

Here’s a major reason why this is happening. An organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is identifying, recruiting, and training college students to Make Liberty Win. YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. In a moment, I will humbly ask you to send an urgent donation to Young Americans for Liberty, but before I do that, let me explain why your support is critical, especially today. A generous donor is MATCHING all funds raised up to $50,000 until the end of the month. That means your contribution today will be DOUBLED. [I am personally asking all my supporters to chip in $10, $35, $100, $250, or even $500 today to Young Americans for Liberty. Please click here to select any amount below to make a gift.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=27y9hj45fpj6vzv3s21ohg5jyq6wzmmrwibjrg0444krvv51cvxf7kxmtva6eljs4ueob434tkfyurl0z8hdfl9wftgx4z436jjxea13jdl1p1nm3sawhus7x4ejxzo1hitlv85tg9rj3x23vt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)

| [**Donate $50**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=o3q04yn843wz6t3jq911qc1v0ehhpqjpt68siigytbjodbt8gdm3msyd6g7mki344kef66qvn4oumc2exv8xlchxffn5vy1gstgm7rh3jiqr3yd7wzo1bklrg9j76613uqcmykw7g8kse7rxsrpyu60jsql131bbbb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)

| [**Donate $100**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2q03wigzfb5qeg1zjto7q0b6h9bqz3q5ng4o8m1xdk0p6f16ykbldqq9foydk0465rnshrjvpn2ik49rhp4f8q74d80rnrsf4xmhowif812qvpfftgfja8ar2gt7v3po7vjuj2jrbfeghjpdin0iej1kqr4wjf3dkb9r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)

---
| [**Donate $500**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2q03wigzfb5qeg1zjto7q0b6h9bqz3q5ng4o8m1xdk0p6f16ykbldqq9foydk0465rnshrjvpn2ik49rhp4f8q74d80rnrsf4xmhowif812qvpfftgfja8ae0urxnx2dxlzlevsl0r7ucp30lv6jx326ki5k3lmjdtb2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)
---
| [**Donate $1,000**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=slwbsby1r6gt91zg63meval4gp0a484xi66gkhrqgbgxeqsr7migmgptebfkbefzcwjvlxmtcyecmyn4h1q7hakbfwl0j9lv4ztmjsbnf3x3pgo1cl8hspbz88xux0w2bud5e1bkkixnsaqsvfoggo3dkiw0pr8txanj8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)
---
| [**Donate Any Amount**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=27y9hj45fpj6vzv3s21ohg5jyq6wzmmrwibjrg0444krvv51cvxf7kxmtva6eljs4ueob434tkfyurl0z8hdfl9wftgx4z436jjxea13jdl1p1nm3sawhus7x4ejxzo1hitlv85tg9rj3x23vt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)
---
YAL is doing this, first and foremost, by reaching students where they’re at. By focusing on the issues important to twenty-year-olds – affordable groceries and gas, healthcare, and guns, YAL is able to show young people that socialism is not the answer to all of their life’s problems. I do not want to take your support for granted – That’s why below I lay out step-by-step how Young Americans for Liberty is advancing the ideas of freedom with college students. _Step 4 is my favorite..._ STEP 1: Expand the number of YAL chapters across the country to over 500 nationwide. America’s college campuses are covered with YAL chapters actively recruiting and educating hundreds of thousands of students. STEP 2: Recruit 10,000 NEW YAL members and collect more than 150,000 student sign-ups. YAL is building a massive network and a strong foundation to reach the next generation for years to come. STEP 3: Train an ELITE group of top 1,7000 student leaders on how to WIN ON PRINCIPLE. YAL’s top student leaders receive exclusive training on the strategies and tactics to win and advance the ideas of liberty. STEP 4: Mobilize YAL-trained activists who have knocked on more than 6,000,000 doors to promote liberty causes and candidates. It’s called OPERATION WIN AT THE DOOR, and through it, YAL-trained students have knocked doors to help nearly 400 pro-liberty legislators win crucial races and push for important pro-liberty legislation. STEP 5: Fight tyrannical campus policies and college administrators through YAL’s Student Rights Campaign. YAL chapters and members have made major policy changes on free speech, self-defense, and defunding woke campus programs, which now impact more than 3,100,000 students every year. Friend, the youth are our future, and I have to say, the future is bright in America once again. These YAL-trained and YAL-inspired students will become our future leaders. It starts by equipping them with the resources they need. Here’s how you can help: [Please join me in supporting Young Americans for Liberty and help us reach this important goal of $50,000 this month. Your gift of any amount will be MATCHED!](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=27y9hj45fpj6vzv3s21ohg5jyq6wzmmrwibjrg0444krvv51cvxf7kxmtva6eljs4ueob434tkfyurl0z8hdfl9wftgx4z436jjxea13jdl1p1nm3sawhus7x4ejxzo1hitlv85tg9rj3x23vt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)
---
| [**Donate**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=27y9hj45fpj6vzv3s21ohg5jyq6wzmmrwibjrg0444krvv51cvxf7kxmtva6eljs4ueob434tkfyurl0z8hdfl9wftgx4z436jjxea13jdl1p1nm3sawhus7x4ejxzo1hitlv85tg9rj3x23vt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)
---
Organizations like Young Americans for Liberty will help defend freedom in the future. This isn’t about a single election. This is building a movement for decades to come. Thank you for supporting America and standing up for the values on which country was founded. Without your support, none of this is possible... Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy
---
P.S. - I mentioned step 4 is my favorite. Here’s why. YAL-recruited student activists have helped elect over 400 liberty legislators who have passed over 500 pro-liberty bills. They are swinging races by 6% to 15%. That’s something money can’t buy! [Please donate $10 or more today to Young Americans for Liberty and your support will be MATCH >>](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=27y9hj45fpj6vzv3s21ohg5jyq6wzmmrwibjrg0444krvv51cvxf7kxmtva6eljs4ueob434tkfyurl0z8hdfl9wftgx4z436jjxea13jdl1p1nm3sawhus7x4ejxzo1hitlv85tg9rj3x23vt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syuac4&__onlt=h)
---
---
| Young Americans for Liberty, 3267 Bee Cave Rd, Ste 107-65, Austin, TX 78746, United States
---

name: =?utf-8?b?VG86IFNlbi4gQWxleCBQYWRpbGxhIOKcie+4jyAodmlhIFZQUCk=?=
subject: Padilla just broke his silence!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sign on to thank him now >>
| **_HEROIC Sen. Alex Padilla just broke his silence:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91644?t=6&akid=20478%2E878179%2Ec-g1zD) [**We need EVERY Democrat reading this to join the fight and THANK Alex Padilla for taking a stand against Trump and his MAGA mob! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91644?t=7&akid=20478%2E878179%2Ec-g1zD) | [**THANK ALEX PADILLA: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91644?t=8&akid=20478%2E878179%2Ec-g1zD)
---
TO: Alex Padilla
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Padilla,

**Seeing you DETAINED and HANDCUFFED for simply asking a question shook me to my core.**

This is exactly the kind of unchecked power we need to fight back against — because if Trump can do this to you, he can get away with ANYTHING.

Please know that you’re not alone in this fight.

**We know Trump and his minions will _lie, break the law,_ and even _arrest his enemies_ to get his way — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

name: Working Families Party
subject: BREAKING: Congress passes Trump's Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Trump and the Republicans sold working families out. | | | Peter, After November’s elections, pundits and beltway insiders couldn’t stop talking about how Republicans were becoming the “party of the working class.” **The GOP just proved to everyone how wrong that hot take was.** Today, Republicans in the House voted on final approval of Trump’s awful budget. It will now head to Trump for his signature, after which it will become law. Instead of doing anything to lower costs or make the lives of working people easier, **this Republican budget is an in-your-face betrayal of the working-class voters who helped send them to Congress in the first place:**
* It takes away health care from more people than any bill in American history,1
* It ends food assistance for millions, forcing more children and families into hunger than any bill in history,2
* It supercharges Trump’s lawless ICE and will allow them to kidnap and forcibly remove more innocent people and spread more terror in our neighborhoods,3
* All so they can permanently give billionaires and the wealthy more tax cuts, in one of the largest legislative wealth transfers in history.

Even they themselves know how bad this bill is. That’s why multiple Republican members of Congress were trashing it — before voting for it.4 And it’s why the final text of this bill intentionally delays some of the worst of the cuts, including cuts to Medicaid, until after the 2026 midterms.5 **In the coming weeks, the Working Families Party will be announcing our support for challengers to some of these hacks who just voted to kick their own constituents off Medicaid.** People deserve leaders who will fight for them — not obey the commands of their billionaire backers. [**The same Republicans who just voted for this bill are going to spend the next 16 months trying to run as far and as fast away from it as they can. We are not going to let them get away with it. Chip in now to help us hold them accountable and send real champions to Congress who will actually show up for working people when it matters.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9wNWdNVgwr_He0iiX8PP5sKz8fQo5-ya6r-j8X1f6P3rlnGJjs5rXw8ZzClaWn5pT1GJVPsGOm1qLYlDp9AmSd-n3oluMsaIXi-qxkTQ0XNCmErTGo0lOroe6lxkaAYElKAwz-kublklkejItWORl4O7mX54mmYFf9quTlDCYcsbITdTmqeQiapXL7f7iqYWcmhYpw34EriwPXmqKesOSvW896fIIcb1XucE4NCw_0wLzV5FVYvIyyulawGMAERu5x8ZM7kavAMmQ6viS8YuGsasSpD5oQgXKomKeP_mdoJQ71cyUGDQRzvmLvoJi0J2SnKLb_ZWN8Om94Phegm2JWQ/4hv/LN3_XT2aSFGpdmg--IcrMw/h0/h001.OUiuF-8KS4Kw3r9-mdUPVe3qHs5edBOfFi1Vr2iCwek) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9wNWdNVgwr_He0iiX8PP5sKz8fQo5-ya6r-j8X1f6P3pZIzPoQo-agvq0tcn6d4FZVWEyckJ0QX-QGDMtVb_3zCPKOeUjC9fOSzM0OhsqHsKmOlQS2j9ubN18WPvHS8n9rpVNZcZMs_sp6jZq_Kp_kIBLEWXpVlHkpS8Nbld6dYSKDZTOUVTIt9_hNS5OjhAPNI2edaBGIZQkCn57jaZp-lalSzJchpdXw0vLXK1UkMtMlStRji3r4OwnlvZYKstm2NI2BmD5wQjZrDKC2YFTPUDnn45d1zZyfXKiXkycTjyF5yB7jzfrJGeGoaJbLYRYs4o4qTaCaaUn9GYjVpTDcg/4hv/LN3_XT2aSFGpdmg--IcrMw/h1/h001.R-TZL_3_YwyBOcQNST24aciyhFojeQv1wGTMcBsDO4Q)** Republicans just made it clear that they will _never_ be a “party of the working class.” Let’s replace them with champions who will. clean_body: Trump and the Republicans sold working families out. | | | Peter, After November’s elections, pundits and beltway insiders couldn’t stop talking about how Republicans were becoming the “party of the working class.” The GOP just proved to everyone how wrong that hot take was. Today, Republicans in the House voted on final approval of Trump’s awful budget. It will now head to Trump for his signature, after which it will become law. Instead of doing anything to lower costs or make the lives of working people easier, this Republican budget is an in-your-face betrayal of the working-class voters who helped send them to Congress in the first place: It takes away health care from more people than any bill in American history,1 It ends food assistance for millions, forcing more children and families into hunger than any bill in history,2 It supercharges Trump’s lawless ICE and will allow them to kidnap and forcibly remove more innocent people and spread more terror in our neighborhoods,3 All so they can permanently give billionaires and the wealthy more tax cuts, in one of the largest legislative wealth transfers in history. Even they themselves know how bad this bill is. That’s why multiple Republican members of Congress were trashing it — before voting for it.4 And it’s why the final text of this bill intentionally delays some of the worst of the cuts, including cuts to Medicaid, until after the 2026 midterms.5 In the coming weeks, the Working Families Party will be announcing our support for challengers to some of these hacks who just voted to kick their own constituents off Medicaid. People deserve leaders who will fight for them — not obey the commands of their billionaire backers. Republicans just made it clear that they will never be a “party of the working class.” Let’s replace them with champions who will. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Hill, July 1, 2025 2\. , Center on Budget and Policy Priorities, May 28, 2025 3\. , National Immigration Law Center, June 18, 2025 4\. , Maddow Blog - MSNBC, June 30, 2025 5\. , The New York Times, July 2, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: BREAKING: Valadao lied. Votes to cut Medicaid.

body:

#
Friend, it just happened. **My Republican opponent David Valadao just broke his promise and voted for Trump’s budget -- slashing nearly $1 trillion from Medicaid and gutting critical services for thousands of working families here in the Central Valley.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110816425/555418664/1981932150?refcode=em-7.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2NjZDIzYWUtNDk1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1um9wuWmMTDF4-rOsyGZzws2OFsTjYH217xF2Hn4U6o=) _**Nearly 70% of our district relies on Medi-Cal.**_ That includes my family, students, and nearly everyone I grew up with. _Valadao knows this._ That’s what makes this vote so spineless, shameful, and so personal. Just months ago, Valadao promised he would never support a bill that cuts Medicaid for vulnerable communities. He even put it in writing. **Well, he lied. ** And today, he showed us exactly who he works for: billionaires and party bosses, not the people he was elected to represent. **This is one of the most devastating betrayals in our district’s history. And in the district hardest-hit by this bill in the entire country -- it could cost lives.** I’m in this race for the working people who’ve been ignored and exploited for too long. Valadao's vote cannot go unpunished, and together we can kick him out for good. **[Valadao has never been more vulnerable, and we have our best shot to flip this seat. clean_body: | Friend, it just happened. My Republican opponent David Valadao just broke his promise and voted for Trump’s budget -- slashing nearly $1 trillion from Medicaid and gutting critical services for thousands of working families here in the Central Valley. = Nearly 70% of our district relies on Medi-Cal. That includes my family, students, and nearly everyone I grew up with. Valadao knows this. That’s what makes this vote so spineless, shameful, and so personal. Just months ago, Valadao promised he would never support a bill that cuts Medicaid for vulnerable communities. He even put it in writing. Well, he lied. And today, he showed us exactly who he works for: billionaires and party bosses, not the people he was elected to represent. This is one of the most devastating betrayals in our district’s history. And in the district hardest-hit by this bill in the entire country -- it could cost lives. I’m in this race for the working people who’ve been ignored and exploited for too long. Valadao's vote cannot go unpunished, and together we can kick him out for good. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s send a message that we won’t back down. In this fight, \- Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington.
