clean_body: Reaching out by email is my final plea before the biggest rally of the year. | | | | Friend, did your dog eat your mail? Reaching out by email is my FINAL PLEA. I must hear from you before the BIGGEST Trump rally of the year. Dozens and dozens of Democrats voted to impeach me. So, I’m pouncing back with a Rally Blitz so massive, it will send the Radical Left into TOTAL DEFEAT. ** I’m counting on your support. $10? My team is collecting the names of every patriot who joins the rally blitz — and the plan is to reward everyone who steps up on this critical day. Only democrats will sit back and ignore this urgent call to action. There are just TWO HOURS LEFT** before the Rally Blitz deadline. I’m expecting to see your name on the official list before it’s too late. Sincerely, President Trump | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Young Democrats of America
subject: YDA Statement: The Big Ugly Sham
body:
For inquiries contact: comms@yda.org | |
---
|
---
**STATEMENT FROM THE YOUNG DEMOCRATS OF AMERICA
ON THE BIG UGLY SHAM BILL
**
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **July 3, 2025**
**Contact: Kait Ahern -- communications@yda.org **
---
**Today, Republicans made their priorities painfully clear: if you are not rich, you are expendable.**

The so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" is **nothing more than a Big Ugly Sham** --a brutal piece of legislation that rips away health care, slashes food assistance, and fuels mass enforcement and surveillance, all while handing billions to the wealthiest people in the country.

They are dismantling Medicare, cutting SNAP benefits, and taking away health care and food assistance from seniors, children, and working families--only to give billions more to the wealthiest individuals in the country. This is cruelty masquerading as fiscal responsibility, and it will have devastating effects on lives across the nation.

We know what's happening. Tax breaks for billionaires. Corporate giveaways. Endless subsidies for the ultra-wealthy, while everyday Americans are told to tighten their belts and "make do" without the basics.

**Seventeen million people are at risk of losing access to health care. Over five million may lose vital food assistance. Families will be forced to make impossible choices between rent and groceries, filling prescriptions, and keeping their homes warm. Meanwhile, billionaires continue to amass wealth at unprecedented levels.**

At the same time, ICE is now the most heavily funded law enforcement agency in the United States, receiving more money than the FBI, CIA, and ATF combined. That's not about safety. That's about control. That's about building a system where immigrants are surveilled, detained, and deported while the rich get richer.

**This is what Republican leadership looks like: bloated enforcement budgets, tax cuts for the wealthy, and starvation for everyone else.**

Young Democrats are fighting back. We are organizing in every state to say: Enough. We demand a government that puts people before profit--a government that feeds the hungry, heals the sick, and protects the vulnerable, not one that rewards cruelty and hoards wealth at the top.

**We will rise. We will resist. And we will remember who did this.**
---
###
---
|
---

Despite Democrat delay tactics, U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) expects to vote Monday on the much-debated "Big, Beautiful Bill."

Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) forced the reading of the 940-page bill over the weekend, which was followed by debate over amendments from both parties.

Britt defended the bill Sunday on CNN's "The State of the Union" with host Jake Tapper, saying it would deliver much of what the American people want and voted for.

**WASHINGTON, D.C.** — U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-AL) has joined Senator John Cornyn (R-TX) and several Senate Republicans in introducing a resolution supporting the United States’ and Israel’s military strikes on Iran, including the recently executed Operation Midnight Hammer. The resolution expresses strong support for U.S. and allied military personnel involved in the strike and affirms the importance of preventing Iran from acquiring nuclear capabilities.

Following the passage of President Donald Trump’s ‘One Big Beautiful Bill’ in the Senate on Tuesday, U.S. Senators Tommy Tuberville and Katie Britt issued praise for the legislation and touted all that it stands to accomplish if signed into law.

Britt noted the bill’s inclusion of significant childcare relief provisions, which has been a landmark policy she has promoted during her tenure in the Senate.

“This is about more than just addressing our child care crisis – it is a direct investment in the hardworking families and local small businesses striving to achieve their American Dream across our nation,” Britt (R-Motgomery) said.

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Despite Democrat delay tactics, U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) expects to vote Monday on the much-debated "Big, Beautiful Bill." Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) forced the reading of the 940-page bill over the weekend, which was followed by debate over amendments from both parties. Britt defended the bill Sunday on CNN's "The State of the Union" with host Jake Tapper, saying it would deliver much of what the American people want and voted for. | | WASHINGTON, D.C. — U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-AL) has joined Senator John Cornyn (R-TX) and several Senate Republicans in introducing a resolution supporting the United States’ and Israel’s military strikes on Iran, including the recently executed Operation Midnight Hammer. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Team, Is there anything we can say to get you to **[chip in to the Arizona Democratic Party](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110821220/555435296/-1963529075?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwMzJmMTEtNWY1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ScPP0j31Zw2zqqENGuxlVjIoVUCyLkBty6Ii6_PPpC8=)** today? name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Reckless and ridiculous.
body:
| | Peter, I just voted no on a big, bloated budget bill that is rife with special favors for special interests, while everyday Americans are left carrying the bag.

Despite bipartisan opposition, the Majority rammed this reckless proposal through without concern for the harm it will cause. It’s clear they’ve lost the plot.

**This thing blows up the deficit by $4 trillion, hikes up your healthcare and energy costs, shuts down rural hospitals, and rips away Medicaid coverage from millions of Americans. Everyday families will come out in the negative while Wall Street and the top 0.1% get freebies and handouts.

It’s reckless, irresponsible, and completely out of touch. It’s a damn shame.**

You know me — I don’t mind getting my hands dirty. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and fight back, continuing to call out D.C.’s misplaced priorities and working to *actually* help working families.

I’m grateful to have you on our team at this pivotal moment, Peter. The only way forward is together.

– Marie | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110821312/555435562/-618465495?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_30DO_250703_1_1&refcode2=b425d4c4-5f58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDI1ZDRjNC01ZjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EuRukhdbiuXSIcg63Zb94yfSjN5NDaphw3r1VkRZwcg=)

name: Sharice (personal)
subject: I just left the House floor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
If you’re one of the millions of Americans like me who know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, today has been nothing short of devastating

I just left the House floor, and I wanted to reach out. If you’re one of the millions of Americans like me who know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, today has been nothing short of devastating. My Republican colleagues knew that this bill hurts everyone who isn’t already a billionaire. They knew it would throw 17 million Americans off their health care, shutter nursing homes, and bankrupt rural hospitals. But they voted for it anyway. Why? Because Donald Trump told them to. Those aren’t the actions of real leaders. Those are the actions of politicians who are more concerned about staying in the good graces of Donald Trump than with the needs of their constituents. So even though today has been enormously difficult for so many of us, I’m not giving up. Because Kansans deserve a government that is responsible, transparent, and accountable — and I’m going to keep fighting every minute of every day until we make that a reality. If you’re with me, I hope I can count on your support. Because the only way we can win this fight is by fighting together. [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davids-email-july25**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110821320/555435574/-1340363074?refcode=email_070325_postvote&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDI1ZDRjNC01ZjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-8UwXgJ-Du_rY7Ls2E3gi6Yb_I_aLWiiNZuClMf3iY=) With gratitude, -Sharice

name: Team Powered by People
subject: A disaster for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
The House just passed the so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill.” It’s now headed to Trump’s desk.
Let’s be real about what this is: A massive handout to the ultra-wealthy — and a direct attack on everyday Americans.
This bill means:
* Over 17 million Americans could lose health coverage
* Millions in tax breaks for billionaires, while families pay more
* Cuts to food assistance, public schools, and green energy

It’s cruel, it’s deliberate, and it’s exactly what Trump and his MAGA allies want: A system that works for the powerful and leaves the rest of us behind.
But we’re not sitting this out.
At Powered by People, we believe in organizing at the ground level — turning outrage into action, and momentum into votes. With you by our side, we’re building the infrastructure to fight back and elect leaders who reflect the values and needs of our communities.
[**Can you pitch in $3 today to help us push back and protect the progress we’ve made?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250703-2.nkhbLJ&refcode=ema20250703-240206&t=1&akid=240206%2E444211%2EeSB1xt)

This is our moment to stand together,

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: House Republicans just sold the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Republicans just passed Donald Trump’s budget bill that will be devastating for everyday families — **_and cheered while they did it._** I voted NO, Peter, for the 365,984 Arizonans who are just trying to make it, and are now at risk of losing their healthcare under this disastrous budget. I voted NO for the families that rely on SNAP to put food on the table. I voted NO for the Planned Parenthood centers that administer critical reproductive care across the country. I voted NO because I refuse to stand by willingly while Republicans steal from the poor to give to the rich in _the biggest wealth transfer in our nation’s history. _ [**We have to flip the House and unseat every single Republican who has sold their spine in exchange for Donald Trump’s favor. clean_body: | Republicans just passed Donald Trump’s budget bill that will be devastating for everyday families — and cheered while they did it. I voted NO, Peter, for the 365,984 Arizonans who are just trying to make it, and are now at risk of losing their healthcare under this disastrous budget. I voted NO for the families that rely on SNAP to put food on the table. I voted NO for the Planned Parenthood centers that administer critical reproductive care across the country. I voted NO because I refuse to stand by willingly while Republicans steal from the poor to give to the rich in the biggest wealth transfer in our nation’s history. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This fight isn’t over, Peter, Yassamin Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: AOC
subject: They’re giving people crumbs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
And they are taking away the whole loaf
#
I think this is one of the saddest days in modern American history.
This is the largest withdrawal of healthcare in American history. 17 million Americans in our country are going to lose their Medicaid. They're going to lose their ACA insurance.
Small business owners are going to have their healthcare costs skyrocket and people are going to have their SNAP and WIC cut back. People are going to go hungry. People are going to get sick on a scale unlike anything we've ever seen.
**And all of it is just to finance tax cuts for billionaires and the wealthiest corporations who don't even need it**.
I don't think I've ever seen — I don't think _we_ have ever seen — or are prepared for how catastrophic this is set to be for _a lot_ of people.
It's devastating.
They're talking about this as though it's some 'tax cut' — even the no taxes on tips, that's only up to $25,000.
They're giving people crumbs, and **they're taking away the whole loaf**. It's just a genuinely sad day for our country.
The best thing that we can do right now is press on. And in order for us to salvage what we have, and to build through, we have to chart a new course to our future.
If you're on Medicaid, or the ACA, or rely on Medicare to help with your long-term care: there have to be consequences for these votes. We have to decide if this is just a joke, or just 'for TV', or if this is our real lives.
And **I hope people vote like it is**.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

Today, Republicans passed huge tax cuts for billionaires, gigantic tech companies, and corporations — giving our tax dollars away to the very people responsible for increasing costs on Americans.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110822684/555440263/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-07-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0N2Y1MTU5LTY0NTgtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1dfzRvm2PjYtuohnGxM4IC4sfiGUvHbqvftuwHz-BHM=)

| Peter,

Today, Republicans **passed huge tax cuts for billionaires, gigantic tech companies, and corporations** — giving our tax dollars away to the very people responsible for increasing costs on Americans.

At a time when the only right move is to make things more affordable for everyday people, Republicans chose to kick **17 million Americans, including children, off of their Medicaid,** cut funding for women’s healthcare, and take food out of the mouths of the most vulnerable Americans by cutting SNAP — all in order to hand out favors and cash to their campaign contributors.

Right now, American families are struggling to pay for the basics — rationing medicine and putting food back at the grocery store checkout when it's out of reach. Republicans chose this moment to break all the rules to pass a bill to funnel more money to billionaires — **the one percent of the one percent** — that will make it harder for the rest of us to live.

**It’s hard to imagine anything less American on the 4th of July.** I know we all did our best to stop this bill, but we have another opportunity with next year’s elections. Some of this bill will not take effect until after the midterms, so we have a chance to stop this by taking back Congress._Keep_ calling, _keep_ emailing, and _keep_ writing your representatives — and then do your part to **make sure Democrats win in 2026.** [_**Chip in now to help elect Democratic women who will fight back, protect our rights, and stop this dangerous agenda before it takes hold.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110822685/555440264/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-07-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0N2Y1MTU5LTY0NTgtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1dfzRvm2PjYtuohnGxM4IC4sfiGUvHbqvftuwHz-BHM=)

**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s "Big Beautiful Bill" clears final hurdle** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110822753/555440450/55160957?refcode=em-7.03.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjRlM2E2Zi02NTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9UPxcaoWR9tAgropUljfYFbpaaLSHv8uK_U3_HKfDk=)
* * *
After an eight-hour stand led by Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” has officially passed the House. **Donald Trump will now sign it into law, cementing one of the most dangerous federal power grabs in modern history.** Let us be clear about what this bill does: Centralizes voter data into a federal surveillance system, undermines state control over elections and voting rights, and guts protections for civil liberties in the name of “efficiency”. This isn’t just bad policy — it’s a direct assault on the states, on privacy, and on democracy itself. **And it’s now just one signature away from becoming the law of the land.** Trump and his allies want to lock in control over how we vote, how our data is used, and who gets to participate in our democracy. And they are moving fast. DASS is preparing an immediate legal response. We’re already working with partners in Colorado, Arizona, and Michigan to determine how best to push back in court — but this fight will take serious resources. We know what happens when power is centralized in the hands of extremists — we’ve seen the playbook. **If we’re going to defend free and fair elections at the state level, we need you with us right now.** [**Can you rush a donation of $3 or more to help us stop this power grab and defend democracy in the states?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110822754/555440451/1071238056?refcode=em-7.03.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjRlM2E2Zi02NTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9UPxcaoWR9tAgropUljfYFbpaaLSHv8uK_U3_HKfDk=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110822755/555440452/1071238056?refcode=em-7.03.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjRlM2E2Zi02NTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9UPxcaoWR9tAgropUljfYFbpaaLSHv8uK_U3_HKfDk=)**

Trump and his allies want to lock in control over how we vote, how our data is used, and who gets to participate in our democracy. And they are moving fast. DASS is preparing an immediate legal response. We’re already working with partners in Colorado, Arizona, and Michigan to determine how best to push back in court — but this fight will take serious resources. We know what happens when power is centralized in the hands of extremists — we’ve seen the playbook. If we’re going to defend free and fair elections at the state level, we need you with us right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** This is not a drill. It’s not speculation. It’s happening. We’re grateful to every Democrat who stood up to slow this bill down. Now it’s up to us to take the next step. Let’s fight back — together. Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: DNC HQ
subject: re: our Organizing Everywhere Fund
body:
---
Derek, This summer, we’re making history by organizing earlier than EVER before to kick Republicans out of office in 2026. **[Will you become a founding donor to our Organizing Everywhere Fund to support work like this? We’ll explain more in just a minute:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250703_3868_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3868_22930333_RXp8jE&akid=3868%2E22930333%2ERXp8jE)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250703_3868_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3868_22930333_RXp8jE&akid=3868%2E22930333%2ERXp8jE)** If Democrats are going to take back Congress, then we need to lay the groundwork right now. That’s why we’ve just launched Organizing Summer, a nationwide campaign to register voters, train up our volunteer base, and host in-person and virtual events in places where people need to hear from us. We know that in order to win, we need to get out there and forge meaningful connections with folks who are feeling disillusioned or even left behind. Your donation today goes directly toward funding that outreach. **[We can — and must — make sure the Republicans who voted to rip health care and food assistance away from millions of people face the consequences at the ballot box. Your contribution today helps us do just that.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250703_3868_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3868_22930333_RXp8jE&akid=3868%2E22930333%2ERXp8jE)**
Thank you, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Dear Peter,
MAGA Republicans just passed the most dangerous anti-environment, anti-family bill we’ve ever seen.
It’s a Big, Ugly Betrayal of the generations of Americans who will inherit this nation. It guts the protections that keep our air breathable, our water clean, our families safe, and our planet livable.
Their bill cuts healthcare for millions of Americans, funding to monitor air pollution, and slashes programs that clean up pollution near our children’s schools.
And while families are trying to do their part, Republicans are sabotaging our progress—canceling over $8 billion in clean energy investments, slapping red tape and new taxes on wind and solar, and gutting the $7,500 EV tax credit. We’re at the start of fire season, and they’re slashing more than $1 billion from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration and laying off the experts who warn us before disaster strikes.
These aren’t just cruel policies—they are an assault on the air we breathe and the well-being of our families.
The government’s job is to help Americans breathe easier, not choke off our future.
We need to stand up, keep experts in the room where decisions are made, and demand that the guardrails of our Constitution hold. This is our country, not a piggy bank for Trump to smash when he feels like it.
As a doctor and scientist, I know how to diagnose and research symptoms and come up with solutions that address the whole problem. I use that same approach in the House when writing evidence-based policies to strengthen public health systems and stop bad-faith attacks on science and medicine.
I won’t stop fighting on behalf of our families, our doctors and scientists, and our environmental legacy that we pass onto our children.
Join me and send a message to Trump and his cronies: We’re not backing down. We have a microphone and this is our chance to show the strength of our grassroots movement >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250703_OBBB_act]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250703_OBBB_act]
Dr. Maxine Dexter, M.D.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250703_OBBB_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=X_250703_OBBB_act] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: About to be on MSNBC to talk BBB
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823118/555441830/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU1NmIyMi02OTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJOODhursXlfH709xR4dlDFTTHk-N-IZ44-grQLH3nw=&emci=15d3391c-6958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9d556b22-6958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223)
Peter, I’m about to join Ali Velshi on The Last Word With Lawrence O'Donnell, airing live at 9 pm CT, and hope you can tune in. Today, the House voted on the so-called Big Beautiful Bill which will cut healthcare from tens of thousands of our neighbors, and will cost our state _$6.4 billion_ in vital care and services. All so Derrick Van Orden's elitist friends can get even richer. Van Orden _promised_ not to go after rural health. **He lied.** Tune in tonight to MSNBC to hear about the implications of this bill for Wisconsin, the country, and why guys like Van Orden need to go.
